papers.title: Interpretable Human Activity Recognition for Subtle Robbery Detection in Surveillance Videos
papers.abstract: Non-violent street robberies (snatch-and-run) are difficult to detect automatically because they are brief, subtle, and often indistinguishable from benign human interactions in unconstrained surveillance footage. This paper presents a hybrid, pose-driven approach for detecting snatch-and-run events that combines real-time perception with an interpretable classification stage suitable for edge deployment. The system uses a YOLO-based pose estimator to extract body keypoints for each tracked person and computes kinematic and interaction features describing hand speed, arm extension, proximity, and relative motion between an aggressor-victim pair. A Random Forest classifier is trained on these descriptors, and a temporal hysteresis filter is applied to stabilize frame-level predictions and reduce spurious alarms. We evaluate the method on a staged dataset and on a disjoint test set collected from internet videos, demonstrating promising generalization across different scenes and camera viewpoints. Finally, we implement the complete pipeline on an NVIDIA Jetson Nano and report real-time performance, supporting the feasibility of proactive, on-device robbery detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于姿态的混合方法，用于监控视频中非暴力抢劫（抢夺）的实时、可解释检测。

papers.title: Faithfulness Serum: Mitigating the Faithfulness Gap in Textual Explanations of LLM Decisions via Attribution Guidance
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance and have revolutionized NLP, but their lack of explainability keeps them treated as black boxes, limiting their use in domains that demand transparency and trust. A promising direction to address this issue is post-hoc text-based explanations, which aim to explain model decisions in natural language. Prior work has focused on generating convincing rationales that appear to be subjectively faithful, but it remains unclear whether these explanations are epistemically faithful, whether they reflect the internal evidence the model actually relied on for its decision. In this paper, we first assess the epistemic faithfulness of LLM-generated explanations via counterfactuals and show that they are often unfaithful. We then introduce a training-free method that enhances faithfulness by guiding explanation generation through attention-level interventions, informed by token-level heatmaps extracted via a faithful attribution method. This method significantly improves epistemic faithfulness across multiple models, benchmarks, and prompts.

analysis.tldr: 通过注意力引导干预提升LLM文本解释的认知忠实性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在需要透明度和信任的领域应用受限，因其缺乏可解释性；现有事后文本解释虽看似主观忠实，但认知忠实性（是否反映模型实际依赖的证据）未知。
analysis.problem: LLM生成的文本解释存在认知忠实性差距，即解释不反映模型实际用于决策的内部证据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过反事实评估发现LLM生成的解释往往不忠实于模型内部证据。

papers.title: Challenges and Future Directions in Agentic Reverse Engineering Systems
papers.abstract: Agentic systems built on large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being used for complex security tasks, including binary reverse engineering (RE). Despite recent growth in popularity and capability, these systems continue to face limitations in realistic settings. Cutting-edge systems still fail in complex RE scenarios that involve obfuscation, timing, and unique architecture. In this work, we examine how agentic systems perform reverse engineering tasks with static, dynamic, and hybrid agents. Through an analysis of existing agentic tool usage, we identify several limitations, including token constraints, struggles with obfuscation, and a lack of program guardrails. From these findings, we outline current challenges and position future directions for system designers to overcome from a security perspective.

analysis.tldr: 本文分析了基于LLM的智能体逆向工程系统的局限性，并提出了未来安全方向。

papers.title: Seeing Through Experts Eyes A Foundational Vision Language Model Trained on Radiologists Gaze and Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large scale vision language models have shown promise in automating chest Xray interpretation, yet their clinical utility remains limited by a gap between model outputs and radiologist reasoning. Most systems optimize for semantic information without emulating how experts visually examine medical images, often overlooking critical findings or diverging from established diagnostic workflows. Radiologists follow structured protocols (e.g., the ABCDEF approach) that ensure all clinically relevant regions are systematically examined, reducing missed findings and supporting reliable diagnostic reasoning. We introduce GazeX, a vision language model that leverages radiologists' eye tracking data as a behavioral prior to model expert diagnostic reasoning. By incorporating gaze trajectories and fixation patterns into pretraining, GazeX learns to follow the spatial and temporal structure of radiologist attention and integrates observations in a clinically meaningful sequence. Using a curated dataset of over 30,000 gaze key frames from five radiologists, we demonstrate that GazeX produces more accurate, interpretable, and expert consistent outputs across radiology report generation, disease grounding, and visual question answering, utilizing 231,835 radiographic studies, 780,014 question answer pairs, and 1,162 image sentence pairs with bounding boxes. Unlike autonomous reporting systems, GazeX produces verifiable evidence artifacts, including inspection trajectories and finding linked localized regions, enabling efficient human verification and safe human AI collaboration. Learning through expert eyes provides a practical route toward more trustworthy, explainable, and diagnostically robust AI systems for radiology and beyond.

analysis.tldr: GazeX通过放射科医生的眼动数据训练VLM，使其遵循专家视觉检查流程，提升胸部X光解读的准确性和可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM在胸部X光解读中缺乏对放射科医生视觉推理过程的模拟，导致遗漏关键发现或偏离临床工作流程，限制了临床实用性。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 放射科医生遵循结构化协议（如ABCDEF）系统检查所有临床相关区域，减少遗漏；而现有模型仅优化语义信息，未模拟专家视觉检查过程。
analysis.method: GazeX：利用五位放射科医生在30,000+关键帧上的眼动追踪数据（注视轨迹和注视模式）作为行为先验，在预训练中融入时空注意力结构，使模型按临床有意义的顺序整合观察结果。

在报告生成、疾病定位和视觉问答任务上，GazeX生成更准确、可解释且与专家一致的输出，并产生可验证的证据工件（如检查轨迹和定位区域）。

papers.title: DharmaOCR: Specialized Small Language Models for Structured OCR that outperform Open-Source and Commercial Baselines
papers.abstract: This manuscript introduces DharmaOCR Full and Lite, a pair of specialized small language models (SSLMs) for structured OCR that jointly optimize transcription quality, generation stability, and inference cost. It also presents DharmaOCR-Benchmark, a benchmark that covers printed, handwritten, and legal/administrative documents, and proposes a unified evaluation protocol that measures fidelity and structure while explicitly tracking text degeneration as a first-class benchmark metric (alongside unit cost). Beyond reporting degeneration rates, the manuscript empirically shows degeneration is not merely a quality failure, since it materially worsens production performance by increasing response time, reducing throughput, and inflating computational cost due to abnormally long generations. To the best of the author's knowledge, as a methodological contribution, this is the first application of Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) for OCR, explicitly using degenerate generations as rejected examples to penalize looping behavior. Combined with Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for enforcing a strict JSON schema (header, margin, footer, and text), DPO consistently reduces degeneration rate across model families (up to 87.6% relative) while preserving or improving extraction quality. The resulting models, namely, DharmaOCR Full (7B) and DharmaOCR Lite (3B), set a new state-of-the-art on DharmaOCR-Benchmark, outperforming each open-source and commercial baseline model evaluated regarding extraction quality, reaching 0.925 and 0.911 scores with 0.40% and 0.20% degeneration rates. AWQ quantization reduced up to 22% per-page cost with negligible quality loss, enabling a strong quality-cost trade-off in comparison to proprietary OCR APIs and open-source alternatives.

analysis.tldr: 提出 DharmaOCR 系列小语言模型，通过 DPO 和 SFT 优化结构化 OCR，在质量、稳定性和成本上超越开源和商业基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 OCR 模型在结构化文档（如法律/行政文件）上存在转录质量不稳定、生成退化（如循环生成）导致成本增加的问题，且缺乏统一的评估协议。
analysis.problem: 如何设计专用小语言模型，在结构化 OCR 中同时提升转录质量、生成稳定性并降低推理成本。

analysis.method: 结合监督微调（SFT）强制 JSON 结构输出和直接偏好优化（DPO）以退化生成作为负样本惩罚循环行为，并采用 AWQ 量化降低每页成本。
contributions: 首次将 DPO 应用于 OCR，利用退化生成作为拒绝示例来抑制循环行为。
提出 DharmaOCR-Benchmark 基准和统一评估协议，将退化率作为一级指标。
DharmaOCR Full (7B) 和 Lite (3B) 在质量（0.925/0.911）和退化率（0.40%/0.20%）上达到新 SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在 DharmaOCR-Benchmark 上评估，覆盖印刷、手写和法律/行政文档，与多个开源和商业基线对比，AWQ 量化降低每页成本 22% 且质量损失可忽略。
limitations: 模型仅在特定文档类型上验证，泛化性未知。

papers.title: Aerial Multi-Functional RIS in Fluid Antennas-Aided Full-Duplex Networks: A Self-Optimized Hybrid Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach
papers.abstract: To address high data traffic demands of sixth-generation (6G) networks, this paper proposes a novel architecture that integrates autonomous aerial vehicles (AAVs) and multi-functional reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (MF-RISs) as AM-RIS in fluid antenna (FA)-assisted full-duplex (FD) networks. The AM-RIS provides hybrid functionalities, including signal reflection, amplification, and energy harvesting (EH), potentially improving both signal coverage and sustainability. Meanwhile, FA facilitates fine-grained spatial adaptability at FD-enabled base station (BS), which complements residual self-interference (SI) suppression. We aim at maximizing the overall energy efficiency (EE) by jointly optimizing transmit DL beamforming at BS, UL user power, configuration of AM-RIS, and positions of the FA and AM-RIS. Owing to the hybrid continuous-discrete parameters and high dimensionality of the intractable problem, we have conceived a self-optimized multi-agent hybrid deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework (SOHRL), which integrates multi-agent deep Q-networks (DQN) and multi-agent proximal policy optimization (PPO), respectively handling discrete and continuous actions. To enhance self-adaptability, an attention-driven state representation and meta-level hyperparameter optimization are incorporated, enabling multi-agents to autonomously adjust learning hyperparameters. Simulation results validate the effectiveness of the proposed AM-RIS-enabled FA-aided FD networks empowered by SOHRL algorithm. The results reveal that SOHRL outperforms benchmarks of the case without attention mechanism and conventional hybrid/multi-agent/standalone DRL. Moreover, AM-RIS in FD achieves the highest EE compared to half-duplex, conventional rigid antenna arrays, partial EH, and conventional RIS without amplification, highlighting its potential as a compelling solution for EE-aware wireless networks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自优化混合深度强化学习框架，联合优化空中多功能可重构智能表面与流体天线辅助全双工网络的能效。
analysis.research_motivation: 6G网络面临高数据流量需求，现有架构在信号覆盖、自干扰抑制和能效方面存在瓶颈，需要融合空中平台、可重构智能表面和流体天线等新技术。
analysis.problem: 如何联合优化下行波束赋形、上行用户功率、AM-RIS配置以及FA和AM-RIS位置，以最大化全双工网络的能量效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 问题具有混合连续-离散参数和高维特性，传统优化方法难以求解；多智能体独立学习时缺乏协调和自适应能力。
analysis.method: 提出自优化多智能体混合深度强化学习框架（SOHRL），集成多智能体DQN处理离散动作和多智能体PPO处理连续动作，并引入注意力驱动的状态表示和元级超参数优化。
contributions: 提出AM-RIS架构，融合反射、放大和能量收集功能，提升信号覆盖和可持续性。
设计SOHRL算法，通过混合DRL和自优化机制有效解决高维混合参数优化问题。
仿真验证了所提架构和算法在能效上的显著优势。
analysis.experiments: 仿真结果表明SOHRL优于无注意力机制、传统混合/多智能体/单智能体DRL基线；AM-RIS在全双工模式下能效最高，优于半双工、传统天线阵列、部分能量收集和无放大RIS。
limitations: 仿真环境可能简化了实际信道和硬件约束。
多智能体框架的计算复杂度较高。

papers.title: EuropeMedQA Study Protocol: A Multilingual, Multimodal Medical Examination Dataset for Language Model Evaluation
papers.abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated high proficiency on English-centric medical examinations, their performance often declines when faced with non-English languages and multimodal diagnostic tasks. This study protocol describes the development of EuropeMedQA, the first comprehensive, multilingual, and multimodal medical examination dataset sourced from official regulatory exams in Italy, France, Spain, and Portugal. Following FAIR data principles and SPIRIT-AI guidelines, we describe a rigorous curation process and an automated translation pipeline for comparative analysis. We evaluate contemporary multimodal LLMs using a zero-shot, strictly constrained prompting strategy to assess cross-lingual transfer and visual reasoning. EuropeMedQA aims to provide a contamination-resistant benchmark that reflects the complexity of European clinical practices and fosters the development of more generalizable medical AI.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个多语言多模态医学考试数据集EuropeMedQA，用于评估LLM的跨语言和视觉推理能力。

papers.title: Geometrically Consistent Multi-View Scene Generation from Freehand Sketches
papers.abstract: We tackle a new problem: generating geometrically consistent multi-view scenes from a single freehand sketch. Freehand sketches are the most geometrically impoverished input one could offer a multi-view generator. They convey scene intent through abstract strokes while introducing spatial distortions that actively conflict with any consistent 3D interpretation. No prior method attempts this; existing multi-view approaches require photographs or text, while sketch-to-3D methods need multiple views or costly per-scene optimisation. We address three compounding challenges; absent training data, the need for geometric reasoning from distorted 2D input, and cross-view consistency, through three mutually reinforcing contributions: (i) a curated dataset of $\sim$9k sketch-to-multiview samples, constructed via an automated generation and filtering pipeline; (ii) Parallel Camera-Aware Attention Adapters (CA3) that inject geometric inductive biases into the video transformer; and (iii) a Sparse Correspondence Supervision Loss (CSL) derived from Structure-from-Motion reconstructions. Our framework synthesizes all views in a single denoising process without requiring reference images, iterative refinement, or per-scene optimization. Our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art two-stage baselines, improving realism (FID) by over 60% and geometric consistency (Corr-Acc) by 23%, while providing up to a 3.7$\times$ inference speedup.

analysis.tldr: 提出从单张手绘草图生成几何一致的多视角场景的方法，无需参考图像或逐场景优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 手绘草图是最贫瘠的几何输入，现有方法需要照片或文本，而草图转3D方法需要多视图或昂贵优化，缺乏从单张草图生成多视图场景的研究。

papers.title: Quantum-inspired tensor networks in machine learning models
papers.abstract: Tensor networks were developed in the context of many-body physics as compressed representations of multiparticle quantum states. These representations mitigate the exponential complexity of many-body systems by capturing only the most relevant dependencies. Due to the formal similarity between quantum entanglement and statistical correlations, tensor networks have recently been integrated in machine learning, operating both as alternative learning architectures and as decompositions of components of neural networks. The expectation is that the theoretical understanding of tensor networks developed within quantum many-body physics leads to novel methods that offer advantages in terms of computational efficiency, explainability, or privacy. Here we review the use of tensor networks in the context of machine learning, providing a critical assessment of the state of the art, the potential advantages, and the challenges that must be overcome.

papers.title: One Token per Highly Selective Frame: Towards Extreme Compression for Long Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Long video understanding is inherently challenging for vision-language models (VLMs) because of the extensive number of frames. With each video frame typically expanding into tens or hundreds of tokens, the limited context length of large language models (LLMs) forces the VLMs to perceive the frames sparsely and lose temporal information. To address this, we explore extreme video token compression towards one token per frame at the final LLM layer. Our key insight is that heuristic-based compression, widely adopted by previous methods, is prone to information loss, and this necessitates supervising LLM layers into learnable and progressive modules for token-level compression (LP-Comp). Such compression enables our VLM to digest 2x-4x more frames with improved performance. To further increase the token efficiency, we investigate frame-level compression, which selects the frames most relevant to the queries via the internal attention scores of the LLM layers, named question-conditioned compression (QC-Comp). As a notable distinction from previous studies, we mitigate the position bias of LLM attention in long contexts, i.e., the over-concentration on the beginning and end of a sequence, by splitting long videos into short segments and employing local attention. Collectively, our combined token-level and frame-level leads to an extreme compression model for long video understanding, named XComp, achieving a significantly larger compression ratio and enabling denser frame sampling. Our XComp is finetuned from VideoChat-Flash with a data-efficient supervised compression tuning stage that only requires 2.5% of the supervised fine-tuning data, yet boosts the accuracy from 42.9% to 46.2% on LVBench and enhances multiple other long video benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出XComp，通过可学习的逐层令牌压缩和问题条件帧选择，实现长视频理解中的极端压缩。
analysis.research_motivation: 长视频理解中，VLM因每帧产生大量令牌而受限于LLM上下文长度，导致稀疏采样和时序信息丢失。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持性能的同时，对视频帧进行极端令牌压缩，以支持更多帧的密集采样。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出启发式压缩易导致信息丢失，且LLM在长上下文中存在位置偏差（过度关注序列首尾）。
analysis.method: 提出XComp，包含两层压缩：令牌级压缩（LP-Comp）通过可学习的逐层渐进模块压缩每帧令牌；帧级压缩（QC-Comp）利用LLM内部注意力分数选择与查询最相关的帧，并通过分片局部注意力缓解位置偏差。
contributions: 提出LP-Comp，一种可学习的逐层令牌压缩方法，使VLM能处理2-4倍更多帧并提升性能。
提出QC-Comp，利用注意力分数进行问题条件帧选择，结合分片局部注意力缓解位置偏差。
XComp在LVBench上仅用2.5%的SFT数据将准确率从42.9%提升至46.2%，并在多个长视频基准上取得提升。
analysis.experiments: 在LVBench等多个长视频基准上评估，XComp在LVBench上准确率从42.9%提升至46.2%，且仅需2.5%的SFT数据。
limitations: 可能依赖特定VLM架构（VideoChat-Flash），泛化性未验证。

papers.title: Seedance 2.0: Advancing Video Generation for World Complexity
papers.abstract: Seedance 2.0 is a new native multi-modal audio-video generation model, officially released in China in early February 2026. Compared with its predecessors, Seedance 1.0 and 1.5 Pro, Seedance 2.0 adopts a unified, highly efficient, and large-scale architecture for multi-modal audio-video joint generation. This allows it to support four input modalities: text, image, audio, and video, by integrating one of the most comprehensive suites of multi-modal content reference and editing capabilities available in the industry to date. It delivers substantial, well-rounded improvements across all key sub-dimensions of video and audio generation. In both expert evaluations and public user tests, the model has demonstrated performance on par with the leading levels in the field. Seedance 2.0 supports direct generation of audio-video content with durations ranging from 4 to 15 seconds, with native output resolutions of 480p and 720p. For multi-modal inputs as reference, its current open platform supports up to 3 video clips, 9 images, and 3 audio clips. In addition, we provide Seedance 2.0 Fast version, an accelerated variant of Seedance 2.0 designed to boost generation speed for low-latency scenarios. Seedance 2.0 has delivered significant improvements to its foundational generation capabilities and multi-modal generation performance, bringing an enhanced creative experience for end users.

analysis.tldr: Seedance 2.0 是一个原生多模态音视频生成模型，支持文本、图像、音频和视频输入，在视频和音频生成质量上达到业界领先水平。

papers.title: ROSE: Retrieval-Oriented Segmentation Enhancement
papers.abstract: Existing segmentation models based on multimodal large language models (MLLMs), such as LISA, often struggle with novel or emerging entities due to their inability to incorporate up-to-date knowledge. To address this challenge, we introduce the Novel Emerging Segmentation Task (NEST), which focuses on segmenting (i) novel entities that MLLMs fail to recognize due to their absence from training data, and (ii) emerging entities that exist within the model's knowledge but demand up-to-date external information for accurate recognition. To support the study of NEST, we construct a NEST benchmark using an automated pipeline that generates news-related data samples for comprehensive evaluation. Additionally, we propose ROSE: Retrieval-Oriented Segmentation Enhancement, a plug-and-play framework designed to augment any MLLM-based segmentation model. ROSE comprises four key components. First, an Internet Retrieval-Augmented Generation module is introduced to employ user-provided multimodal inputs to retrieve real-time web information. Then, a Textual Prompt Enhancer enriches the model with up-to-date information and rich background knowledge, improving the model's perception ability for emerging entities. Furthermore, a Visual Prompt Enhancer is proposed to compensate for MLLMs' lack of exposure to novel entities by leveraging internet-sourced images. To maintain efficiency, a WebSense module is introduced to intelligently decide when to invoke retrieval mechanisms based on user input. Experimental results demonstrate that ROSE significantly boosts performance on the NEST benchmark, outperforming a strong Gemini-2.0 Flash-based retrieval baseline by 19.2 in gIoU.

analysis.tldr: 提出检索增强框架ROSE，提升MLLM分割模型对新兴实体的分割能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于MLLM的分割模型（如LISA）因无法获取最新知识，难以处理训练数据中未出现的新兴实体，限制了其在动态场景中的应用。
analysis.problem: 解决MLLM分割模型对新兴实体（包括模型未知的新实体和需要最新信息识别的涌现实体）的分割问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MLLM分割模型对训练数据中未出现的新实体识别失败，对需要最新外部信息的涌现实体识别不准确。
analysis.method: 提出ROSE框架，包含互联网检索增强生成模块、文本提示增强器、视觉提示增强器和WebSense模块，通过检索实时网络信息增强多模态输入，提升分割性能。
contributions: 定义了新兴实体分割任务（NEST）并构建了相应基准数据集。

analysis.experiments: 在NEST基准上，ROSE相比强基线Gemini-2.0 Flash-based检索方法在gIoU上提升19.2。

papers.title: HY-World 2.0: A Multi-Modal World Model for Reconstructing, Generating, and Simulating 3D Worlds
papers.abstract: We introduce HY-World 2.0, a multi-modal world model framework that advances our prior project HY-World 1.0. HY-World 2.0 accommodates diverse input modalities, including text prompts, single-view images, multi-view images, and videos, and produces 3D world representations. With text or single-view image inputs, the model performs world generation, synthesizing high-fidelity, navigable 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) scenes. This is achieved through a four-stage method: a) Panorama Generation with HY-Pano 2.0, b) Trajectory Planning with WorldNav, c) World Expansion with WorldStereo 2.0, and d) World Composition with WorldMirror 2.0. Specifically, we introduce key innovations to enhance panorama fidelity, enable 3D scene understanding and planning, and upgrade WorldStereo, our keyframe-based view generation model with consistent memory. We also upgrade WorldMirror, a feed-forward model for universal 3D prediction, by refining model architecture and learning strategy, enabling world reconstruction from multi-view images or videos. Also, we introduce WorldLens, a high-performance 3DGS rendering platform featuring a flexible engine-agnostic architecture, automatic IBL lighting, efficient collision detection, and training-rendering co-design, enabling interactive exploration of 3D worlds with character support. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HY-World 2.0 achieves state-of-the-art performance on several benchmarks among open-source approaches, delivering results comparable to the closed-source model Marble. We release all model weights, code, and technical details to facilitate reproducibility and support further research on 3D world models.

analysis.tldr: HY-World 2.0 是一个多模态世界模型，能从文本、图像或视频生成可导航的 3D 场景，在多个基准上达到开源 SOTA。

papers.title: SpatialEvo: Self-Evolving Spatial Intelligence via Deterministic Geometric Environments
papers.abstract: Spatial reasoning over three-dimensional scenes is a core capability for embodied intelligence, yet continuous model improvement remains bottlenecked by the cost of geometric annotation. The self-evolving paradigm offers a promising path, but its reliance on model consensus to construct pseudo-labels causes training to reinforce rather than correct the model's own geometric errors. We identify a property unique to 3D spatial reasoning that circumvents this limitation: ground truth is a deterministic consequence of the underlying geometry, computable exactly from point clouds and camera poses without any model involvement. Building on this insight, we present SpatialEvo, a self-evolving framework for 3D spatial reasoning, centered on the Deterministic Geometric Environment (DGE). The DGE formalizes 16 spatial reasoning task categories under explicit geometric validation rules and converts unannotated 3D scenes into zero-noise interactive oracles, replacing model consensus with objective physical feedback. A single shared-parameter policy co-evolves across questioner and solver roles under DGE constraints: the questioner generates physically valid spatial questions grounded in scene observations, while the solver derives precise answers against DGE-verified ground truth. A task-adaptive scheduler endogenously concentrates training on the model's weakest categories, producing a dynamic curriculum without manual design. Experiments across nine benchmarks demonstrate that SpatialEvo achieves the highest average score at both 3B and 7B scales, with consistent gains on spatial reasoning benchmarks and no degradation on general visual understanding.

analysis.tldr: SpatialEvo 利用 3D 几何确定性构建零噪声自进化框架，无需人工标注即可持续提升空间推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D 空间推理是具身智能的核心能力，但模型持续改进受限于几何标注的高成本；现有自进化方法依赖模型共识构建伪标签，会强化而非纠正模型自身的几何错误。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖人工标注和模型共识的情况下，实现 3D 空间推理模型的自我进化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出 3D 空间推理具有独特性质：真实标注是底层几何的确定性结果，可从点云和相机位姿精确计算，无需模型参与。
analysis.method: 提出 SpatialEvo 框架，核心是确定性几何环境 (DGE)，形式化 16 种空间推理任务并基于几何验证规则提供零噪声交互；共享参数策略在提问者和求解者角色下共同进化，并由任务自适应调度器动态聚焦模型薄弱类别。
contributions: 发现 3D 空间推理中真实标注的确定性属性，可替代模型共识用于自进化。
提出 DGE 形式化 16 种空间推理任务并提供零噪声交互反馈。
设计任务自适应调度器，自动生成动态课程聚焦模型薄弱环节。
analysis.experiments: 在 9 个基准上，SpatialEvo 在 3B 和 7B 规模均取得最高平均分，空间推理基准上持续提升，通用视觉理解无退化。
limitations: 框架依赖点云和相机位姿的精确性，在噪声场景下可能受限。
16 种任务类别可能未覆盖所有空间推理场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，利用几何确定性解决自进化中的伪标签问题，实验充分且效果显著，与 3D 视觉方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SpatialEvo 利用 3D 几何确定性构建零噪声自进化框架，无需人工标注即可持续提升空间推理能力。

papers.title: From $P(y|x)$ to $P(y)$: Investigating Reinforcement Learning in Pre-train Space
papers.abstract: While reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) significantly enhances LLM reasoning by optimizing the conditional distribution P(y|x), its potential is fundamentally bounded by the base model's existing output distribution. Optimizing the marginal distribution P(y) in the Pre-train Space addresses this bottleneck by encoding reasoning ability and preserving broad exploration capacity. Yet, conventional pre-training relies on static corpora for passive learning, leading to a distribution shift that hinders targeted reasoning enhancement. In this paper, we introduce PreRL (Pre-train Space RL), which applies reward-driven online updates directly to P(y). We theoretically and empirically validate the strong gradient alignment between log P(y) and log P(y|x), establishing PreRL as a viable surrogate for standard RL. Furthermore, we uncover a critical mechanism: Negative Sample Reinforcement (NSR) within PreRL serves as an exceptionally effective driver for reasoning. NSR-PreRL rapidly prunes incorrect reasoning spaces while stimulating endogenous reflective behaviors, increasing transition and reflection thoughts by 14.89x and 6.54x, respectively. Leveraging these insights, we propose Dual Space RL (DSRL), a Policy Reincarnation strategy that initializes models with NSR-PreRL to expand the reasoning horizon before transitioning to standard RL for fine-grained optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DSRL consistently outperforms strong baselines, proving that pre-train space pruning effectively steers the policy toward a refined correct reasoning subspace.

analysis.tldr: 提出PreRL方法，在预训练空间优化边际分布P(y)以突破RLVR瓶颈，并发现负样本强化机制可高效提升推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）通过优化条件分布P(y|x)提升LLM推理，但其效果受限于基座模型的输出分布；传统预训练依赖静态语料被动学习，存在分布偏移，难以针对性增强推理。
analysis.problem: 如何突破RLVR的瓶颈，在预训练空间直接优化边际分布P(y)以增强推理能力，并解决分布偏移问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现负样本强化（NSR）机制能快速剪枝错误推理空间，并激发内省式反思行为，使过渡和反思思维分别增加14.89倍和6.54倍。
analysis.method: 提出PreRL，在预训练空间对P(y)进行奖励驱动的在线更新；理论证明log P(y)与log P(y|x)梯度对齐；进一步提出DSRL策略，先用NSR-PreRL扩展推理视野，再切换标准RL进行细粒度优化。
contributions: 提出PreRL方法，在预训练空间优化边际分布P(y)以突破RLVR瓶颈。
理论验证log P(y)与log P(y|x)的梯度对齐，证明PreRL可作为标准RL的有效替代。
发现负样本强化（NSR）机制能高效驱动推理，并提出DSRL策略实现推理能力提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多个推理任务上，DSRL持续优于强基线。摘要未提供具体实验数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定预训练模型架构。
NSR机制的理论解释尚需进一步深化。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论分析扎实，实验验证有效，与LLM推理方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PreRL方法，在预训练空间优化边际分布P(y)以突破RLVR瓶颈，并发现负样本强化机制可高效提升推理能力。

papers.title: Geometric Context Transformer for Streaming 3D Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Streaming 3D reconstruction aims to recover 3D information, such as camera poses and point clouds, from a video stream, which necessitates geometric accuracy, temporal consistency, and computational efficiency. Motivated by the principles of Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM), we introduce LingBot-Map, a feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data, built upon a geometric context transformer (GCT) architecture. A defining aspect of LingBot-Map lies in its carefully designed attention mechanism, which integrates an anchor context, a pose-reference window, and a trajectory memory to address coordinate grounding, dense geometric cues, and long-range drift correction, respectively. This design keeps the streaming state compact while retaining rich geometric context, enabling stable efficient inference at around 20 FPS on 518 x 378 resolution inputs over long sequences exceeding 10,000 frames. Extensive evaluations across a variety of benchmarks demonstrate that our approach achieves superior performance compared to both existing streaming and iterative optimization-based approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于几何上下文Transformer的流式3D重建模型LingBot-Map，实现高精度、时间一致且高效的在线重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 流式3D重建需要从视频流中实时恢复相机位姿和点云，现有方法在几何精度、时间一致性和计算效率上难以兼顾。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个前馈式3D基础模型，在流式数据上实现稳定、高效且精确的3D重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出几何上下文Transformer（GCT）架构，包含锚点上下文、位姿参考窗口和轨迹记忆三个注意力机制，分别处理坐标对齐、密集几何线索和长程漂移校正。
contributions: 提出LingBot-Map，一个基于GCT的流式3D重建前馈模型。
设计集成锚点上下文、位姿参考窗口和轨迹记忆的注意力机制，实现紧凑状态与丰富几何上下文的平衡。
在多个基准上达到优于现有流式和迭代优化方法的性能，支持长序列（>10k帧）实时推理（~20 FPS）。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估，与现有流式和迭代优化方法比较，取得更优性能。
limitations: 可能对极端动态场景或光照变化敏感。
计算资源需求可能仍较高，未提及移动端部署。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，性能优越，与3D视觉方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于几何上下文Transformer的流式3D重建模型LingBot-Map，实现高精度、时间一致且高效的在线重建。

papers.title: LongCoT: Benchmarking Long-Horizon Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
papers.abstract: As language models are increasingly deployed for complex autonomous tasks, their ability to reason accurately over longer horizons becomes critical. An essential component of this ability is planning and managing a long, complex chain-of-thought (CoT). We introduce LongCoT, a scalable benchmark of 2,500 expert-designed problems spanning chemistry, mathematics, computer science, chess, and logic to isolate and directly measure the long-horizon CoT reasoning capabilities of frontier models. Problems consist of a short input with a verifiable answer; solving them requires navigating a graph of interdependent steps that span tens to hundreds of thousands of reasoning tokens. Each local step is individually tractable for frontier models, so failures reflect long-horizon reasoning limitations. At release, the best models achieve <10% accuracy (GPT 5.2: 9.8%; Gemini 3 Pro: 6.1%) on LongCoT, revealing a substantial gap in current capabilities. Overall, LongCoT provides a rigorous measure of long-horizon reasoning, tracking the ability of frontier models to reason reliably over extended periods.

analysis.tldr: LongCoT 是一个评估大模型长链推理能力的新基准，当前最佳模型准确率不足 10%。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型在复杂自主任务中需要长程推理，但现有基准难以隔离和测量长链思维链推理能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个可扩展的基准来直接评估前沿模型在长链推理中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出每个局部步骤对前沿模型而言是可处理的，因此失败反映了长程推理的局限性。
analysis.method: 构建包含 2500 个专家设计问题的基准，涵盖化学、数学、计算机科学、国际象棋和逻辑，问题需通过数十万推理 token 的图结构步骤求解。
contributions: 提出了 LongCoT 基准，用于隔离和测量长链推理能力。
揭示了当前最佳模型在长链推理上的显著差距（准确率 <10%）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及 GPT 5.2 和 Gemini 3 Pro 的准确率。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖五个领域，可能不全面。
未讨论模型在短链推理上的表现对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计新颖，聚焦长链推理这一关键能力，实验显示模型差距大，有重要评测价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LongCoT 是一个评估大模型长链推理能力的新基准，当前最佳模型准确率不足 10%。

papers.title: From Feelings to Metrics: Understanding and Formalizing How Users Vibe-Test LLMs
papers.abstract: Evaluating LLMs is challenging, as benchmark scores often fail to capture models' real-world usefulness. Instead, users often rely on ``vibe-testing'': informal experience-based evaluation, such as comparing models on coding tasks related to their own workflow. While prevalent, vibe-testing is often too ad hoc and unstructured to analyze or reproduce at scale. In this work, we study how vibe-testing works in practice and then formalize it to support systematic analysis. We first analyze two empirical resources: (1) a survey of user evaluation practices, and (2) a collection of in-the-wild model comparison reports from blogs and social media. Based on these resources, we formalize vibe-testing as a two-part process: users personalize both what they test and how they judge responses. We then introduce a proof-of-concept evaluation pipeline that follows this formulation by generating personalized prompts and comparing model outputs using user-aware subjective criteria. In experiments on coding benchmarks, we find that combining personalized prompts and user-aware evaluation can change which model is preferred, reflecting the role of vibe-testing in practice. These findings suggest that formalized vibe-testing can serve as a useful approach for bridging benchmark scores and real-world experience.

analysis.tldr: 将用户非正式的“vibe-testing”评估LLM的方法形式化，并验证其能改变模型偏好。
analysis.research_motivation: 基准分数常无法反映LLM的真实实用性，用户依赖非正式的“vibe-testing”评估，但该方法过于随意、难以系统分析。
analysis.problem: 如何理解并形式化用户对LLM的“vibe-testing”评估过程，以支持系统化分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户通过个性化测试内容和判断标准来评估模型，这种非正式评估在实践中普遍存在但缺乏结构化。
analysis.method: 通过用户调查和社交媒体报告分析vibe-testing实践，将其形式化为个性化提示生成和用户感知主观评估的两阶段流程，并构建概念验证流水线。
contributions: 首次系统研究并形式化了LLM的vibe-testing评估实践
提出包含个性化提示和用户感知评估的流水线，并验证其能改变模型偏好
analysis.experiments: 在编码基准上实验，发现结合个性化提示和用户感知评估会改变模型偏好，表明形式化vibe-testing可弥合基准分数与真实体验的差距。
limitations: 概念验证流水线可能未覆盖所有vibe-testing场景
实验仅基于编码任务，泛化性待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 研究视角新颖，形式化用户评估实践有实际价值，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将用户非正式的“vibe-testing”评估LLM的方法形式化，并验证其能改变模型偏好。

papers.title: Don't Let the Video Speak: Audio-Contrastive Preference Optimization for Audio-Visual Language Models
papers.abstract: While Audio-Visual Language Models (AVLMs) have achieved remarkable progress over recent years, their reliability is bottlenecked by cross-modal hallucination. A particularly pervasive manifestation is video-driven audio hallucination: models routinely exploit visual shortcuts to hallucinate expected sounds, discarding true auditory evidence. To counteract this deeply ingrained visual dominance, we propose Audio-Contrastive Preference Optimization (ACPO). This dual-axis preference learning framework introduces an output-contrastive objective to penalize visual descriptions masquerading as audio facts, alongside an input-contrastive objective that swaps audio tracks to explicitly penalize generation invariant to the true auditory signal. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ACPO establishes highly faithful audio grounding and mitigates audio hallucination without compromising overarching multimodal capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出音频对比偏好优化（ACPO）框架，通过输出对比和输入对比双重目标，有效缓解视听语言模型中的音频幻觉问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 视听语言模型（AVLM）虽取得显著进展，但存在跨模态幻觉瓶颈，尤其是视频驱动的音频幻觉：模型常利用视觉捷径生成预期声音，忽略真实听觉证据，严重影响可靠性。
analysis.problem: 解决AVLM中视觉主导导致的音频幻觉问题，即模型忽视真实音频信号而依赖视觉线索生成不准确的音频描述。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模型存在视频驱动的音频幻觉现象：模型利用视觉捷径（visual shortcuts）来幻觉预期声音，丢弃真实听觉证据，这是一种视觉主导的跨模态幻觉。
analysis.method: 提出音频对比偏好优化（ACPO）双轴偏好学习框架，包含输出对比目标（惩罚伪装成音频事实的视觉描述）和输入对比目标（通过交换音频轨道显式惩罚对真实音频信号不变的生成）。
contributions: 提出ACPO框架，首次将对比偏好学习应用于AVLM的音频幻觉缓解。
设计输出对比和输入对比双重目标，分别从输出和输入层面抑制视觉主导的音频幻觉。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定音频-视频数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
双轴对比目标可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 针对AVLM音频幻觉问题提出新颖的双轴对比偏好优化方法，与VLM/MLLM方向高度相关，但摘要未提供实验细节，保守评分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出音频对比偏好优化（ACPO）框架，通过输出对比和输入对比双重目标，有效缓解视听语言模型中的音频幻觉问题。

papers.title: Rhetorical Questions in LLM Representations: A Linear Probing Study
papers.abstract: Rhetorical questions are asked not to seek information but to persuade or signal stance. How large language models internally represent them remains unclear. We analyze rhetorical questions in LLM representations using linear probes on two social-media datasets with different discourse contexts, and find that rhetorical signals emerge early and are most stably captured by last-token representations. Rhetorical questions are linearly separable from information-seeking questions within datasets, and remain detectable under cross-dataset transfer, reaching AUROC around 0.7-0.8. However, we demonstrate that transferability does not simply imply a shared representation. Probes trained on different datasets produce different rankings when applied to the same target corpus, with overlap among the top-ranked instances often below 0.2. Qualitative analysis shows that these divergences correspond to distinct rhetorical phenomena: some probes capture discourse-level rhetorical stance embedded in extended argumentation, while others emphasize localized, syntax-driven interrogative acts. Together, these findings suggest that rhetorical questions in LLM representations are encoded by multiple linear directions emphasizing different cues, rather than a single shared direction.

analysis.tldr: 线性探针揭示LLM中修辞问句由多条线性方向编码，而非单一共享方向。
analysis.research_motivation: 修辞问句在自然语言中广泛用于说服和表达立场，但大型语言模型如何内部表征它们尚不清楚，理解这一机制有助于提升模型对语言细微差别的处理能力。
analysis.problem: 探究大型语言模型内部表征中修辞问句的编码方式，特别是其是否具有共享的线性表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现修辞问句与信息寻求问句在数据集内线性可分，跨数据集迁移时AUROC约0.7-0.8，但迁移性不意味着共享表征：不同数据集训练的探针对同一目标语料产生不同排序，重叠率低于0.2，定性分析表明这些差异对应不同的修辞现象（话语级修辞立场 vs. 局部句法驱动的疑问行为）。
analysis.method: 使用线性探针（linear probes）分析两个社交媒体数据集上LLM的表示，比较修辞问句与信息寻求问句的可分性，并评估跨数据集迁移。
contributions: 发现修辞信号在早期层出现，并由最后token表示最稳定捕获。
证明修辞问句的跨数据集可检测性（AUROC 0.7-0.8），但揭示其由多条线性方向编码，而非单一共享方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅使用线性探针，可能无法捕捉非线性表征。
数据集仅限社交媒体，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法简单但发现有趣，揭示了LLM中修辞问句的多方向编码特性，对可解释性研究有参考价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 线性探针揭示LLM中修辞问句由多条线性方向编码，而非单一共享方向。

papers.title: HiVLA: A Visual-Grounded-Centric Hierarchical Embodied Manipulation System
papers.abstract: While end-to-end Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer a promising paradigm for robotic manipulation, fine-tuning them on narrow control data often compromises the profound reasoning capabilities inherited from their base Vision-Language Models (VLMs). To resolve this fundamental trade-off, we propose HiVLA, a visual-grounded-centric hierarchical framework that explicitly decouples high-level semantic planning from low-level motor control. In high-level part, a VLM planner first performs task decomposition and visual grounding to generate structured plans, comprising a subtask instruction and a precise target bounding box. Then, to translate this plan into physical actions, we introduce a flow-matching Diffusion Transformer (DiT) action expert in low-level part equipped with a novel cascaded cross-attention mechanism. This design sequentially fuses global context, high-resolution object-centric crops and skill semantics, enabling the DiT to focus purely on robust execution. Our decoupled architecture preserves the VLM's zero-shot reasoning while allowing independent improvement of both components. Extensive experiments in simulation and the real world demonstrate that HiVLA significantly outperforms state-of-the-art end-to-end baselines, particularly excelling in long-horizon skill composition and the fine-grained manipulation of small objects in cluttered scenes.

analysis.tldr: HiVLA通过解耦高层语义规划与低层运动控制，在机器人操作中保留VLM的推理能力并提升长程任务与小物体操作性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 端到端VLA模型在窄控制数据上微调会损害基础VLM的推理能力，需要一种能同时保留推理和提升操作性能的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何解耦高层语义规划与低层运动控制，以保留VLM的零样本推理能力并实现鲁棒的操作执行。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HiVLA分层框架：高层使用VLM规划器进行任务分解和视觉定位，生成子任务指令和目标边界框；低层使用流匹配扩散Transformer（DiT）动作专家，通过级联交叉注意力融合全局上下文、高分辨率物体中心裁剪和技能语义，将计划转化为物理动作。
contributions: 提出视觉锚定的分层操作框架HiVLA，显式解耦高层语义规划与低层运动控制。
引入流匹配DiT动作专家和级联交叉注意力机制，实现鲁棒的技能执行。
在仿真和真实世界实验中显著优于端到端基线，尤其在长程技能组合和小物体精细操作上表现突出。
analysis.experiments: 在仿真和真实世界中进行实验，与最先进的端到端基线比较，HiVLA显著更优。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的目标边界框标注。
分层架构可能增加系统复杂性和推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，实验充分，与机器人操作方向强相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HiVLA通过解耦高层语义规划与低层运动控制，在机器人操作中保留VLM的推理能力并提升长程任务与小物体操作性能。

papers.title: TREX: Automating LLM Fine-tuning via Agent-Driven Tree-based Exploration
papers.abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have empowered AI research agents to perform isolated scientific tasks, automating complex, real-world workflows, such as LLM training, remains a significant challenge. In this paper, we introduce TREX, a multi-agent system that automates the entire LLM training life-cycle. By orchestrating collaboration between two core modules-the Researcher and the Executor-the system seamlessly performs requirement analysis, open-domain literature and data research, formulation of training strategies, preparation of data recipes, and model training and evaluation. The multi-round experimental process is modeled as a search tree, enabling the system to efficiently plan exploration paths, reuse historical results, and distill high-level insights from iterative trials. To evaluate the capability of automated LLM training, we construct FT-Bench, a benchmark comprising 10 tasks derived from real-world scenarios, ranging from optimizing fundamental model capabilities to enhancing performance on domain-specific tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that the TREX agent consistently optimizes model performance on target tasks.

analysis.tldr: TREX 是一个多智能体系统，通过树状搜索自动完成 LLM 微调全流程，并在新基准 FT-Bench 上验证了有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 AI 研究智能体只能完成孤立科学任务，无法自动化 LLM 训练这类复杂工作流，亟需能自主规划、执行并迭代优化的系统。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个多智能体系统，使其能自动完成 LLM 微调全生命周期（需求分析、文献调研、策略制定、数据准备、训练与评估）并高效探索优化路径。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 TREX 多智能体系统，包含 Researcher 和 Executor 两个核心模块，将多轮实验过程建模为搜索树，支持路径规划、历史结果复用和迭代洞察提取。
contributions: 提出 TREX，首个自动化 LLM 训练全生命周期的多智能体系统，采用树状搜索建模实验过程。
构建 FT-Bench 基准，包含 10 个真实场景任务，用于评估自动化 LLM 微调能力。
analysis.experiments: 在 FT-Bench 的 10 个任务上评估，TREX 能持续优化目标任务的模型性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量初始策略和文献资源。
树搜索效率在任务空间极大时可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 自动化 LLM 微调方向新颖，系统设计有树搜索创新，且构建了专用基准，与 LLM Agent 方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TREX 是一个多智能体系统，通过树状搜索自动完成 LLM 微调全流程，并在新基准 FT-Bench 上验证了有效性。

papers.title: Enhancing LLM-based Search Agents via Contribution Weighted Group Relative Policy Optimization
papers.abstract: Search agents extend Large Language Models (LLMs) beyond static parametric knowledge by enabling access to up-to-date and long-tail information unavailable during pretraining. While reinforcement learning has been widely adopted for training such agents, existing approaches face key limitations: process supervision often suffers from unstable value estimation, whereas outcome supervision struggles with credit assignment due to sparse, trajectory-level rewards. To bridge this gap, we propose Contribution-Weighted GRPO (CW-GRPO), a framework that integrates process supervision into group relative policy optimization. Instead of directly optimizing process rewards, CW-GRPO employs an LLM judge to assess the retrieval utility and reasoning correctness at each search round, producing per-round contribution scores. These scores are used to rescale outcome-based advantages along the trajectory, enabling fine-grained credit assignment without sacrificing optimization stability. Experiments on multiple knowledge-intensive benchmarks show that CW-GRPO outperforms standard GRPO by 5.0% on Qwen3-8B and 6.3% on Qwen3-1.7B, leading to more effective search behaviors. Additional analysis reveals that successful trajectories exhibit concentrated contributions in specific rounds, providing empirical insight into search agent tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出贡献加权GRPO，通过LLM裁判评估每轮搜索贡献，实现细粒度信用分配，提升搜索Agent性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有强化学习方法在训练搜索Agent时面临过程监督价值估计不稳定和结果监督信用分配困难的问题，限制了搜索Agent的性能提升。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲优化稳定性的前提下，实现搜索Agent轨迹中细粒度的信用分配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 成功轨迹的贡献集中在特定轮次，表明搜索任务中信用分配具有稀疏性。
analysis.method: 提出贡献加权GRPO（CW-GRPO），使用LLM裁判评估每轮搜索的检索效用和推理正确性，生成每轮贡献分数，并用这些分数重新缩放基于结果的优势值，实现细粒度信用分配。
contributions: 提出CW-GRPO框架，将过程监督集成到组相对策略优化中，实现稳定且细粒度的信用分配。
在多个知识密集型基准上验证CW-GRPO优于标准GRPO，Qwen3-8B提升5.0%，Qwen3-1.7B提升6.3%。
通过分析揭示成功轨迹的贡献集中现象，为搜索Agent任务提供经验洞察。
analysis.experiments: 在多个知识密集型基准上评估，CW-GRPO在Qwen3-8B上比标准GRPO提升5.0%，在Qwen3-1.7B上提升6.3%。
limitations: 依赖LLM裁判的评估质量，可能引入额外偏差。
未在更大规模模型或更多样化任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，与LLM推理和Agent方向高度相关，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出贡献加权GRPO，通过LLM裁判评估每轮搜索贡献，实现细粒度信用分配，提升搜索Agent性能。

papers.title: AsymmetryZero: A Framework for Operationalizing Human Expert Preferences as Semantic Evals
papers.abstract: Much of the focus in RL today is on evaluation design: building meaningful evals that serve simultaneously as benchmarks and as well-defined reward signals for post-training. Yet, many real-world tasks are governed by subjective, procedural, and domain-specific requirements that are difficult to encode as exact-match targets or open-ended preference judgments frequently used in RL pipelines today. In this work, we present AsymmetryZero, a framework for operationalizing human expert preferences as semantic evals. AsymmetryZero represents each task as a stable evaluation contract that makes grading criteria explicit: what is being graded, how each criterion is judged, and how criterion-level decisions are aggregated into a task outcome. The same contract can be executed using Inspect for model-only evaluations, as well as the Harbor Framework for agentic evaluations, enabling comparable scores and shared audit artifacts across both settings. We argue that the central challenge in post-training today is the faithful encoding of expert requirements into the evaluation itself. To that end, we present a study using Harbor that holds task contracts fixed and compares a five-model frontier jury against a five-model compact jury across four frontier-class solvers (Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-5.4, Grok-4.20, Gemini-3.1-Pro). We find that criterion-level frontier-vs-compact agreement ranges from $75.9\%$ to $89.6\%$ (strict common-subset agreement: $77.8\%$ to $92.1\%$), while compact juries exhibit substantially higher internal dissent (3--2 split rate $28.7\%$--$32.4\%$) than frontier juries ($6.1\%$--$11.5\%$). Verifier traces further show that compact juries reduce per-criterion judging cost to roughly $4.2\%$--$5.6\%$ of frontier and latency to roughly $21.7\%$--$27.1\%$, even as aggregated task-level outcomes often remain comparatively stable.

analysis.tldr: 提出AsymmetryZero框架，将人类专家偏好转化为语义评估，通过评估合约实现可复现的评分，并比较前沿与紧凑陪审团的评估一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前RL评估设计难以编码主观、程序性和领域特定的专家需求，现有方法依赖精确匹配或开放偏好判断，无法忠实反映专家要求。
analysis.problem: 如何将人类专家偏好系统性地转化为可执行的语义评估，确保评估标准明确、可复现且跨设置可比。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 紧凑陪审团内部异议率（28.7%-32.4%）显著高于前沿陪审团（6.1%-11.5%），但任务级结果相对稳定；紧凑陪审团成本降至前沿的4.2%-5.6%，延迟降至21.7%-27.1%。
analysis.method: AsymmetryZero框架：将每个任务表示为稳定评估合约，明确评分标准、判断方式及聚合规则；支持Inspect（纯模型评估）和Harbor（智能体评估）两种执行方式。
contributions: 提出AsymmetryZero框架，实现人类专家偏好的语义化评估合约
通过实验揭示前沿与紧凑陪审团在准则级和任务级的一致性及成本差异
analysis.experiments: 使用Harbor框架，固定任务合约，比较五模型前沿陪审团与五模型紧凑陪审团在四个前沿求解器上的评估表现，报告准则级一致性和成本指标。
limitations: 实验仅涉及五个模型，泛化性有待验证
评估合约的设计可能依赖领域专家，自动化程度有限
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 框架设计新颖，实验数据详实，但应用范围较窄，适合关注RL评估方法的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AsymmetryZero框架，将人类专家偏好转化为语义评估，通过评估合约实现可复现的评分，并比较前沿与紧凑陪审团的评估一致性。

papers.title: UI-Zoomer: Uncertainty-Driven Adaptive Zoom-In for GUI Grounding
papers.abstract: GUI grounding, which localizes interface elements from screenshots given natural language queries, remains challenging for small icons and dense layouts. Test-time zoom-in methods improve localization by cropping and re-running inference at higher resolution, but apply cropping uniformly across all instances with fixed crop sizes, ignoring whether the model is actually uncertain on each case. We propose \textbf{UI-Zoomer}, a training-free adaptive zoom-in framework that treats both the trigger and scale of zoom-in as a prediction uncertainty quantification problem. A confidence-aware gate fuses spatial consensus among stochastic candidates with token-level generation confidence to selectively trigger zoom-in only when localization is uncertain. When triggered, an uncertainty-driven crop sizing module decomposes prediction variance into inter-sample positional spread and intra-sample box extent, deriving a per-instance crop radius via the law of total variance. Extensive experiments on ScreenSpot-Pro, UI-Vision, and ScreenSpot-v2 demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines across multiple model architectures, achieving gains of up to +13.4\%, +10.3\%, and +4.2\% respectively, with no additional training required.

analysis.tldr: 提出UI-Zoomer，一种无需训练的适应性缩放框架，通过不确定性量化动态触发和调整GUI接地中的缩放操作，显著提升小图标和密集布局的定位精度。
analysis.research_motivation: GUI接地任务中，小图标和密集布局的定位仍然困难；现有测试时缩放方法对所有实例统一裁剪，忽略了模型在不同情况下的不确定性差异。
analysis.problem: 如何根据模型对每个实例的预测不确定性，自适应地决定是否缩放以及缩放的程度，以提升GUI接地性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出UI-Zoomer框架，包含两个模块：1) 置信感知门控，融合随机候选的空间一致性和token级生成置信度，仅在定位不确定时触发缩放；2) 不确定性驱动的裁剪尺寸模块，利用总方差定律将预测方差分解为样本间位置扩散和样本内框范围，为每个实例计算自适应裁剪半径。
contributions: 首次将GUI接地中的缩放触发和缩放尺度视为不确定性量化问题，提出训练无关的自适应框架。
设计置信感知门控和不确定性驱动的裁剪尺寸模块，实现实例级别的自适应缩放。
在多个基准上取得显著提升，无需额外训练。
analysis.experiments: 在ScreenSpot-Pro、UI-Vision和ScreenSpot-v2三个基准上，相比强基线分别提升+13.4%、+10.3%和+4.2%，且适用于多种模型架构。
limitations: 可能对极端小目标或噪声较大的预测仍存在不确定性估计偏差。
框架依赖随机候选生成，可能增加推理时间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，无需训练且效果显著，与VLM/MLLM应用高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UI-Zoomer，一种无需训练的适应性缩放框架，通过不确定性量化动态触发和调整GUI接地中的缩放操作，显著提升小图标和密集布局的定位精度。

papers.title: Reinforcement Learning via Value Gradient Flow
papers.abstract: We study behavior-regularized reinforcement learning (RL), where regularization toward a reference distribution (the dataset in offline RL or the base model in LLM RL finetuning) is essential to prevent value over-optimization caused by erroneous out-of-distribution extrapolation. Existing methods either rely on reparameterized policy gradient, which are difficult to scale to large generative models, or on reject sampling, which can be overly conservative when attempting to move beyond the behavior support. In this paper, we propose Value Gradient Flow (VGF), a scalable new paradigm for behavior-regularized RL. VGF casts behavior-regularized RL as an optimal transport problem that maps the reference distribution to the value-induced optimal policy distribution. We solve this transport problem via discrete gradient flow, where value gradients guide particles initialized from the reference distribution. Our analysis shows that VGF imposes regularization implicitly by controlling the transport budget. VGF eliminates explicit policy parameterization while remaining expressive and flexible, this enables adaptive test-time scaling by adjusting the transport budget. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VGF significantly outperforms prior methods, achieving state-of-the-art results on offline RL benchmarks (D4RL, OGBench) and LLM RL tasks. Code and runs can be found at https://ryanxhr.github.io/vgf.

analysis.tldr: VGF将行为正则化RL转化为最优传输问题，通过离散梯度流实现隐式正则化，在离线RL和LLM RL任务上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 行为正则化RL中，现有方法（重参数化策略梯度、拒绝采样）难以扩展到大规模生成模型或过于保守，亟需一种可扩展且灵活的新范式。
analysis.problem: 如何高效实现行为正则化RL，避免值过优化，同时支持大规模模型和自适应测试时扩展。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将行为正则化RL建模为最优传输问题，通过离散梯度流从参考分布向值诱导的最优策略分布映射粒子，利用值梯度引导传输，隐式施加正则化。
contributions: 提出VGF，一种基于梯度流的行为正则化RL新范式，无需显式策略参数化。
理论分析证明VGF通过控制传输预算实现隐式正则化，支持自适应测试时扩展。
在离线RL和LLM RL任务上取得SOTA结果。
analysis.experiments: 在D4RL、OGBench离线RL基准和LLM RL任务上实验，VGF显著优于先前方法。
limitations: 可能对高维连续动作空间的计算成本较高。
传输预算的自动调整机制未在摘要中详细说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（最优传输+梯度流），实验充分（多个基准+SOTA），与LLM RL和离线RL强相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VGF将行为正则化RL转化为最优传输问题，通过离散梯度流实现隐式正则化，在离线RL和LLM RL任务上达到SOTA。

papers.title: UMI-3D: Extending Universal Manipulation Interface from Vision-Limited to 3D Spatial Perception
papers.abstract: We present UMI-3D, a multimodal extension of the Universal Manipulation Interface (UMI) for robust and scalable data collection in embodied manipulation. While UMI enables portable, wrist-mounted data acquisition, its reliance on monocular visual SLAM makes it vulnerable to occlusions, dynamic scenes, and tracking failures, limiting its applicability in real-world environments. UMI-3D addresses these limitations by introducing a lightweight and low-cost LiDAR sensor tightly integrated into the wrist-mounted interface, enabling LiDAR-centric SLAM with accurate metric-scale pose estimation under challenging conditions. We further develop a hardware-synchronized multimodal sensing pipeline and a unified spatiotemporal calibration framework that aligns visual observations with LiDAR point clouds, producing consistent 3D representations of demonstrations. Despite maintaining the original 2D visuomotor policy formulation, UMI-3D significantly improves the quality and reliability of collected data, which directly translates into enhanced policy performance. Extensive real-world experiments demonstrate that UMI-3D not only achieves high success rates on standard manipulation tasks, but also enables learning of tasks that are challenging or infeasible for the original vision-only UMI setup, including large deformable object manipulation and articulated object operation. The system supports an end-to-end pipeline for data acquisition, alignment, training, and deployment, while preserving the portability and accessibility of the original UMI. All hardware and software components are open-sourced to facilitate large-scale data collection and accelerate research in embodied intelligence: \href{https://umi-3d.github.io}{https://umi-3d.github.io}.

analysis.tldr: UMI-3D通过集成低成本LiDAR和SLAM，将通用操作接口从视觉受限扩展到3D空间感知，提升了数据采集的鲁棒性和策略性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有UMI依赖单目视觉SLAM，易受遮挡、动态场景和跟踪失败影响，限制了其在真实环境中的应用。
analysis.problem: 解决UMI在复杂环境下数据采集的鲁棒性和可靠性问题，并扩展其到需要3D空间感知的任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在腕载接口中集成轻量低成本LiDAR，实现以LiDAR为中心的SLAM，并开发硬件同步多模态感知流水线和统一时空标定框架，对齐视觉与点云数据。
contributions: 提出UMI-3D，通过集成LiDAR增强UMI的3D空间感知能力，提升数据采集鲁棒性。
开发硬件同步多模态感知和统一时空标定框架，生成一致的3D演示表示。
实验证明UMI-3D在标准操作任务上取得高成功率，并支持大变形物体和铰接物体操作等挑战性任务。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界中进行广泛实验，包括标准操作任务以及大变形物体和铰接物体操作任务，展示了高成功率和任务可行性。
limitations: 可能增加硬件成本和复杂度。
LiDAR在透明或高反射表面上的性能可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，开源，对机器人操作数据采集有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: UMI-3D通过集成低成本LiDAR和SLAM，将通用操作接口从视觉受限扩展到3D空间感知，提升了数据采集的鲁棒性和策略性能。

papers.title: TIP: Token Importance in On-Policy Distillation
papers.abstract: On-policy knowledge distillation (OPD) trains a student on its own rollouts under token-level supervision from a teacher. Not all token positions matter equally, but existing views of token importance are incomplete. We ask a direct question: which tokens carry the most useful learning signal in OPD? Our answer is that informative tokens come from two regions: positions with high student entropy, and positions with low student entropy plus high teacher--student divergence, where the student is overconfident and wrong. Empirically, student entropy is a strong first-order proxy: retaining $50\%$ of tokens with entropy-based sampling matches or exceeds all-token training while reducing peak memory by up to $47\%$. But entropy alone misses a second important region. When we isolate low-entropy, high-divergence tokens, training on fewer than $10\%$ of all tokens nearly matches full-token baselines, showing that overconfident tokens carry dense corrective signal despite being nearly invisible to entropy-only rules. We organize these findings with TIP (Token Importance in on-Policy distillation), a two-axis taxonomy over student entropy and teacher--student divergence, and give a theoretical explanation for why entropy is useful yet structurally incomplete. This view motivates type-aware token selection rules that combine uncertainty and disagreement. We validate this picture across three teacher--student pairs spanning Qwen3, Llama, and Qwen2.5 on MATH-500 and AIME 2024/2025, and on the DeepPlanning benchmark for long-horizon agentic planning, where Q3-only training on $<$$20\%$ of tokens surpasses full-token OPD. Our experiments are implemented by extending the OPD repository https://github.com/HJSang/OPSD_OnPolicyDistillation, which supports memory-efficient distillation of larger models under limited GPU budgets.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于学生熵和师生分歧的双轴令牌重要性分类法TIP，在策略蒸馏中仅用部分令牌即可匹配或超越全令牌训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 在策略知识蒸馏中，并非所有令牌位置同等重要，但现有令牌重要性观点不完整，导致计算资源浪费。
analysis.problem: 如何识别在策略蒸馏中对学生学习最有用的令牌，以提升训练效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 学生熵是强一阶代理，但熵单独会遗漏低熵高分歧区域，该区域令牌虽少但携带密集纠正信号。
analysis.method: 提出TIP分类法，基于学生熵和师生分歧将令牌分为两类，并设计类型感知的令牌选择规则。
contributions: 提出双轴令牌重要性分类法TIP，揭示熵和分歧互补的重要性区域。
实验证明基于熵采样保留50%令牌可匹配全令牌训练，且低熵高分歧令牌训练少于10%即接近基线。
analysis.experiments: 在MATH-500、AIME 2024/2025和DeepPlanning基准上，使用Qwen3、Llama、Qwen2.5三种师生对验证，Q3-only训练少于20%令牌超越全令牌OPD。
limitations: 分类法依赖师生对，可能不适用于单模型场景。
理论解释仅提供直觉，缺乏严格证明。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，对蒸馏效率有显著提升，但理论深度一般。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于学生熵和师生分歧的双轴令牌重要性分类法TIP，在策略蒸馏中仅用部分令牌即可匹配或超越全令牌训练。

papers.title: A deep learning framework for glomeruli segmentation with boundary attention
papers.abstract: Accurate detection and segmentation of glomeruli in kidney tissue are essential for diagnostic applications. Traditional deep learning methods primarily rely on semantic segmentation, which often fails to precisely delineate adjacent glomeruli. To address this challenge, we propose a novel glomerulus detection and segmentation model that emphasises boundary separation. Leveraging pathology foundation models, the proposed U-Net-based architecture incorporates a specialised attention decoder designed to highlight critical regions and improve instancelevel segmentation. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that our approach surpasses state-of-the-art methods in both Dice score and Intersection over Union, indicating superior performance in glomerular delineation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种带边界注意力的U-Net架构，利用病理基础模型提升肾小球分割精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 肾小球准确分割对肾脏疾病诊断至关重要，但传统语义分割方法难以精确分离相邻肾小球。
analysis.problem: 解决相邻肾小球边界模糊导致的实例级分割不精确问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统语义分割在相邻肾小球边界处表现不佳，难以区分紧密相邻的实例。
analysis.method: 基于U-Net架构，集成病理基础模型和边界注意力解码器，突出关键区域并改进实例分割。
contributions: 提出一种结合边界注意力的肾小球分割框架，有效提升相邻肾小球的分割精度。
在Dice和IoU指标上超越现有最先进方法。
analysis.experiments: 在肾小球数据集上评估，Dice和IoU指标优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定病理基础模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
未提及计算效率或实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新适中，实验指标提升，但未提供具体数值和更多细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种带边界注意力的U-Net架构，利用病理基础模型提升肾小球分割精度。

papers.title: Training-Free Semantic Multi-Object Tracking with Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Semantic Multi-Object Tracking (SMOT) extends multi-object tracking with semantic outputs such as video summaries, instance-level captions, and interaction labels, aiming to move from trajectories to human-interpretable descriptions of dynamic scenes. Existing SMOT systems are trained end-to-end, coupling progress to expensive supervision, limiting the ability to rapidly adapt to new foundation models and new interactions. We propose TF-SMOT, a training-free SMOT pipeline that composes pretrained components for detection, mask-based tracking, and video-language generation. TF-SMOT combines D-FINE and the promptable SAM2 segmentation tracker to produce temporally consistent tracklets, uses contour grounding to generate video summaries and instance captions with InternVideo2.5, and aligns extracted interaction predicates to BenSMOT WordNet synsets via gloss-based semantic retrieval with LLM disambiguation. On BenSMOT, TF-SMOT achieves state-of-the-art tracking performance within the SMOT setting and improves summary and caption quality compared to prior art. Interaction recognition, however, remains challenging under strict exact-match evaluation on the fine-grained and long-tailed WordNet label space; our analysis and ablations indicate that semantic overlap and label granularity substantially affect measured performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的语义多目标跟踪方法，利用预训练视觉-语言模型实现轨迹、摘要和交互识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有SMOT系统依赖端到端训练，难以快速适应新模型和新交互，且监督成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不训练的情况下，利用预训练组件实现语义多目标跟踪，包括视频摘要、实例描述和交互识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在严格精确匹配评估下，交互识别在细粒度、长尾的WordNet标签空间中仍具挑战，语义重叠和标签粒度显著影响性能。
analysis.method: 组合D-FINE检测器、SAM2分割跟踪器、InternVideo2.5视频-语言模型和基于语义检索的交互对齐，无需训练。
contributions: 提出首个无需训练的SMOT流水线TF-SMOT，灵活组合预训练组件。
在BenSMOT上取得SMOT设置下的SOTA跟踪性能，并提升摘要和描述质量。
analysis.experiments: 在BenSMOT数据集上评估，跟踪性能达到SOTA，摘要和描述质量优于先前方法；交互识别在严格评估下仍有挑战。
limitations: 交互识别在细粒度、长尾标签上性能有限。
依赖预训练组件质量，可能受组件偏差影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且无需训练，但交互识别仍有局限，适合关注VLM应用的研究者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的语义多目标跟踪方法，利用预训练视觉-语言模型实现轨迹、摘要和交互识别。

papers.title: Towards Unconstrained Human-Object Interaction
papers.abstract: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection is a longstanding computer vision problem concerned with predicting the interaction between humans and objects. Current HOI models rely on a vocabulary of interactions at training and inference time, limiting their applicability to static environments. With the advent of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), it has become feasible to explore more flexible paradigms for interaction recognition. In this work, we revisit HOI detection through the lens of MLLMs and apply them to in-the-wild HOI detection. We define the Unconstrained HOI (U-HOI) task, a novel HOI domain that removes the requirement for a predefined list of interactions at both training and inference. We evaluate a range of MLLMs on this setting and introduce a pipeline that includes test-time inference and language-to-graph conversion to extract structured interactions from free-form text. Our findings highlight the limitations of current HOI detectors and the value of MLLMs for U-HOI. Code will be available at https://github.com/francescotonini/anyhoi

analysis.tldr: 利用多模态大语言模型实现无约束的人-物交互检测，无需预定义交互类别。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统HOI检测依赖固定交互词汇表，无法适应开放环境，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何移除HOI检测中对预定义交互列表的依赖，实现无约束的交互识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有HOI检测器在无约束场景下表现有限，而MLLMs能生成自由文本描述，但需转换为结构化交互。
analysis.method: 定义U-HOI任务，使用MLLMs进行测试时推理，并通过语言到图转换提取结构化交互。
contributions: 提出无约束人-物交互（U-HOI）任务，移除预定义交互列表要求。
评估多种MLLMs在U-HOI上的表现，并设计包含语言到图转换的流水线。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: MLLMs可能产生幻觉或非结构化输出。
语言到图转换的准确性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 任务定义新颖，结合MLLM解决传统HOI局限，但实验细节缺失，技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用多模态大语言模型实现无约束的人-物交互检测，无需预定义交互类别。

papers.title: GUI-Perturbed: Domain Randomization Reveals Systematic Brittleness in GUI Grounding Models
papers.abstract: GUI grounding models report over 85% accuracy on standard benchmarks, yet drop 27-56 percentage points when instructions require spatial reasoning rather than direct element naming. Current benchmarks miss this because they evaluate each screenshot once with a single fixed instruction. We introduce GUI-Perturbed, a controlled perturbation framework that independently varies visual scenes and instructions to measure grounding robustness. Evaluating three 7B models from the same architecture lineage, we find that relational instructions cause systematic accuracy collapse across all models, a 70% browser zoom produces statistically significant degradation, and rank-8 LoRA fine-tuning with augmented data degrades performance rather than improving it. By perturbing along independent axes, GUI-Perturbed isolates which specific capability axes are affected-spatial reasoning, visual robustness, reasoning calibration-providing diagnostic signal that aggregate benchmarks cannot. We release the dataset, augmentation pipeline, and a fine-tuned model.

analysis.tldr: GUI grounding模型在标准基准上准确率超85%，但面对空间推理指令时准确率骤降27-56个百分点，本文提出GUI-Perturbed扰动框架系统评估其鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前GUI grounding模型在标准基准上表现优异，但实际应用中可能因指令类型或视觉变化而失效，现有基准无法检测此类系统性脆弱性。
analysis.problem: GUI grounding模型在空间推理指令和视觉扰动下的鲁棒性不足，且缺乏系统性的评估方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 关系型指令导致所有模型准确率系统性崩溃；70%浏览器缩放引起统计显著的性能下降；使用增强数据的rank-8 LoRA微调反而降低性能。
analysis.method: 提出GUI-Perturbed框架，通过独立变化视觉场景和指令来测量grounding鲁棒性，沿独立轴扰动以隔离特定能力轴（空间推理、视觉鲁棒性、推理校准）。
contributions: 提出GUI-Perturbed扰动框架，系统评估GUI grounding模型的鲁棒性。
发现关系型指令导致准确率系统性下降，以及缩放扰动和LoRA微调的负面效应。
发布数据集、增强管道和微调模型。
analysis.experiments: 在三个7B模型上评估，发现关系型指令导致准确率下降27-56个百分点，70%浏览器缩放引起显著退化，rank-8 LoRA微调降低性能。
limitations: 仅评估了同一架构系列的7B模型，未涵盖更大或不同架构的模型。
扰动类型有限，可能未覆盖所有实际场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，揭示了重要脆弱性，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GUI grounding模型在标准基准上准确率超85%，但面对空间推理指令时准确率骤降27-56个百分点，本文提出GUI-Perturbed扰动框架系统评估其鲁棒性。

papers.title: OneHOI: Unifying Human-Object Interaction Generation and Editing
papers.abstract: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) modelling captures how humans act upon and relate to objects, typically expressed as <person, action, object> triplets. Existing approaches split into two disjoint families: HOI generation synthesises scenes from structured triplets and layout, but fails to integrate mixed conditions like HOI and object-only entities; and HOI editing modifies interactions via text, yet struggles to decouple pose from physical contact and scale to multiple interactions. We introduce OneHOI, a unified diffusion transformer framework that consolidates HOI generation and editing into a single conditional denoising process driven by shared structured interaction representations. At its core, the Relational Diffusion Transformer (R-DiT) models verb-mediated relations through role- and instance-aware HOI tokens, layout-based spatial Action Grounding, a Structured HOI Attention to enforce interaction topology, and HOI RoPE to disentangle multi-HOI scenes. Trained jointly with modality dropout on our HOI-Edit-44K, along with HOI and object-centric datasets, OneHOI supports layout-guided, layout-free, arbitrary-mask, and mixed-condition control, achieving state-of-the-art results across both HOI generation and editing. Code is available at https://jiuntian.github.io/OneHOI/.

analysis.tldr: OneHOI 是一个统一的人-物交互生成与编辑框架，通过共享的结构化交互表示和关系扩散 Transformer 实现多种条件控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 HOI 生成和编辑方法相互独立，生成方法无法处理混合条件（如同时包含 HOI 和仅物体实体），编辑方法难以解耦姿态与物理接触且难以扩展到多交互场景，缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何将 HOI 生成和编辑统一到一个框架中，支持多种条件控制（布局引导、无布局、任意掩码、混合条件）并实现高质量交互建模。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 OneHOI，基于关系扩散 Transformer (R-DiT)，通过角色和实例感知的 HOI token、布局空间动作定位、结构化 HOI 注意力机制和 HOI RoPE 来建模动词介导的关系，联合训练 HOI-Edit-44K 和 HOI/物体中心数据集。
contributions: 首次统一 HOI 生成和编辑到一个条件去噪框架中，支持多种控制模式。
提出 R-DiT 架构，通过结构化 HOI 注意力和 HOI RoPE 有效建模多交互场景。
构建 HOI-Edit-44K 数据集并联合训练，实现 SOTA 性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及达到 SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模数据集和计算资源。
复杂多交互场景下的泛化能力有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 统一生成与编辑框架具有创新性，技术细节丰富，但摘要未提供实验细节，评分保守。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OneHOI 是一个统一的人-物交互生成与编辑框架，通过共享的结构化交互表示和关系扩散 Transformer 实现多种条件控制。

papers.title: ReviewGrounder: Improving Review Substantiveness with Rubric-Guided, Tool-Integrated Agents
papers.abstract: The rapid rise in AI conference submissions has driven increasing exploration of large language models (LLMs) for peer review support. However, LLM-based reviewers often generate superficial, formulaic comments lacking substantive, evidence-grounded feedback. We attribute this to the underutilization of two key components of human reviewing: explicit rubrics and contextual grounding in existing work. To address this, we introduce REVIEWBENCH, a benchmark evaluating review text according to paper-specific rubrics derived from official guidelines, the paper's content, and human-written reviews. We further propose REVIEWGROUNDER, a rubric-guided, tool-integrated multi-agent framework that decomposes reviewing into drafting and grounding stages, enriching shallow drafts via targeted evidence consolidation. Experiments on REVIEWBENCH show that REVIEWGROUNDER, using a Phi-4-14B-based drafter and a GPT-OSS-120B-based grounding stage, consistently outperforms baselines with substantially stronger/larger backbones (e.g., GPT-4.1 and DeepSeek-R1-670B) in both alignment with human judgments and rubric-based review quality across 8 dimensions. The code is available \href{https://github.com/EigenTom/ReviewGrounder}{here}.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于评分标准的多智能体框架ReviewGrounder，通过分解审稿为草稿和证据整合阶段，显著提升AI审稿的实质性和质量。
analysis.research_motivation: AI会议投稿激增，LLM辅助审稿虽被广泛探索，但生成的评论往往肤浅、公式化，缺乏基于证据的实质性反馈，原因是未充分利用人类审稿中的两个关键要素：明确的评分标准和与现有工作的上下文关联。
analysis.problem: 如何使LLM生成的审稿意见更具实质性，即包含基于证据的、与论文特定评分标准对齐的反馈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM审稿人常生成肤浅、公式化的评论，缺乏实质性、基于证据的反馈，归因于未充分利用人类审稿中的评分标准和上下文关联。
analysis.method: 提出ReviewGrounder，一个基于评分标准、集成工具的多智能体框架，将审稿分解为草稿阶段和证据整合阶段，通过目标证据整合丰富浅层草稿。
contributions: 提出REVIEWBENCH基准，根据官方指南、论文内容和人类审稿生成的论文特定评分标准评估审稿文本。
提出REVIEWGROUNDER框架，通过分解审稿为草稿和证据整合阶段，利用工具集成提升审稿实质性。
实验表明REVIEWGROUNDER在8个维度上一致优于使用更强骨干网络的基线，与人类判断对齐更好。
analysis.experiments: 在REVIEWBENCH基准上，使用Phi-4-14B草稿器和GPT-OSS-120B证据整合阶段，与GPT-4.1和DeepSeek-R1-670B等更强骨干网络基线比较，在8个维度上均表现更优。
limitations: 框架依赖外部工具和模型，可能引入额外计算开销。
基准REVIEWBENCH的评分标准生成可能受限于人类审稿质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与LLM对齐和审稿应用高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于评分标准的多智能体框架ReviewGrounder，通过分解审稿为草稿和证据整合阶段，显著提升AI审稿的实质性和质量。

papers.title: Seeing the imagined: a latent functional alignment in visual imagery decoding from fMRI data
papers.abstract: Recent progress in visual brain decoding from fMRI has been enabled by large-scale datasets such as the Natural Scenes Dataset (NSD) and powerful diffusion-based generative models. While current pipelines are primarily optimized for perception, their performance under mental-imagery remains less well understood. In this work, we study how a state-of-the-art (SOTA) perception decoder (DynaDiff) can be adapted to reconstruct imagined content from the Imagery-NSD benchmark. We propose a latent functional alignment approach that maps imagery-evoked activity into the pretrained model's conditioning space, while keeping the remaining components frozen. To mitigate the limited amount of matched imagery-perception supervision, we further introduce a retrieval-based augmentation strategy that selects semantically related NSD perception trials. Across four subjects, latent functional alignment consistently improves high-level semantic reconstruction metrics relative to the frozen pretrained baseline and a voxel-space ridge alignment baseline, and enables above-chance decoding from multiple cortical regions. These results suggest that semantic structure learned from perception can be leveraged to stabilize and improve visual imagery decoding under out-of-distribution conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出潜在功能对齐方法，利用感知数据提升fMRI视觉想象解码性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有fMRI视觉解码方法主要针对感知任务优化，在心理想象场景下性能不佳，而想象数据标注稀缺，限制了模型泛化。
analysis.problem: 如何利用有限的想象-感知配对数据，将感知解码器有效迁移到视觉想象内容重建任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出潜在功能对齐方法，将想象诱发的脑活动映射到预训练感知解码器的条件空间，并引入基于检索的增强策略，从NSD感知数据中选取语义相关的试次来弥补配对数据不足。
contributions: 提出一种潜在功能对齐方法，实现感知解码器到视觉想象任务的零样本迁移。
引入检索增强策略，缓解想象-感知配对数据稀缺问题。
在Imagery-NSD基准上验证方法有效性，显著提升高层语义重建指标。
analysis.experiments: 在Imagery-NSD基准上对四名受试者进行实验，与冻结预训练基线和体素空间岭对齐基线比较，结果显示潜在功能对齐一致提升了高层语义重建指标，并实现了多个皮层区域的超随机解码。
limitations: 依赖预训练感知解码器，可能受限于其感知域覆盖。
检索增强策略的语义相关性度量可能不够精确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对想象解码这一难点，实验验证有效，但技术细节和泛化性有待进一步评估。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出潜在功能对齐方法，利用感知数据提升fMRI视觉想象解码性能。

papers.title: Free Geometry: Refining 3D Reconstruction from Longer Versions of Itself
papers.abstract: Feed-forward 3D reconstruction models are efficient but rigid: once trained, they perform inference in a zero-shot manner and cannot adapt to the test scene. As a result, visually plausible reconstructions often contain errors, particularly under occlusions, specularities, and ambiguous cues. To address this, we introduce Free Geometry, a framework that enables feed-forward 3D reconstruction models to self-evolve at test time without any 3D ground truth. Our key insight is that, when the model receives more views, it produces more reliable and view-consistent reconstructions. Leveraging this property, given a testing sequence, we mask a subset of frames to construct a self-supervised task. Free Geometry enforces cross-view feature consistency between representations from full and partial observations, while maintaining the pairwise relations implied by the held-out frames. This self-supervision allows for fast recalibration via lightweight LoRA updates, taking less than 2 minutes per dataset on a single GPU. Our approach consistently improves state-of-the-art foundation models, including Depth Anything 3 and VGGT, across 4 benchmark datasets, yielding an average improvement of 3.73% in camera pose accuracy and 2.88% in point map prediction. Code is available at https://github.com/hiteacherIamhumble/Free-Geometry .

analysis.tldr: 提出 Free Geometry 框架，利用更多视图产生更可靠重建的特性，通过自监督任务在测试时微调前馈 3D 重建模型，无需 3D 真值。
analysis.research_motivation: 前馈 3D 重建模型高效但僵化，零样本推理无法适应测试场景，导致在遮挡、高光等情况下出现错误。
analysis.problem: 如何让前馈 3D 重建模型在测试时无需 3D 真值即可自我改进，提升重建质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当模型接收更多视图时，其重建结果更可靠且视图一致。
analysis.method: 对测试序列进行帧掩码构造自监督任务，强制全观测与部分观测表示之间的跨视图特征一致性，并保持被掩码帧隐含的成对关系，通过轻量 LoRA 更新快速重校准。
contributions: 提出 Free Geometry 框架，使前馈 3D 重建模型能在测试时自演化，无需 3D 真值。
在多个基准数据集上一致提升 Depth Anything 3 和 VGGT 等基础模型，平均相机位姿精度提升 3.73%，点图预测提升 2.88%。
analysis.experiments: 在 4 个基准数据集上评估，平均相机位姿精度提升 3.73%，点图预测提升 2.88%，每数据集微调时间少于 2 分钟（单 GPU）。
limitations: 可能依赖初始前馈模型的质量，若基础模型较差则提升有限。
自监督任务设计可能不适用于极端稀疏视图场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，实验充分，对 3D 重建领域有显著提升，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Free Geometry 框架，利用更多视图产生更可靠重建的特性，通过自监督任务在测试时微调前馈 3D 重建模型，无需 3D 真值。

papers.title: Decoding the Delta: Unifying Remote Sensing Change Detection and Understanding with Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel in general vision-language tasks, their application to remote sensing change understanding is hindered by a fundamental "temporal blindness". Existing architectures lack intrinsic mechanisms for multi-temporal contrastive reasoning and struggle with precise spatial grounding. To address this, we first introduce Delta-QA, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 180k visual question-answering samples. Delta-QA unifies pixel-level segmentation and visual question answering across bi- and tri-temporal scenarios, structuring change interpretation into four progressive cognitive dimensions. Methodologically, we propose Delta-LLaVA, a novel MLLM framework explicitly tailored for multi-temporal remote sensing interpretation. It overcomes the limitations of naive feature concatenation through three core innovations: a Change-Enhanced Attention module that systematically isolates and amplifies visual differences, a Change-SEG module utilizing Change Prior Embedding to extract differentiable difference features as input for the LLM, and Local Causal Attention to prevent cross-temporal contextual leakage. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Delta-LLaVA decisively outperforms leading generalist MLLMs and specialized segmentation models in complex change deduction and high-precision boundary localization, establishing a unified framework for earth observation intelligence.

analysis.tldr: 提出Delta-LLaVA框架，通过变化增强注意力、变化先验嵌入和局部因果注意力，统一遥感变化检测与理解。

papers.title: Seek-and-Solve: Benchmarking MLLMs for Visual Clue-Driven Reasoning in Daily Scenarios
papers.abstract: Daily scenarios are characterized by visual richness, requiring Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to filter noise and identify decisive visual clues for accurate reasoning. Yet, current benchmarks predominantly aim at evaluating MLLMs' pre-existing knowledge or perceptual understanding, often neglecting the critical capability of reasoning. To bridge this gap, we introduce DailyClue, a benchmark designed for visual clue-driven reasoning in daily scenarios. Our construction is guided by two core principles: (1) strict grounding in authentic daily activities, and (2) challenging query design that necessitates more than surface-level perception. Instead of simple recognition, our questions compel MLLMs to actively explore suitable visual clues and leverage them for subsequent reasoning. To this end, we curate a comprehensive dataset spanning four major daily domains and 16 distinct subtasks. Comprehensive evaluation across MLLMs and agentic models underscores the formidable challenge posed by our benchmark. Our analysis reveals several critical insights, emphasizing that the accurate identification of visual clues is essential for robust reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出DailyClue基准，评估多模态大模型在日常场景中基于视觉线索的推理能力。
