papers.title: On-Orbit Space AI: Federated, Multi-Agent, and Collaborative Algorithms for Satellite Constellations
papers.abstract: Satellite constellations are transforming space systems from isolated spacecraft into networked, software-defined platforms capable of on-orbit perception, decision making, and adaptation. Yet much of the existing AI studies remains centered on single-satellite inference, while constellation-scale autonomy introduces fundamentally new algorithmic requirements: learning and coordination under dynamic inter-satellite connectivity, strict SWaP-C limits, radiation-induced faults, non-IID data, concept drift, and safety-critical operational constraints. This survey consolidates the emerging field of on-orbit space AI through three complementary paradigms: (i) {federated learning} for cross-satellite training, personalization, and secure aggregation; (ii) {multi-agent algorithms} for cooperative planning, resource allocation, scheduling, formation control, and collision avoidance; and (iii) {collaborative sensing and distributed inference} for multi-satellite fusion, tracking, split/early-exit inference, and cross-layer co-design with constellation networking. We provide a system-level view and a taxonomy that unifies collaboration architectures, temporal mechanisms, and trust models. To support community development and keep this review actionable over time, we continuously curate relevant papers and resources at https://github.com/ziyangwang007/AI4Space.

analysis.tldr: 综述卫星星座中联邦学习、多智能体算法与协同感知的星上AI范式。

papers.title: First-See-Then-Design: A Multi-Stakeholder View for Optimal Performance-Fairness Trade-Offs
papers.abstract: Fairness in algorithmic decision-making is often defined in the predictive space, where predictive performance - used as a proxy for decision-maker (DM) utility - is traded off against prediction-based fairness notions, such as demographic parity or equality of opportunity. This perspective, however, ignores how predictions translate into decisions and ultimately into utilities and welfare for both DM and decision subjects (DS), as well as their allocation across social-salient groups. In this paper, we propose a multi-stakeholder framework for fair algorithmic decision-making grounded in welfare economics and distributive justice, explicitly modeling the utilities of both the DM and DS, and defining fairness via a social planner's utility that captures inequalities in DS utilities across groups under different justice-based fairness notions (e.g., Egalitarian, Rawlsian). We formulate fair decision-making as a post-hoc multi-objective optimization problem, characterizing the achievable performance-fairness trade-offs in the two-dimensional utility space of DM utility and the social planner's utility, under different decision policy classes (deterministic vs. stochastic, shared vs. group-specific). Using the proposed framework, we then identify conditions (in terms of the stakeholders' utilities) under which stochastic policies are more optimal than deterministic ones, and empirically demonstrate that simple stochastic policies can yield superior performance-fairness trade-offs by leveraging outcome uncertainty. Overall, we advocate a shift from prediction-centric fairness to a transparent, justice-based, multi-stakeholder approach that supports the collaborative design of decision-making policies.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个多利益相关者框架，将算法公平性从预测空间扩展到决策效用空间，并证明随机策略能实现更优的性能-公平权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有公平性定义局限于预测空间，忽略了预测如何转化为决策、效用和福利，以及这些在不同社会群体间的分配，导致公平性优化与实际决策目标脱节。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个多利益相关者的公平决策框架，显式建模决策者和决策对象的效用，并基于社会福利理论定义公平性，从而优化性能-公平权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在特定条件下，随机策略比确定性策略更优，且简单的随机策略通过利用结果不确定性可以产生更好的性能-公平权衡。
analysis.method: 提出一个基于福利经济学和分配正义的多利益相关者框架，将公平决策形式化为事后多目标优化问题，在决策者效用和社会规划者效用的二维空间中刻画可达的性能-公平权衡，并分析不同决策策略类（确定性/随机、共享/群体特定）下的最优性条件。
contributions: 提出了一个多利益相关者的公平决策框架，显式建模决策者和决策对象的效用，并基于不同正义观（如平等主义、罗尔斯主义）定义公平性。
将公平决策形式化为事后多目标优化问题，并刻画了不同策略类下的性能-公平权衡边界。
识别了随机策略优于确定性策略的条件，并通过实验证明简单随机策略能实现更优的权衡。

papers.title: Large Language Models to Enhance Business Process Modeling: Past, Present, and Future Trends
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Generative Artificial Intelligence, particularly Large Language Models (LLMs), have stimulated growing interest in automating or assisting Business Process Modeling tasks using natural language. Several approaches have been proposed to transform textual process descriptions into BPMN and related workflow models. However, the extent to which these approaches effectively support complex process modeling in organizational settings remains unclear. This article presents a literature review of AI-driven methods for transforming natural language into BPMN process models, with a particular focus on the role of LLMs. Following a structured review strategy, relevant studies were identified and analyzed to classify existing approaches, examine how LLMs are integrated into text-to-model pipelines, and investigate the evaluation practices used to assess generated models. The analysis reveals a clear shift from rule-based and traditional NLP pipelines toward LLM-based architectures that rely on prompt engineering, intermediate representations, and iterative refinement mechanisms. While these approaches significantly expand the capabilities of automated process model generation, the literature also exposes persistent challenges related to semantic correctness, evaluation fragmentation, reproducibility, and limited validation in real-world organizational contexts. Based on these findings, this review identifies key research gaps and discusses promising directions for future research, including the integration of contextual knowledge through Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), its integration with LLMs, the development of interactive modeling architectures, and the need for more comprehensive and standardized evaluation frameworks.

analysis.tldr: 综述LLM在业务流程建模中的应用，从规则方法转向LLM架构，指出语义正确性、评估碎片化等挑战。

papers.title: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning with Runtime Safety Shielding for Power Grid Operation
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning has shown promise for automating power-grid operation tasks such as topology control and congestion management. However, its deployment in real-world power systems remains limited by strict safety requirements, brittleness under rare disturbances, and poor generalization to unseen grid topologies. In safety-critical infrastructure, catastrophic failures cannot be tolerated, and learning-based controllers must operate within hard physical constraints. This paper proposes a safety-constrained hierarchical control framework for power-grid operation that explicitly decouples long-horizon decision-making from real-time feasibility enforcement. A high-level reinforcement learning policy proposes abstract control actions, while a deterministic runtime safety shield filters unsafe actions using fast forward simulation. Safety is enforced as a runtime invariant, independent of policy quality or training distribution. The proposed framework is evaluated on the Grid2Op benchmark suite under nominal conditions, forced line-outage stress tests, and zero-shot deployment on the ICAPS 2021 large-scale transmission grid without retraining. Results show that flat reinforcement learning policies are brittle under stress, while safety-only methods are overly conservative. In contrast, the proposed hierarchical and safety-aware approach achieves longer episode survival, lower peak line loading, and robust zero-shot generalization to unseen grids. These results indicate that safety and generalization in power-grid control are best achieved through architectural design rather than increasingly complex reward engineering, providing a practical path toward deployable learning-based controllers for real-world energy systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层强化学习框架，通过运行时安全屏蔽解耦长期决策与实时可行性，在电力系统控制中实现安全、鲁棒和零样本泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习在电力系统控制中面临严格安全约束、罕见扰动下的脆弱性以及对未见拓扑泛化差的问题，现有方法无法同时满足安全与性能要求。
analysis.problem: 如何在电力系统控制中实现安全、鲁棒且泛化的强化学习，避免灾难性故障并适应未见过的电网拓扑。

在Grid2Op基准上验证，实现更长生存时间、更低峰值线路负载和鲁棒的零样本泛化。

limitations: 可能依赖快速前向模拟的准确性，复杂电网下模拟成本可能较高。

papers.title: POINTS-Seeker: Towards Training a Multimodal Agentic Search Model from Scratch
papers.abstract: While Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) demonstrate impressive visual perception, they remain epistemically constrained by their static parametric knowledge. To transcend these boundaries, multimodal search models have been adopted to actively interact with the external environment for evidence retrieval. Diverging from prevailing paradigms that merely retrofit general LMMs with search tools as modular extensions, we explore the potential of building a multimodal agentic search model from scratch. Specifically, we make the following contributions: (i) we introduce Agentic Seeding, a dedicated phase designed to weave the foundational precursors necessary for eliciting agentic behaviors; (ii) we uncover a performance bottleneck in long-horizon interactions, where the increasing volume of interaction history overwhelms the model's ability to locate ground-truth evidence. To mitigate this, we propose V-Fold, an adaptive history-aware compression scheme that preserves recent dialogue turns in high fidelity while folding historical context into the visual space via rendering; and (iii) we develop POINTS-Seeker-8B, a state-of-the-art multimodal agentic search model that consistently outperforms existing models across six diverse benchmarks, effectively resolving the challenges of long-horizon, knowledge-intensive visual reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出从零训练多模态智能搜索模型POINTS-Seeker，通过Agentic Seeding和V-Fold历史压缩解决长程交互瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LMM受限于静态参数知识，需与外部环境交互获取证据；但当前方法仅将搜索工具作为模块附加到通用LMM上，未从底层构建智能搜索能力。
analysis.problem: 如何从零训练一个多模态智能搜索模型，使其能主动与环境交互并有效处理长程交互历史中的证据定位问题。

contributions: 提出Agentic Seeding阶段，为模型注入智能行为基础

limitations: 可能依赖特定渲染方式，泛化性待验证

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出从零训练多模态智能搜索模型POINTS-Seeker，通过Agentic Seeding和V-Fold历史压缩解决长程交互瓶颈。

papers.title: InfoChess: A Game of Adversarial Inference and a Laboratory for Quantifiable Information Control
papers.abstract: We propose InfoChess, a symmetric adversarial game that elevates competitive information acquisition to the primary objective. There is no piece capture, removing material incentives that would otherwise confound the role of information. Instead, pieces are used to alter visibility. Players are scored on their probabilistic inference of the opponent's king location over the duration of the game. To explore the space of strategies for playing InfoChess, we introduce a hierarchy of heuristic agents defined by increasing levels of opponent modeling, and train a reinforcement learning agent that outperforms these baselines. Leveraging the discrete structure of the game, we analyze gameplay through natural information-theoretic characterizations that include belief entropy, oracle cross entropy, and predictive log score under the action-induced observation channel. These measures disentangle epistemic uncertainty, calibration mismatch, and uncertainty induced by adversarial movement. The design of InfoChess renders it a testbed for studying multi-agent inference under partial observability. We release code for the environment and agents, and a public interface to encourage further study.

analysis.tldr: InfoChess 是一个以信息获取为主要目标的对称对抗游戏，用于研究多智能体部分可观测推理。

analysis.problem: 设计一个纯净的信息博弈环境，使玩家通过行动改变可见性并推断对手隐藏状态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 InfoChess 游戏规则，构建层次化启发式智能体（逐步增强对手建模），并训练强化学习智能体超越基线。

papers.title: Feed-Forward 3D Scene Modeling: A Problem-Driven Perspective
papers.abstract: Reconstructing 3D representations from 2D inputs is a fundamental task in computer vision and graphics, serving as a cornerstone for understanding and interacting with the physical world. While traditional methods achieve high fidelity, they are limited by slow per-scene optimization or category-specific training, which hinders their practical deployment and scalability. Hence, generalizable feed-forward 3D reconstruction has witnessed rapid development in recent years. By learning a model that maps images directly to 3D representations in a single forward pass, these methods enable efficient reconstruction and robust cross-scene generalization. Our survey is motivated by a critical observation: despite the diverse geometric output representations, ranging from implicit fields to explicit primitives, existing feed-forward approaches share similar high-level architectural patterns, such as image feature extraction backbones, multi-view information fusion mechanisms, and geometry-aware design principles. Consequently, we abstract away from these representation differences and instead focus on model design, proposing a novel taxonomy centered on model design strategies that are agnostic to the output format. Our proposed taxonomy organizes the research directions into five key problems that drive recent research development: feature enhancement, geometry awareness, model efficiency, augmentation strategies and temporal-aware models. To support this taxonomy with empirical grounding and standardized evaluation, we further comprehensively review related benchmarks and datasets, and extensively discuss and categorize real-world applications based on feed-forward 3D models. Finally, we outline future directions to address open challenges such as scalability, evaluation standards, and world modeling.

analysis.tldr: 从问题驱动视角综述前馈式3D场景建模，提出基于模型设计策略的五类问题分类法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统3D重建方法依赖逐场景优化或类别特定训练，效率低且可扩展性差，而前馈式方法虽发展迅速但缺乏统一的模型设计视角综述。
analysis.problem: 如何系统梳理前馈式3D重建方法，并抽象出与输出表示无关的通用模型设计策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，尽管前馈式3D重建的输出表示多样（隐式场、显式基元等），但高层架构模式相似（如图像特征提取骨干、多视图信息融合机制、几何感知设计原则）。
analysis.method: 提出以模型设计策略为中心的分类法，将研究方向组织为五个关键问题：特征增强、几何感知、模型效率、增强策略和时序感知模型，并综述相关基准、数据集和应用。
contributions: 提出一种与输出表示无关的、基于模型设计策略的前馈式3D重建分类法
系统综述了相关基准、数据集和实际应用，并指出未来方向

papers.title: MAny: Merge Anything for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning
papers.abstract: Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) is essential for sequential task adaptation of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) but is severely restricted by catastrophic forgetting. While existing literature focuses on the reasoning language backbone, in this work, we expose a critical yet neglected dual-forgetting phenomenon across both perception drift in Cross-modal Projection Space and reasoning collapse in Low-rank Parameter Space. To resolve this, we present \textbf{MAny} (\textbf{M}erge \textbf{Any}thing), a framework that merges task-specific knowledge through \textbf{C}ross-modal \textbf{P}rojection \textbf{M}erging (\textbf{CPM}) and \textbf{L}ow-rank \textbf{P}arameter \textbf{M}erging (\textbf{LPM}). Specifically, CPM recovers perceptual alignment by adaptively merging cross-modal visual representations via visual-prototype guidance, ensuring accurate feature recovery during inference. Simultaneously, LPM eliminates mutual interference among task-specific low-rank modules by recursively merging low-rank weight matrices. By leveraging recursive least squares, LPM provides a closed-form solution that mathematically guarantees an optimal fusion trajectory for reasoning stability. Notably, MAny operates as a training-free paradigm that achieves knowledge merging via efficient CPU-based algebraic operations, eliminating additional gradient-based optimization beyond initial tuning. Our extensive evaluations confirm the superior performance and robustness of MAny across multiple MLLMs and benchmarks. Specifically, on the UCIT benchmark, MAny achieves significant leads of up to 8.57\% and 2.85\% in final average accuracy over state-of-the-art methods across two different MLLMs, respectively.

analysis.tldr: MAny通过跨模态投影合并和低秩参数合并解决多模态持续指令调优中的双重遗忘问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态持续指令调优（MCIT）对多模态大模型（MLLM）的顺序任务适应至关重要，但严重受限于灾难性遗忘。现有工作聚焦于推理语言骨干，忽略了感知漂移和推理崩溃的双重遗忘现象。
analysis.problem: 解决MLLM在持续指令调优中跨模态投影空间的感知漂移和低秩参数空间的推理崩溃问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 揭示了双重遗忘现象：跨模态投影空间的感知漂移和低秩参数空间的推理崩溃。
analysis.method: 提出MAny框架，包含跨模态投影合并（CPM）和低秩参数合并（LPM）。CPM通过视觉原型引导自适应合并跨模态视觉表示；LPM通过递归最小二乘法递归合并低秩权重矩阵，提供闭式解保证推理稳定性。
contributions: 首次揭示多模态持续指令调优中的双重遗忘现象。
提出训练无关的MAny框架，通过CPU代数运算实现知识合并，无需额外梯度优化。
在UCIT基准上取得显著领先，最终平均准确率提升高达8.57%和2.85%。
analysis.experiments: 在多个MLLM和基准上评估，UCIT基准上最终平均准确率比最先进方法分别高出8.57%和2.85%。
limitations: 可能依赖初始调优阶段的任务特定模块。

papers.title: Towards Multi-Object-Tracking with Radar on a Fast Moving Vehicle: On the Potential of Processing Radar in the Frequency Domain
papers.abstract: We promote in this paper the processing of radar data in the frequency domain to achieve higher robustness against noise and structural errors, especially in comparison to feature-based methods. This holds also for high dynamics in the scene, i.e., ego-motion of the vehicle with the sensor plus the presence of an unknown number of other moving objects. In addition to the high robustness, the processing in the frequency domain has the so far neglected advantage that the underlying correlation based methods used for, e.g., registration, provide information about all moving structures in the scene. A typical automotive application case is overtaking maneuvers, which in the context of autonomous racing are used here as a motivating example. Initial experiments and results with Fourier SOFT in 2D (FS2D) are presented that use the Boreas dataset to demonstrate radar-only-odometry, i.e., radar-odometry without sensor-fusion, to support our arguments.

analysis.tldr: 提出在频域处理雷达数据以提高鲁棒性，并用于快速移动车辆的多目标跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于特征的雷达处理方法对噪声和结构误差鲁棒性不足，尤其在车辆高速运动和多目标场景下表现不佳。

papers.title: Memory Transfer Learning: How Memories are Transferred Across Domains in Coding Agents
papers.abstract: Memory-based self-evolution has emerged as a promising paradigm for coding agents. However, existing approaches typically restrict memory utilization to homogeneous task domains, failing to leverage the shared infrastructural foundations, such as runtime environments and programming languages, that exist across diverse real-world coding problems. To address this limitation, we investigate \textbf{Memory Transfer Learning} (MTL) by harnessing a unified memory pool from heterogeneous domains. We evaluate performance across 6 coding benchmarks using four memory representations, ranging from concrete traces to abstract insights. Our experiments demonstrate that cross-domain memory improves average performance by 3.7\%, primarily by transferring meta-knowledge, such as validation routines, rather than task-specific code. Importantly, we find that abstraction dictates transferability; high-level insights generalize well, whereas low-level traces often induce negative transfer due to excessive specificity. Furthermore, we show that transfer effectiveness scales with the size of the memory pool, and memory can be transferred even between different models. Our work establishes empirical design principles for expanding memory utilization beyond single-domain silos. Project page: https://memorytransfer.github.io/

analysis.tldr: 提出记忆迁移学习（MTL），通过跨领域统一记忆池提升编码Agent性能，发现抽象知识比具体代码更易迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有编码Agent的记忆利用局限于同质任务领域，未能利用跨领域共享的基础设施（如运行环境、编程语言），限制了记忆的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何实现跨异构领域的记忆迁移，以提升编码Agent在多种任务上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 抽象程度决定迁移效果：高层级洞察（如验证例程）泛化良好，而低层级具体代码常因过度特异性导致负迁移；迁移效果随记忆池规模增大而提升，且可在不同模型间迁移。
analysis.method: 构建统一记忆池，从异构领域收集记忆，使用四种记忆表示（从具体轨迹到抽象洞察），在编码Agent中跨领域检索和利用记忆。
contributions: 首次系统研究编码Agent中的跨领域记忆迁移学习（MTL）。
通过实验揭示抽象程度、记忆池规模、模型差异对迁移效果的影响，并建立经验设计原则。
analysis.experiments: 在6个编码基准上评估，使用四种记忆表示，跨领域记忆平均提升3.7%，主要来自元知识（如验证例程）的迁移。
limitations: 实验仅针对编码任务，其他领域（如对话、推理）的迁移效果未知。
记忆表示的选择和抽象程度可能依赖人工设计，自动化程度有限。

papers.title: GFT: From Imitation to Reward Fine-Tuning with Unbiased Group Advantages and Dynamic Coefficient Rectification
papers.abstract: Large language models are typically post-trained using supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL), yet effectively unifying efficient knowledge injection with robust generalization remains challenging. In this work, we provide a training-dynamics analysis showing that SFT can be interpreted as a special case of policy gradient optimization with an extremely sparse implicit reward and unstable inverse-probability weighting, which together lead to single-path dependency, entropy collapse, and gradient explosion. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose Group Fine-Tuning (GFT), a unified post-training framework that addresses these intrinsic limitations through two mechanisms: Group Advantage Learning, which constructs diverse response groups and derives normalized contrastive supervision to alleviate reward sparsity, and Dynamic Coefficient Rectification, which adaptively bounds inverse-probability weights to stabilize optimization while preserving efficient knowledge injection. Experiments demonstrate that GFT consistently surpasses SFT-based methods and yields policies that integrate more smoothly with subsequent RL training.

analysis.tldr: 提出GFT框架，通过组优势学习和动态系数修正统一SFT与RL后训练，解决奖励稀疏和梯度爆炸问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型后训练中，SFT和RL难以有效统一，SFT存在奖励稀疏、熵坍缩和梯度爆炸等内在缺陷，限制了知识注入效率和泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计统一的后训练框架，克服SFT的稀疏奖励和优化不稳定问题，同时保持高效知识注入并与后续RL训练平滑集成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 训练动态分析表明，SFT可视为策略梯度优化的特例，具有极端稀疏的隐式奖励和不稳定的逆概率加权，导致单路径依赖、熵坍缩和梯度爆炸。
analysis.method: 提出Group Fine-Tuning (GFT)，包含组优势学习（构建多样响应组并归一化对比监督以缓解奖励稀疏）和动态系数修正（自适应约束逆概率权重以稳定优化）。
contributions: 从训练动态角度揭示SFT作为策略梯度特例的缺陷（稀疏奖励、熵坍缩、梯度爆炸）。
提出GFT框架，通过组优势学习和动态系数修正统一SFT与RL后训练。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明GFT持续超越基于SFT的方法，并产生与后续RL训练更平滑集成的策略。摘要未提供具体数据集或指标。
limitations: 摘要未提供大规模或跨领域实验验证。
组优势学习可能增加计算开销。

papers.title: Diffusion Language Models for Speech Recognition
papers.abstract: Diffusion language models have recently emerged as a leading alternative to standard language models, due to their ability for bidirectional attention and parallel text generation. In this work, we explore variants for their use in speech recognition. Specifically, we introduce a comprehensive guide to incorporating masked diffusion language models (MDLM) and uniform-state diffusion models (USDMs) for rescoring ASR hypotheses. Additionally, we design a new joint-decoding method that combines CTC and USDM by integrating the framewise probability distributions derived from CTC with the labelwise probability distributions computed by USDM at each decoding step, thereby generating new candidates that combine strong language knowledge from USDM and acoustic information from CTC. Our findings reveal that USDM, as well as MDLM, can significantly improve the accuracy of recognized text. We publish all our code and recipes.

analysis.tldr: 探索扩散语言模型在语音识别重打分和联合解码中的应用，显著提升识别准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散语言模型具有双向注意力和并行文本生成能力，但如何有效应用于语音识别（尤其是重打分和联合解码）尚缺乏系统研究。
analysis.problem: 如何将掩码扩散语言模型（MDLM）和均匀状态扩散模型（USDM）有效集成到ASR系统中，以提升识别准确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 首次系统探索扩散语言模型在ASR重打分中的应用，提供MDLM和USDM的集成指南。

papers.title: Depth-Aware Image and Video Orientation Estimation
papers.abstract: This paper introduces a novel approach for image and video orientation estimation by leveraging depth distribution in natural images. The proposed method estimates the orientation based on the depth distribution across different quadrants of the image, providing a robust framework for orientation estimation suited for applications such as virtual reality (VR), augmented reality (AR), autonomous navigation, and interactive surveillance systems. To further enhance fine-scale perceptual alignment, we incorporate depth gradient consistency (DGC) and horizontal symmetry analysis (HSA), enabling precise orientation correction. This hybrid strategy effectively exploits depth cues to support spatial coherence and perceptual stability in immersive visual content. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate the robustness and accuracy of the proposed approach, outperforming existing techniques across diverse scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 利用深度分布进行图像和视频方向估计，结合深度梯度一致性和水平对称性分析提升精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方向估计方法在复杂场景下鲁棒性不足，难以满足VR/AR、自动驾驶等应用对空间一致性和感知稳定性的需求。
analysis.problem: 如何利用深度分布信息实现鲁棒的图像和视频方向估计。

papers.title: Remote Sensing Image Super-Resolution for Imbalanced Textures: A Texture-Aware Diffusion Framework
papers.abstract: Generative diffusion priors have recently achieved state-of-the-art performance in natural image super-resolution, demonstrating a powerful capability to synthesize photorealistic details. However, their direct application to remote sensing image super-resolution (RSISR) reveals significant shortcomings. Unlike natural images, remote sensing images exhibit a unique texture distribution where ground objects are globally stochastic yet locally clustered, leading to highly imbalanced textures. This imbalance severely hinders the model's spatial perception. To address this, we propose TexADiff, a novel framework that begins by estimating a Relative Texture Density Map (RTDM) to represent the texture distribution. TexADiff then leverages this RTDM in three synergistic ways: as an explicit spatial conditioning to guide the diffusion process, as a loss modulation term to prioritize texture-rich regions, and as a dynamic adapter for the sampling schedule. These modifications are designed to endow the model with explicit texture-aware capabilities. Experiments demonstrate that TexADiff achieves superior or competitive quantitative metrics. Furthermore, qualitative results show that our model generates faithful high-frequency details while effectively suppressing texture hallucinations. This improved reconstruction quality also results in significant gains in downstream task performance. The source code of our method can be found at https://github.com/ZezFuture/TexAdiff.

analysis.tldr: 提出TexADiff框架，利用相对纹理密度图引导扩散模型，解决遥感图像超分辨率中纹理分布不均衡问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感图像中地物纹理全局随机但局部聚集，导致纹理高度不均衡，直接应用自然图像超分辨率方法会严重损害模型的空间感知能力。
analysis.problem: 遥感图像超分辨率中纹理分布不均衡导致模型空间感知能力不足，生成细节不忠实或产生纹理幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 遥感图像纹理分布具有全局随机性和局部聚集性，导致高度不均衡，直接使用生成扩散先验会显著降低超分辨率性能。
analysis.method: 提出TexADiff框架，先估计相对纹理密度图（RTDM）表示纹理分布，然后以三种协同方式利用RTDM：作为显式空间条件引导扩散过程、作为损失调制项优先处理纹理丰富区域、作为采样调度的动态适配器。
contributions: 首次针对遥感图像纹理不均衡问题提出纹理感知扩散框架TexADiff。
设计相对纹理密度图（RTDM）及其三种协同利用方式，有效提升超分辨率质量和下游任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明TexADiff在定量指标上达到或超越现有方法，定性结果生成忠实的高频细节并抑制纹理幻觉，下游任务性能显著提升。
limitations: 可能依赖RTDM估计的准确性，复杂场景下估计误差可能影响性能。
框架在极端纹理不均衡场景下的泛化能力有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 针对遥感图像纹理不均衡问题提出创新框架，方法设计巧妙且实验充分，与遥感图像超分辨率方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TexADiff框架，利用相对纹理密度图引导扩散模型，解决遥感图像超分辨率中纹理分布不均衡问题。

papers.title: Reward Design for Physical Reasoning in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Physical reasoning over visual inputs demands tight integration of visual perception, domain knowledge, and multi-step symbolic inference. Yet even state-of-the-art Vision Language Models (VLMs) fall far short of human performance on physics benchmarks. While post-training algorithms such as Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) have demonstrated strong reasoning gains in language models, how reward design shapes VLM physical reasoning behavior remains poorly understood. We present a systematic reward ablation study for GRPO-based VLM training on physical reasoning. We compare four reward signals of increasing semantic richness: format compliance, answer accuracy, a composite rubric reward (answer correctness, physics principle identification, and unit consistency), and a novel internal reward derived from model attention weights over input image regions. We evaluate on PhyX, a 3,000-problem benchmark spanning six physics domains and six reasoning types across multiple-choice and open-ended formats, using IBM Granite Vision 3.3 (2B). Across both formats, GRPO with accuracy-based rewards outperforms SFT on most domains, though gains vary substantially by reward type and domain. Reward design does not uniformly improve performance. Instead, it induces domain-specific reasoning behaviors. Accuracy-based rewards provide the strongest overall gains. Rubric rewards improve structured reasoning quality without consistent accuracy improvements. Attention-based rewards enhance spatial reasoning while degrading performance in symbolic domains. Our internal attention-weight reward requires no spatial annotations and improves spatial relation accuracy from 0.27 to 0.50, suggesting that supervising where the model attends during generation is a promising direction for visually grounded physical reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 系统研究GRPO训练中奖励设计对VLM物理推理行为的影响，发现准确率奖励效果最强，注意力奖励提升空间推理但损害符号推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理推理需要视觉感知、领域知识和多步符号推理的紧密集成，但现有VLM在物理基准上远不及人类表现，而奖励设计如何影响VLM物理推理行为尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 如何设计奖励信号以有效提升VLM在物理推理任务上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 奖励设计并非统一提升性能，而是引发领域特定的推理行为：准确率奖励整体最强，评分规则奖励改善结构化推理质量但准确率提升不一致，注意力奖励提升空间推理但损害符号领域性能。
analysis.method: 对GRPO训练的VLM进行系统奖励消融研究，比较四种奖励信号：格式合规、答案准确率、复合评分规则（答案正确性、物理原理识别、单位一致性）以及基于模型对输入图像区域注意力权重的内部奖励。
contributions: 首次系统研究奖励设计对VLM物理推理行为的影响。
提出一种无需空间标注的内部注意力权重奖励，将空间关系准确率从0.27提升至0.50。
analysis.experiments: 在PhyX基准（3000问题，涵盖6个物理领域和6种推理类型）上使用IBM Granite Vision 3.3 (2B)进行评估，比较SFT和GRPO在不同奖励下的表现。
limitations: 仅使用单一模型（2B参数），结论可能不适用于更大模型。
注意力奖励在符号领域表现下降，需进一步研究如何平衡。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 系统研究奖励设计对VLM物理推理的影响，提出新颖注意力奖励，实验充分，与VLM方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统研究GRPO训练中奖励设计对VLM物理推理行为的影响，发现准确率奖励效果最强，注意力奖励提升空间推理但损害符号推理。

papers.title: Adaptive Conformal Prediction for Improving Factuality of Generations by Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are prone to generating factually incorrect outputs. Recent work has applied conformal prediction to provide uncertainty estimates and statistical guarantees for the factuality of LLM generations. However, existing approaches are typically not prompt-adaptive, limiting their ability to capture input-dependent variability. As a result, they may filter out too few items (leading to over-coverage) or too many (under-coverage) for a given task or prompt. We propose an adaptive conformal prediction approach that extends conformal score transformation methods to LLMs, with applications to long-form generation and multiple-choice question answering. This enables prompt-dependent calibration, retaining marginal coverage guarantees while improving conditional coverage. In addition, the approach naturally supports selective prediction, allowing unreliable claims or answer choices to be filtered out in downstream applications. We evaluate our approach on multiple white-box models across diverse domains and show that it significantly outperforms existing baselines in terms of conditional coverage.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应共形预测方法，提升LLM生成事实性的条件覆盖能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM易生成事实错误，现有共形预测方法未考虑输入依赖性，导致覆盖过宽或过窄。
analysis.problem: 如何实现提示自适应的共形预测，以改善LLM生成事实性的条件覆盖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有共形预测方法因非自适应导致条件覆盖不均，对特定提示过滤过多或过少。
analysis.method: 将共形分数变换方法扩展到LLM，实现提示依赖的校准，支持选择性预测。
contributions: 提出自适应共形预测方法，提升条件覆盖。
在长文本生成和多项选择问答中验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个白盒模型和不同领域上评估，显著优于基线。
limitations: 仅适用于白盒模型，黑盒模型可能受限。
选择性预测的过滤阈值需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，对提升LLM事实性有实际价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应共形预测方法，提升LLM生成事实性的条件覆盖能力。

papers.title: HiProto: Hierarchical Prototype Learning for Interpretable Object Detection Under Low-quality Conditions
papers.abstract: Interpretability is essential for deploying object detection systems in critical applications, especially under low-quality imaging conditions that degrade visual information and increase prediction uncertainty. Existing methods either enhance image quality or design complex architectures, but often lack interpretability and fail to improve semantic discrimination. In contrast, prototype learning enables interpretable modeling by associating features with class-centered semantics, which can provide more stable and interpretable representations under degradation. Motivated by this, we propose HiProto, a new paradigm for interpretable object detection based on hierarchical prototype learning. By constructing structured prototype representations across multiple feature levels, HiProto effectively models class-specific semantics, thereby enhancing both semantic discrimination and interpretability. Building upon prototype modeling, we first propose a Region-to-Prototype Contrastive Loss (RPC-Loss) to enhance the semantic focus of prototypes on target regions. Then, we propose a Prototype Regularization Loss (PR-Loss) to improve the distinctiveness among class prototypes. Finally, we propose a Scale-aware Pseudo Label Generation Strategy (SPLGS) to suppress mismatched supervision for RPC-Loss, thereby preserving the robustness of low-level prototype representations. Experiments on ExDark, RTTS, and VOC2012-FOG demonstrate that HiProto achieves competitive results while offering clear interpretability through prototype responses, without relying on image enhancement or complex architectures. Our code will be available at https://github.com/xjlDestiny/HiProto.git.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于层次原型学习的可解释目标检测方法HiProto，在低质量图像上兼顾性能与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 低质量成像条件下目标检测的可解释性对关键应用至关重要，现有方法要么增强图像质量要么设计复杂架构，但缺乏可解释性且未能提升语义判别能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在低质量图像条件下实现兼具高语义判别能力和可解释性的目标检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 原型学习通过将特征与类中心语义关联，可在退化条件下提供更稳定和可解释的表征。
analysis.method: 构建跨多特征层的层次原型结构，提出区域-原型对比损失（RPC-Loss）增强原型对目标区域的语义聚焦，原型正则化损失（PR-Loss）提升类间原型区分度，以及尺度感知伪标签生成策略（SPLGS）抑制不匹配监督以保持低层原型鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出HiProto，首个基于层次原型学习的可解释目标检测范式，在低质量条件下兼顾性能与可解释性。
设计RPC-Loss、PR-Loss和SPLGS三种组件，分别增强语义聚焦、类间区分度和低层原型鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在ExDark、RTTS和VOC2012-FOG三个低质量数据集上取得有竞争力的结果，并通过原型响应提供清晰可解释性。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的原型数量，对类别数多的场景扩展性待验证。
低质量条件类型有限（暗光、雾霾），其他退化类型（如模糊、噪声）未测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且针对可解释性痛点，实验验证有效，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于层次原型学习的可解释目标检测方法HiProto，在低质量图像上兼顾性能与可解释性。

papers.title: Leveraging LLM-GNN Integration for Open-World Question Answering over Knowledge Graphs
papers.abstract: Open-world Question Answering (OW-QA) over knowledge graphs (KGs) aims to answer questions over incomplete or evolving KGs. Traditional KGQA assumes a closed world where answers must exist in the KG, limiting real-world applicability. In contrast, open-world QA requires inferring missing knowledge based on graph structure and context. Large language models (LLMs) excel at language understanding but lack structured reasoning. Graph neural networks (GNNs) model graph topology but struggle with semantic interpretation. Existing systems integrate LLMs with GNNs or graph retrievers. Some support open-world QA but rely on structural embeddings without semantic grounding. Most assume observed paths or complete graphs, making them unreliable under missing links or multi-hop reasoning. We present GLOW, a hybrid system that combines a pre-trained GNN and an LLM for open-world KGQA. The GNN predicts top-k candidate answers from the graph structure. These, along with relevant KG facts, are serialized into a structured prompt (e.g., triples and candidates) to guide the LLM's reasoning. This enables joint reasoning over symbolic and semantic signals, without relying on retrieval or fine-tuning. To evaluate generalization, we introduce GLOW-BENCH, a 1,000-question benchmark over incomplete KGs across diverse domains. GLOW outperforms existing LLM-GNN systems on standard benchmarks and GLOW-BENCH, achieving up to 53.3% and an average 38% improvement. GitHub code and data are available.

analysis.tldr: 提出GLOW混合系统，结合GNN和LLM实现知识图谱开放世界问答，并构建新基准GLOW-BENCH。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统KGQA假设知识图谱完整，但现实世界图谱常不完整或动态变化，开放世界问答需要推理缺失知识，现有方法在结构推理和语义理解上各有不足。
analysis.problem: 解决开放世界知识图谱问答中，如何结合图结构推理和语言语义推理，处理缺失链接和多跳推理问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GLOW系统：预训练GNN预测top-k候选答案，与相关KG事实序列化为结构化提示（三元组和候选），引导LLM进行联合推理，无需检索或微调。
contributions: 提出GLOW，一种结合GNN和LLM的混合系统，用于开放世界KGQA，无需检索或微调。
构建GLOW-BENCH，一个包含1000个问题的跨领域开放世界KGQA基准。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准和GLOW-BENCH上评估，GLOW优于现有LLM-GNN系统，最高提升53.3%，平均提升38%。
limitations: 依赖GNN预测的候选质量，可能受限于图结构不完整。
LLM推理可能受提示长度和格式影响，未讨论计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法结合GNN和LLM解决开放世界KGQA，有明确创新和实验验证，但技术细节未深入。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GLOW混合系统，结合GNN和LLM实现知识图谱开放世界问答，并构建新基准GLOW-BENCH。

papers.title: How Can We Synthesize High-Quality Pretraining Data? A Systematic Study of Prompt Design, Generator Model, and Source Data
papers.abstract: Synthetic data is a standard component in training large language models, yet systematic comparisons across design dimensions, including rephrasing strategy, generator model, and source data, remain absent. We conduct extensive controlled experiments, generating over one trillion tokens, to identify critical factors in rephrasing web text into synthetic pretraining data. Our results reveal that structured output formats, such as tables, math problems, FAQs, and tutorials, consistently outperform both curated web baselines and prior synthetic methods. Notably, increasing the size of the generator model beyond 1B parameters provides no additional benefit. Our analysis also demonstrates that the selection of the original data used for mixing substantially influences performance. By applying our findings, we develop \textbf{\textsc{FinePhrase}}, a 486-billion-token open dataset of rephrased web text. We show that \textsc{FinePhrase} outperforms all existing synthetic data baselines while reducing generation costs by up to 30 times. We provide the dataset, all prompts, and the generation framework to the research community.

analysis.tldr: 系统研究提示设计、生成器模型和源数据对合成预训练数据质量的影响，发现结构化输出格式和源数据选择是关键，并开源FinePhrase数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 合成数据在LLM训练中广泛使用，但缺乏对重述策略、生成器模型和源数据等设计维度的系统比较，导致难以高效生成高质量预训练数据。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地优化合成预训练数据的生成，包括提示设计、生成器模型规模和源数据选择，以提升数据质量并降低生成成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 结构化输出格式（如表格、数学问题、FAQ、教程）持续优于精选网络文本和先前合成方法；生成器模型超过1B参数后无额外收益；源数据选择显著影响性能。
analysis.method: 通过大规模受控实验（生成超过1万亿token），比较不同重述策略、生成器模型和源数据组合，基于发现构建FinePhrase数据集。
contributions: 首次系统比较合成预训练数据生成中的提示设计、生成器模型和源数据三个维度，揭示结构化输出格式和源数据选择的关键作用。
开源4860亿token的FinePhrase数据集，性能优于现有合成数据基线，生成成本降低30倍。
analysis.experiments: 生成超过1万亿token进行受控实验，在多个下游任务上评估FinePhrase，与现有合成数据基线比较。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 实验可能仅基于特定模型架构（如LLaMA），泛化性需验证。
结构化输出格式的通用性可能因任务而异。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 系统实验设计新颖，开源数据集实用，对LLM预训练数据生成有重要指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统研究提示设计、生成器模型和源数据对合成预训练数据质量的影响，发现结构化输出格式和源数据选择是关键，并开源FinePhrase数据集。

papers.title: MApLe: Multi-instance Alignment of Diagnostic Reports and Large Medical Images
papers.abstract: In diagnostic reports, experts encode complex imaging data into clinically actionable information. They describe subtle pathological findings that are meaningful in their anatomical context. Reports follow relatively consistent structures, expressing diagnostic information with few words that are often associated with tiny but consequential image observations. Standard vision language models struggle to identify the associations between these informative text components and small locations in the images. Here, we propose "MApLe", a multi-task, multi-instance vision language alignment approach that overcomes these limitations. It disentangles the concepts of anatomical region and diagnostic finding, and links local image information to sentences in a patch-wise approach. Our method consists of a text embedding trained to capture anatomical and diagnostic concepts in sentences, a patch-wise image encoder conditioned on anatomical structures, and a multi-instance alignment of these representations. We demonstrate that MApLe can successfully align different image regions and multiple diagnostic findings in free-text reports. We show that our model improves the alignment performance compared to state-of-the-art baseline models when evaluated on several downstream tasks. The code is available at https://github.com/cirmuw/MApLe.

analysis.tldr: 提出MApLe，一种多实例视觉语言对齐方法，用于将诊断报告中的多个发现与医学大图像中的对应区域对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 诊断报告中的病理发现通常与图像中的微小区域相关，标准视觉语言模型难以建立这种细粒度关联，限制了医学图像理解。
analysis.problem: 如何将自由文本诊断报告中的多个发现与大型医学图像中的对应局部区域进行精确对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准VLM无法识别报告中的信息性文本组件与图像中微小但关键区域之间的关联。
analysis.method: 多任务多实例对齐方法，包括：1）捕捉解剖和诊断概念的文本嵌入；2）基于解剖结构的逐块图像编码器；3）多实例对齐机制。
contributions: 提出MApLe，一种多实例视觉语言对齐方法，能同时对齐多个诊断发现与图像区域。
在多个下游任务上展示了优于现有基线的对齐性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个下游任务上评估对齐性能，与最先进基线模型比较，MApLe表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖特定解剖结构先验，泛化到新领域需调整。
多实例对齐的计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对医学图像与报告对齐的痛点，实验显示优于基线，代码开源，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MApLe，一种多实例视觉语言对齐方法，用于将诊断报告中的多个发现与医学大图像中的对应区域对齐。

papers.title: [Emerging Ideas] Artificial Tripartite Intelligence: A Bio-Inspired, Sensor-First Architecture for Physical AI
papers.abstract: As AI moves from data centers to robots and wearables, scaling ever-larger models becomes insufficient. Physical AI operates under tight latency, energy, privacy, and reliability constraints, and its performance depends not only on model capacity but also on how signals are acquired through controllable sensors in dynamic environments. We present Artificial Tripartite Intelligence (ATI), a bio-inspired, sensor-first architectural contract for physical AI. ATI is tripartite at the systems level: a Brainstem (L1) provides reflexive safety and signal-integrity control, a Cerebellum (L2) performs continuous sensor calibration, and a Cerebral Inference Subsystem spanning L3/L4 supports routine skill selection and execution, coordination, and deep reasoning. This modular organization allows sensor control, adaptive sensing, edge-cloud execution, and foundation model reasoning to co-evolve within one closed-loop architecture, while keeping time-critical sensing and control on device and invoking higher-level inference only when needed. We instantiate ATI in a mobile camera prototype under dynamic lighting and motion. In our routed evaluation (L3-L4 split inference), compared to the default auto-exposure setting, ATI (L1/L2 adaptive sensing) improves end-to-end accuracy from 53.8% to 88% while reducing remote L4 invocations by 43.3%. These results show the value of co-designing sensing and inference for embodied AI.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种受生物启发的传感器优先架构ATI，将物理AI的感知与推理协同设计，在移动相机原型上显著提升精度并减少远程调用。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理AI（如机器人、可穿戴设备）面临延迟、能耗、隐私和可靠性等严格约束，单纯扩大模型规模已不足以应对，需要从传感器信号获取层面进行架构创新。
analysis.problem: 现有AI架构未充分考虑物理世界中传感器控制与推理的协同，导致在动态环境下感知质量差、推理效率低。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 默认自动曝光设置在动态光照下端到端精度仅53.8%，而ATI通过自适应传感将精度提升至88%，同时减少43.3%的远程推理调用，表明传感与推理协同设计对具身AI至关重要。
analysis.method: 提出人工三方智能（ATI）架构，包含脑干（L1，反射式安全与信号完整性控制）、小脑（L2，连续传感器校准）和大脑推理子系统（L3/L4，技能选择、协调与深度推理），形成闭环架构，将时间关键的传感与控制保留在设备端，仅在必要时调用高层推理。
contributions: 提出ATI这一生物启发的传感器优先架构契约，为物理AI提供模块化、闭环的设计范式。
在移动相机原型上验证了ATI在动态光照和运动下的有效性，精度提升34.2个百分点，远程调用减少43.3%。
analysis.experiments: 在移动相机原型上，于动态光照和运动条件下进行路由评估（L3-L4拆分推理），对比默认自动曝光设置，ATI（L1/L2自适应传感）将端到端精度从53.8%提升至88%，同时减少43.3%的远程L4调用。
limitations: 仅在单一移动相机原型上验证，泛化性有待更多物理平台测试。
未讨论L3/L4推理子系统的具体模型选择与计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 架构创新性强，实验效果显著，但摘要未提供更多细节，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种受生物启发的传感器优先架构ATI，将物理AI的感知与推理协同设计，在移动相机原型上显著提升精度并减少远程调用。

papers.title: Creo: From One-Shot Image Generation to Progressive, Co-Creative Ideation
papers.abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) systems enable rapid generation of high-fidelity imagery but are misaligned with how visual ideas develop. T2I systems generate outputs that make implicit visual decisions on behalf of the user, often introduce fine-grained details that can anchor users prematurely and limit their ability to keep options open early on, and cause unintended changes during editing that are difficult to correct and reduce users' sense of control. To address these concerns, we present Creo, a multi-stage T2I system that scaffolds image generation by progressing from rough sketches to high-resolution outputs, exposing intermediary abstractions where users can make incremental changes. Sketch-like abstractions invite user editing and allow users to keep design options open when ideas are still forming due to their provisional nature. Each stage in Creo can be modified with manual changes and AI-assisted operations, enabling fine-grained, step-wise control through a locking mechanism that preserves prior decisions so subsequent edits affect only specified regions or attributes. Users remain in the loop, making and verifying decisions across stages, while the system applies diffs instead of regenerating full images, reducing drift as fidelity increases. A comparative study with a one-shot baseline shows that participants felt stronger ownership over Creo outputs, as they were able to trace their decisions in building up the image. Furthermore, embedding-based analysis indicates that Creo outputs are less homogeneous than one-shot results. These findings suggest that multi-stage generation, combined with intermediate control and decision locking, is a key design principle for improving controllability, user agency, creativity, and output diversity in generative systems.

analysis.tldr: Creo通过多阶段渐进式生成和锁定机制，提升用户控制感和输出多样性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有T2I系统一次性生成高保真图像，隐含地替用户做视觉决策，过早引入细节限制用户开放性，且编辑时易产生意外变化，降低用户控制感。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个T2I系统，使用户在创意构思过程中能逐步细化、保持选项开放、并拥有精细控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 一次性生成会过早锚定用户，限制创意探索；编辑时难以保持一致性，用户缺乏所有权感。
analysis.method: 多阶段生成：从粗略草图逐步过渡到高分辨率输出，每阶段支持手动和AI辅助编辑，并通过锁定机制保留先前决策，仅对指定区域或属性进行差异更新。
contributions: 提出Creo多阶段渐进式T2I系统，支持中间抽象表示和逐步控制。
通过用户研究和嵌入分析证明该方法提升用户所有权感和输出多样性。
analysis.experiments: 与一次性基线对比的用户研究，以及基于嵌入的多样性分析。
limitations: 可能增加生成时间。
用户学习成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，用户研究有说服力，但技术细节未完全展开。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Creo通过多阶段渐进式生成和锁定机制，提升用户控制感和输出多样性。

papers.title: HINTBench: Horizon-agent Intrinsic Non-attack Trajectory Benchmark
papers.abstract: Existing agent-safety evaluation has focused mainly on externally induced risks. Yet agents may still enter unsafe trajectories under benign conditions. We study this complementary but underexplored setting through the lens of \emph{intrinsic} risk, where intrinsic failures remain latent, propagate across long-horizon execution, and eventually lead to high-consequence outcomes. To evaluate this setting, we introduce \emph{non-attack intrinsic risk auditing} and present \textbf{HINTBench}, a benchmark of 629 agent trajectories (523 risky, 106 safe; 33 steps on average) supporting three tasks: risk detection, risk-step localization, and intrinsic failure-type identification. Its annotations are organized under a unified five-constraint taxonomy. Experiments reveal a substantial capability gap: strong LLMs perform well on trajectory-level risk detection, but their performance drops to below 35 Strict-F1 on risk-step localization, while fine-grained failure diagnosis proves even harder. Existing guard models transfer poorly to this setting. These findings establish intrinsic risk auditing as an open challenge for agent safety.

analysis.tldr: 提出HINTBench基准，揭示LLM在智能体内在风险审计中的严重能力不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能体安全评估主要关注外部诱导风险，但智能体在良性条件下仍可能进入不安全轨迹，这种内在风险尚未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 评估智能体在非攻击场景下的内在风险，包括风险检测、风险步骤定位和失败类型识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 强LLM在轨迹级风险检测上表现良好，但在风险步骤定位上Strict-F1低于35%，细粒度失败诊断更难，现有防护模型迁移效果差。
analysis.method: 构建包含629条轨迹（523条风险、106条安全，平均33步）的基准HINTBench，支持三个任务，并采用统一五约束分类体系进行标注。
contributions: 首次提出非攻击内在风险审计问题，并建立基准HINTBench。
揭示当前LLM在内在风险审计中的能力差距，尤其是步骤定位和细粒度诊断的困难。
analysis.experiments: 使用强LLM和现有防护模型在HINTBench上进行实验，报告了风险检测、风险步骤定位和失败类型识别的性能。
limitations: 基准规模有限（629条轨迹），可能无法覆盖所有内在风险场景。
仅评估了文本轨迹，未涉及多模态或真实环境。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 提出新颖的内在风险审计问题并构建基准，实验揭示重要能力差距，对智能体安全有较高价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HINTBench基准，揭示LLM在智能体内在风险审计中的严重能力不足。

papers.title: Evaluation of Agents under Simulated AI Marketplace Dynamics
papers.abstract: Modern information access ecosystems consist of mixtures of systems, such as retrieval systems and large language models, and increasingly rely on marketplaces to mediate access to models, tools, and data, making competition between systems inherent to deployment. In such settings, outcomes are shaped not only by benchmark quality but also by competitive pressure, including user switching, routing decisions, and operational constraints. Yet evaluation is still largely conducted on static benchmarks with accuracy-focused measures that assume systems operate in isolation. This mismatch makes it difficult to predict post-deployment success and obscures competitive effects such as early-adoption advantages and market dominance. We introduce Marketplace Evaluation, a simulation-based paradigm that evaluates information access systems as participants in a competitive marketplace. By simulating repeated interactions and evolving user and agent preferences, the framework enables longitudinal evaluation and marketplace-level metrics, such as retention and market share, that complement and can extend beyond traditional accuracy-based metrics. We formalize the framework and outline a research agenda, motivated by business and economics, around marketplace simulation, metrics, optimization, and adoption in evaluation campaigns like TREC.

analysis.tldr: 提出模拟AI市场动态的评估框架，通过竞争性市场模拟补充传统静态基准评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估依赖静态基准和准确率指标，假设系统独立运行，无法反映部署后竞争压力（如用户切换、路由决策）对系统表现的影响，导致难以预测实际成功。
analysis.problem: 如何设计评估方法以捕捉信息访问系统在竞争性市场中的动态表现和长期效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出静态评估忽略竞争效应（如早期采纳优势、市场主导），导致预测偏差。
analysis.method: 提出Marketplace Evaluation，一种基于模拟的评估范式，通过模拟重复交互和用户/代理偏好演化，引入纵向评估和市场级指标（如留存率、市场份额）。
contributions: 提出Marketplace Evaluation框架，将信息访问系统作为竞争市场参与者进行评估。
引入纵向评估和市场级指标（如留存率、市场份额），补充传统准确率指标。
形式化框架并概述研究议程，涵盖市场模拟、指标、优化及在TREC等评估活动中的应用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模拟环境可能无法完全反映真实市场复杂性。
框架需要大量参数设定和校准，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 框架新颖但缺乏实验验证，与重点方向弱相关，适合保存后续关注。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模拟AI市场动态的评估框架，通过竞争性市场模拟补充传统静态基准评估。

papers.title: Heuristic Style Transfer for Real-Time, Efficient Weather Attribute Detection
papers.abstract: We present lightweight and efficient architectures to detect weather conditions from RGB images, predicting the weather type (sunny, rain, snow, fog) and 11 complementary attributes such as intensity, visibility, and ground condition, for a total of 53 classes across the tasks. This work examines to what extent weather conditions manifest as variations in visual style. We investigate style-inspired techniques, including Gram matrices, a truncated ResNet-50 targeting lower and intermediate layers, and PatchGAN-style architectures, within a multi-task framework with attention mechanisms. Two families are introduced: RTM (ResNet50-Truncated-MultiTasks) and PMG (PatchGAN-MultiTasks-Gram), together with their variants. Our contributions include automation of Gram-matrix computation, integration of PatchGAN into supervised multi-task learning, and local style capture through local Gram for improved spatial coherence. We also release a dataset of 503,875 images annotated with 12 weather attributes under a Creative Commons Attribution (CC-BY) license. The models achieve F1 scores above 96 percent on our internal test set and above 78 percent in zero-shot evaluation on several external datasets, confirming their generalization ability. The PMG architecture, with fewer than 5 million parameters, runs in real time with a small memory footprint, making it suitable for embedded systems. The modular design of the models also allows style-related or weather-related tasks to be added or removed as needed.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级多任务架构PMG和RTM，利用风格迁移技术实现实时天气属性检测，F1>96%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有天气检测方法通常计算量大，难以在嵌入式系统上实时运行，且缺乏对天气作为视觉风格变化的深入利用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计轻量级、高效的架构，从RGB图像中实时检测天气类型及多种互补属性，并利用风格信息提升性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 天气条件表现为视觉风格的变化，Gram矩阵和PatchGAN可有效捕获局部风格特征。
analysis.method: 提出两种多任务架构：RTM（截断ResNet-50+注意力机制）和PMG（PatchGAN+Gram矩阵），集成局部Gram计算和自动化Gram矩阵计算，实现实时、轻量级天气属性检测。
contributions: 提出RTM和PMG两种轻量级多任务架构，实现实时天气属性检测。
自动化Gram矩阵计算，并将PatchGAN集成到监督多任务学习中。
引入局部Gram捕获局部风格，提升空间一致性。
发布包含503,875张图像、12种天气属性的CC-BY许可数据集。
analysis.experiments: 内部测试集F1>96%，多个外部数据集零样本评估F1>78%，PMG模型参数<5M，实时运行。
limitations: 零样本评估F1仅78%，泛化性仍有提升空间。
未提及对极端天气或罕见场景的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，实验充分但应用场景较窄，适合有相关需求的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级多任务架构PMG和RTM，利用风格迁移技术实现实时天气属性检测，F1>96%。

papers.title: SceneGlue: Scene-Aware Transformer for Feature Matching without Scene-Level Annotation
papers.abstract: Local feature matching plays a critical role in understanding the correspondence between cross-view images. However, traditional methods are constrained by the inherent local nature of feature descriptors, limiting their ability to capture non-local scene information that is essential for accurate cross-view correspondence. In this paper, we introduce SceneGlue, a scene-aware feature matching framework designed to overcome these limitations. SceneGlue leverages a hybridizable matching paradigm that integrates implicit parallel attention and explicit cross-view visibility estimation. The parallel attention mechanism simultaneously exchanges information among local descriptors within and across images, enhancing the scene's global context. To further enrich the scene awareness, we propose the Visibility Transformer, which explicitly categorizes features into visible and invisible regions, providing an understanding of cross-view scene visibility. By combining explicit and implicit scene-level awareness, SceneGlue effectively compensates for the local descriptor constraints. Notably, SceneGlue is trained using only local feature matches, without requiring scene-level groundtruth annotations. This scene-aware approach not only improves accuracy and robustness but also enhances interpretability compared to traditional methods. Extensive experiments on applications such as homography estimation, pose estimation, image matching, and visual localization validate SceneGlue's superior performance. The source code is available at https://github.com/songlin-du/SceneGlue.

analysis.tldr: SceneGlue 通过隐式并行注意力和显式可见性估计实现场景感知特征匹配，无需场景级标注。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统局部特征匹配方法受限于描述子的局部性，难以捕获跨视图对应所需的非局部场景信息，导致匹配精度和鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖场景级标注的情况下，让特征匹配框架具备场景级感知能力，以提升跨视图匹配的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 SceneGlue 框架，包含混合匹配范式：隐式并行注意力机制在图像内和图像间交换局部描述子信息以增强全局上下文；显式可见性 Transformer 将特征分类为可见和不可见区域，提供跨视图可见性理解。
contributions: 提出 SceneGlue，一种无需场景级标注的场景感知特征匹配框架。
设计混合匹配范式，结合隐式并行注意力和显式可见性估计，提升场景感知能力。
在多个任务（单应性估计、位姿估计、图像匹配、视觉定位）上验证了方法的优越性能。
analysis.experiments: 在单应性估计、位姿估计、图像匹配和视觉定位等任务上进行实验，验证了 SceneGlue 的优越性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对极端视角变化或遮挡场景的鲁棒性有限。
可见性分类的准确性可能受限于训练数据中的局部匹配标注。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且无需场景级标注，实验覆盖多个任务，但摘要未提供具体性能数据，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SceneGlue 通过隐式并行注意力和显式可见性估计实现场景感知特征匹配，无需场景级标注。

papers.title: AI-Assisted Peer Review at Scale: The AAAI-26 AI Review Pilot
papers.abstract: Scientific peer review faces mounting strain as submission volumes surge, making it increasingly difficult to sustain review quality, consistency, and timeliness. Recent advances in AI have led the community to consider its use in peer review, yet a key unresolved question is whether AI can generate technically sound reviews at real-world conference scale. Here we report the first large-scale field deployment of AI-assisted peer review: every main-track submission at AAAI-26 received one clearly identified AI review from a state-of-the-art system. The system combined frontier models, tool use, and safeguards in a multi-stage process to generate reviews for all 22,977 full-review papers in less than a day. A large-scale survey of AAAI-26 authors and program committee members showed that participants not only found AI reviews useful, but actually preferred them to human reviews on key dimensions such as technical accuracy and research suggestions. We also introduce a novel benchmark and find that our system substantially outperforms a simple LLM-generated review baseline at detecting a variety of scientific weaknesses. Together, these results show that state-of-the-art AI methods can already make meaningful contributions to scientific peer review at conference scale, opening a path toward the next generation of synergistic human-AI teaming for evaluating research.

analysis.tldr: AAAI-26首次大规模部署AI辅助同行评审，AI评审在技术准确性和研究建议上优于人类评审。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着投稿量激增，传统同行评审在质量、一致性和及时性上面临巨大压力，亟需可扩展的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 验证AI能否在真实会议规模下生成技术可靠的评审意见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大规模调查显示，参与者不仅认为AI评审有用，而且在技术准确性和研究建议等关键维度上更偏好AI评审。
analysis.method: 结合前沿模型、工具使用和安全保障的多阶段流程，在一天内为22,977篇论文生成评审。
contributions: 首次在真实会议规模（AAAI-26）部署AI辅助同行评审系统
通过大规模调查证明AI评审在技术准确性和研究建议上优于人类评审
引入新基准，显示系统在检测科学弱点上显著优于简单LLM基线
analysis.experiments: 在AAAI-26所有主轨投稿上部署，并通过大规模作者和程序委员会调查评估，同时引入新基准对比简单LLM基线。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有学科领域的评审标准差异
AI评审的长期影响和潜在偏见需进一步研究
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 首次大规模实证AI评审优于人类，方法创新且影响深远，但技术细节未完全展开。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AAAI-26首次大规模部署AI辅助同行评审，AI评审在技术准确性和研究建议上优于人类评审。

papers.title: A Multi-Stage Optimization Pipeline for Bethesda Cell Detection in Pap Smear Cytology
papers.abstract: Computer vision techniques have advanced significantly in recent years, finding diverse and impactful applications within the medical field. In this paper, we introduce a new framework for the detection of Bethesda cells in Pap smear images, developed for Track B of the Riva Cytology Challenge held in association with the International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI). This work focuses on enhancing computer vision models for cell detection, with performance evaluated using the mAP50-95 metric. We propose a solution based on an ensemble of YOLO and U-Net architectures, followed by a refinement stage utilizing overlap removal techniques and a binary classifier. Our framework achieved second place with a mAP50-95 score of 0.5909 in the competition. The implementation and source code are available at the following repository: github.com/martinamster/riva-trackb

analysis.tldr: 提出YOLO+U-Net集成与后处理优化的Bethesda细胞检测流水线，在Riva细胞学挑战赛中获得第二名。
analysis.research_motivation: 宫颈癌筛查中Pap涂片图像的Bethesda细胞自动检测对提高诊断效率和准确性至关重要，但现有计算机视觉模型在细胞检测任务上仍有提升空间。
analysis.problem: 在Pap涂片图像中准确检测Bethesda细胞，以提升mAP50-95指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成YOLO和U-Net架构进行初始检测，然后通过重叠去除技术和二元分类器进行后处理优化。
contributions: 提出了一种多阶段优化流水线，结合YOLO和U-Net集成与后处理步骤，用于Bethesda细胞检测。
在Riva细胞学挑战赛Track B中取得第二名，mAP50-95为0.5909，并开源了代码。
analysis.experiments: 在Riva细胞学挑战赛Track B数据集上评估，mAP50-95为0.5909，获得第二名。
limitations: 可能对特定数据集或竞赛设置过拟合，泛化能力需进一步验证。
后处理步骤可能增加计算开销，影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法为现有模型集成与后处理，创新性一般，但医学应用有一定价值，实验仅在单一竞赛上验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出YOLO+U-Net集成与后处理优化的Bethesda细胞检测流水线，在Riva细胞学挑战赛中获得第二名。

papers.title: ASTRA: Enhancing Multi-Subject Generation with Retrieval-Augmented Pose Guidance and Disentangled Position Embedding
papers.abstract: Subject-driven image generation has shown great success in creating personalized content, but its capabilities are largely confined to single subjects in common poses. Current approaches face a fundamental conflict when handling multiple subjects with complex, distinct actions: preserving individual identities while enforcing precise pose structures. This challenge often leads to identity fusion and pose distortion, as appearance and structure signals become entangled within the model's architecture. To resolve this conflict, we introduce ASTRA(Adaptive Synthesis through Targeted Retrieval Augmentation), a novel framework that architecturally disentangles subject appearance from pose structure within a unified Diffusion Transformer. ASTRA achieves this through a dual-pronged strategy. It first employs a Retrieval-Augmented Pose (RAG-Pose) pipeline to provide a clean, explicit structural prior from a curated database. Then, its core generative model learns to process these dual visual conditions using our Enhanced Universal Rotary Position Embedding (EURoPE), an asymmetric encoding mechanism that decouples identity tokens from spatial locations while binding pose tokens to the canvas. Concurrently, a Disentangled Semantic Modulation (DSM) adapter offloads the identity preservation task into the text conditioning stream. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our integrated approach achieves superior disentanglement. On our designed COCO-based complex pose benchmark, ASTRA achieves a new state-of-the-art in pose adherence, while maintaining high identity fidelity and text alignment in DreamBench.

analysis.tldr: ASTRA通过检索增强姿态引导和解耦位置嵌入，在多主体图像生成中实现身份与姿态的结构解耦。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有主体驱动图像生成主要针对单一主体和常见姿态，处理多主体复杂动作时面临身份融合和姿态扭曲问题，因为外观和结构信号在模型架构中纠缠。
analysis.problem: 如何在多主体图像生成中同时保持个体身份和精确姿态结构，避免身份融合和姿态失真。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前方法在多主体复杂动作场景下存在身份融合和姿态扭曲，原因是外观与结构信号在模型架构中纠缠。
analysis.method: 提出ASTRA框架，包含检索增强姿态（RAG-Pose）管道提供清晰结构先验，增强通用旋转位置嵌入（EURoPE）解耦身份令牌与空间位置，以及解耦语义调制（DSM）适配器将身份保持任务卸载到文本条件流。
contributions: 提出RAG-Pose管道，从数据库检索显式结构先验。
设计EURoPE不对称编码机制，解耦身份令牌与空间位置。
引入DSM适配器，将身份保持任务转移到文本条件流。
analysis.experiments: 在COCO复杂姿态基准和DreamBench上评估，ASTRA在姿态遵循上达到新SOTA，同时保持高身份保真度和文本对齐。
limitations: 依赖外部姿态数据库，可能限制泛化性。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: ASTRA通过检索增强姿态引导和解耦位置嵌入，在多主体图像生成中实现身份与姿态的结构解耦。

papers.title: ASTER: Latent Pseudo-Anomaly Generation for Unsupervised Time-Series Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Time-series anomaly detection (TSAD) is critical in domains such as industrial monitoring, healthcare, and cybersecurity, but it remains challenging due to rare and heterogeneous anomalies and the scarcity of labelled data. This scarcity makes unsupervised approaches predominant, yet existing methods often rely on reconstruction or forecasting, which struggle with complex data, or on embedding-based approaches that require domain-specific anomaly synthesis and fixed distance metrics. We propose ASTER, a framework that generates pseudo-anomalies directly in the latent space, avoiding handcrafted anomaly injections and the need for domain expertise. A latent-space decoder produces tailored pseudo-anomalies to train a Transformer-based anomaly classifier, while a pre-trained LLM enriches the temporal and contextual representations of this space. Experiments on three benchmark datasets show that ASTER achieves state-of-the-art performance and sets a new standard for LLM-based TSAD.

analysis.tldr: ASTER在潜空间生成伪异常，结合预训练LLM增强表示，实现无监督时间序列异常检测SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 时间序列异常检测在工业监控、医疗和网络安全等领域至关重要，但异常罕见且异构，标注数据稀缺，现有无监督方法（如重建或预测）难以处理复杂数据，而嵌入方法需要领域特定的异常合成和固定距离度量。
analysis.problem: 解决无监督时间序列异常检测中缺乏标注数据、现有方法依赖手工异常注入或领域知识的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ASTER框架，在潜空间中生成伪异常，避免手工注入和领域知识；使用潜空间解码器生成定制伪异常训练基于Transformer的异常分类器，并利用预训练LLM增强时间与上下文表示。
contributions: 提出在潜空间生成伪异常的框架，无需领域知识或手工异常合成。
结合预训练LLM增强潜空间表示，提升异常检测性能。
在三个基准数据集上达到SOTA，为基于LLM的TSAD设立新标准。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准数据集上实验，达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练LLM的质量和计算资源。

analysis.reason: 方法新颖，潜空间生成伪异常结合LLM，实验SOTA，但摘要未提供详细实验对比。

papers.title: Formalizing Kantian Ethics: Formula of the Universal Law Logic (FULL)
papers.abstract: The field of machine ethics aims to build Artificial Moral Agents (AMAs) to better understand morality and make AI agents safer. To do so, many approaches encode human moral intuition as a set of axioms on actions e.g., do not harm, you must help others. However, this introduces (at least) two limitations for future AMAs. First, it does not consider the agent's purposes in performing the action. Second, it assumes that we humans can enumerate our moral intuition. This paper explores formalizing a moral procedure that alleviates these two limitations. We specifically consider Kantian ethics and present a multi-sorted quantified modal logic we call the Formula of the Universal Law Logic (FULL). The FULL formalizes Kant's first formulation of the categorical imperative, the Formula of the Universal Law (FUL), and concepts such as causality and agency. We demonstrate on three cases from Kantian ethics that the FULL can reason to evaluate agents' actions for certain purposes without built-in moral intuition, given that it has sufficient (non-normative) background knowledge. Therefore, the FULL is a contribution towards more robust and autonomous AMAs, and a more formal understanding of Kantian ethics.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种多类量化模态逻辑FULL，形式化康德伦理学的普遍法则公式，使AI无需内置道德直觉即可评估行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器伦理方法依赖编码人类道德直觉（如“不可伤害”），但存在两个局限：忽略行为目的、假设人类能枚举所有道德直觉，导致AMAs缺乏鲁棒性和自主性。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化一种道德推理程序，使AI代理能在无需预设道德直觉的情况下，基于非规范性背景知识评估行为是否符合道德法则。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多类量化模态逻辑FULL，形式化康德的第一条绝对命令（普遍法则公式），并整合因果性和能动性等概念，通过逻辑推理评估行为。
contributions: 首次形式化康德伦理学的普遍法则公式为多类量化模态逻辑FULL。
在三个康德伦理学案例上展示FULL能在无内置道德直觉下推理评估行为。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。

papers.title: PartNerFace: Part-based Neural Radiance Fields for Animatable Facial Avatar Reconstruction
papers.abstract: We present PartNerFace, a part-based neural radiance fields approach, for reconstructing animatable facial avatar from monocular RGB videos. Existing solutions either simply condition the implicit network with the morphable model parameters or learn an imaginary canonical radiance field, making them fail to generalize to unseen facial expressions and capture fine-scale motion details. To address these challenges, we first apply inverse skinning based on a parametric head model to map an observed point to the canonical space, and then model fine-scale motions with a part-based deformation field. Our key insight is that the deformation of different facial parts should be modeled differently. Specifically, our part-based deformation field consists of multiple local MLPs to adaptively partition the canonical space into different parts, where the deformation of a 3D point is computed by aggregating the prediction of all local MLPs by a soft-weighting mechanism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method generalizes well to unseen expressions and is capable of modeling fine-scale facial motions, outperforming state-of-the-art methods both quantitatively and qualitatively.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于部分的神经辐射场，从单目视频重建可动画化面部头像，通过逆蒙皮和部分变形场提升表情泛化与细节建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖参数模型条件或学习虚拟辐射场，难以泛化到未见表情且无法捕捉精细运动细节。
analysis.problem: 从单目RGB视频重建可动画化面部头像时，如何提升对未见表情的泛化能力和精细运动细节建模。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同面部区域的变形应被差异化建模，统一变形场无法捕捉局部细节。
analysis.method: 基于参数头部模型的逆蒙皮将观测点映射到规范空间，再使用由多个局部MLP组成的部分变形场，通过软加权聚合预测变形。
contributions: 提出部分变形场，自适应划分规范空间为不同部分，差异化建模面部变形。
在单目视频重建中实现更好的表情泛化和精细运动细节，超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上定量和定性评估，表明方法在未见表情泛化和细节建模上优于现有技术。
limitations: 依赖参数头部模型，可能受模型精度限制。
部分划分的自动学习可能引入额外计算开销。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于部分的神经辐射场，从单目视频重建可动画化面部头像，通过逆蒙皮和部分变形场提升表情泛化与细节建模。

papers.title: Blind Bitstream-corrupted Video Recovery via Metadata-guided Diffusion Model
papers.abstract: Bitstream-corrupted video recovery aims to restore realistic content degraded during video storage or transmission. Existing methods typically assume that predefined masks of corrupted regions are available, but manually annotating these masks is labor-intensive and impractical in real-world scenarios. To address this limitation, we introduce a new blind video recovery setting that removes the reliance on predefined masks. This setting presents two major challenges: accurately identifying corrupted regions and recovering content from extensive and irregular degradations. We propose a Metadata-Guided Diffusion Model (M-GDM) to tackle these challenges. Specifically, intrinsic video metadata are leveraged as corruption indicators through a dual-stream metadata encoder that separately embeds motion vectors and frame types before fusing them into a unified representation. This representation interacts with corrupted latent features via cross-attention at each diffusion step. To preserve intact regions, we design a prior-driven mask predictor that generates pseudo masks using both metadata and diffusion priors, enabling the separation and recombination of intact and recovered regions through hard masking. To mitigate boundary artifacts caused by imperfect masks, a post-refinement module enhances consistency between intact and recovered regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and its superiority in blind video recovery. Code is available at: https://github.com/Shuyun-Wang/M-GDM.

analysis.tldr: 提出元数据引导扩散模型，无需预定义掩码即可恢复码流损坏视频。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有码流损坏视频恢复方法依赖预定义的损坏区域掩码，手动标注成本高且不实用，亟需无需掩码的盲恢复方法。
analysis.problem: 在未知损坏区域的情况下，准确识别码流损坏区域并恢复大面积不规则退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用视频元数据（运动向量和帧类型）作为损坏指示，通过双流元数据编码器嵌入并融合，再与损坏潜在特征交叉注意力交互；设计先验驱动掩码预测器生成伪掩码，结合硬掩码分离并重组完整与恢复区域；后精炼模块缓解边界伪影。
contributions: 提出盲视频恢复新设定，无需预定义损坏掩码。
提出元数据引导扩散模型，有效利用元数据识别损坏区域并恢复内容。

papers.title: Rethinking Image-to-3D Generation with Sparse Queries: Efficiency, Capacity, and Input-View Bias
papers.abstract: We present SparseGen, a novel framework for efficient image-to-3D generation, which exhibits low input-view bias while being significantly faster. Unlike traditional approaches that rely on dense volumetric grids, triplanes, or pixel-aligned primitives, we model scenes with a compact sparse set of learned 3D anchor queries and a learned expansion operator that decodes each transformed query into a small local set of 3D Gaussian primitives. Trained under a rectified-flow reconstruction objective without 3D supervision, our model learns to allocate representation capacity where geometry and appearance matter, achieving significant reductions in memory and inference time while preserving multi-view fidelity. We introduce quantitative measures of input-view bias and utilization to show that sparse queries reduce overfitting to conditioning views while being representationally efficient. Our results argue that sparse set-latent expansion is a principled, practical alternative for efficient 3D generative modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出稀疏查询框架SparseGen，实现高效、低输入视角偏见的图像到3D生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像到3D生成方法依赖密集体素网格、三平面或像素对齐基元，导致计算开销大、内存占用高，且易过拟合输入视角，限制了效率和泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种高效、低输入视角偏见的图像到3D生成框架，在减少计算和内存的同时保持多视图一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出密集表示方法存在输入视角偏见和表示效率低下的问题，而稀疏查询可缓解过拟合并提高表示效率。
analysis.method: 提出SparseGen，使用一组紧凑的稀疏3D锚点查询和可学习的扩展算子，将每个变换后的查询解码为局部3D高斯基元，并在整流流重建目标下训练，无需3D监督。
contributions: 提出基于稀疏查询和扩展算子的图像到3D生成框架，显著降低内存和推理时间。
引入输入视角偏见和利用率的定量度量，证明稀疏查询减少过拟合并提高表示效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景的细节生成能力有限。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出稀疏查询框架SparseGen，实现高效、低输入视角偏见的图像到3D生成。

papers.title: SAND: Spatially Adaptive Network Depth for Fast Sampling of Neural Implicit Surfaces
papers.abstract: Implicit neural representations are powerful for geometric modeling, but their practical use is often limited by the high computational cost of network evaluations. We observe that implicit representations require progressively lower accuracy as query points move farther from the target surface, and that even within the same iso-surface, representation difficulty varies spatially with local geometric complexity. However, conventional neural implicit models evaluate all query points with the same network depth and computational cost, ignoring this spatial variation and thereby incurring substantial computational waste. Motivated by this observation, we propose an efficient neural implicit geometry representation framework with spatially adaptive network depth (SAND). SAND leverages a volumetric network-depth map together with a tailed multi-layer perceptron (T-MLP) to model implicit representation. The volumetric depth map records, for each spatial region, the network depth required to achieve sufficient accuracy, while the T-MLP is a modified MLP designed to learn implicit functions such as signed distance functions, where an output branch, referred to as a tail, is attached to each hidden layer. This design allows network evaluation to terminate adaptively without traversing the full network and directs computational resources to geometrically important and complex regions, improving efficiency while preserving high-fidelity representations. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our approach can significantly improve the inference-time query speed of implicit neural representations.

analysis.tldr: 提出空间自适应网络深度（SAND）框架，通过动态调整网络深度加速神经隐式表面采样。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经隐式表示计算成本高，传统方法对所有查询点使用相同网络深度，忽略了空间变化导致的计算浪费。
analysis.problem: 如何根据查询点的空间位置和几何复杂度自适应调整网络深度，以减少计算冗余并保持高保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 隐式表示在远离目标表面时所需精度降低，且同一等值面内不同区域几何复杂度不同，导致计算需求空间变化。
analysis.method: SAND框架：使用体积网络深度图记录每个空间区域所需网络深度，结合尾部多层感知机（T-MLP），每个隐藏层附加输出分支，允许网络评估自适应终止。
contributions: 提出空间自适应网络深度（SAND）框架，根据空间位置动态调整网络深度。
设计尾部多层感知机（T-MLP），支持自适应终止并引导计算资源到复杂区域。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预计算的深度图，增加额外开销。
自适应策略在极端几何复杂度场景下可能失效。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出空间自适应网络深度（SAND）框架，通过动态调整网络深度加速神经隐式表面采样。

papers.title: The Synthetic Media Shift: Tracking the Rise, Virality, and Detectability of AI-Generated Multimodal Misinformation
papers.abstract: As generative AI advances, the distinction between authentic and synthetic media is increasingly blurred, challenging the integrity of online information. In this study, we present CONVEX, a large-scale dataset of multimodal misinformation involving miscaptioned, edited, and AI-generated visual content, comprising over 150K multimodal posts with associated notes and engagement metrics from X's Community Notes. We analyze how multimodal misinformation evolves in terms of virality, engagement, and consensus dynamics, with a focus on synthetic media. Our results show that while AI-generated content achieves disproportionate virality, its spread is driven primarily by passive engagement rather than active discourse. Despite slower initial reporting, AI-generated content reaches community consensus more quickly once flagged. Moreover, our evaluation of specialized detectors and vision-language models reveals a consistent decline in performance over time in distinguishing synthetic from authentic images as generative models evolve. These findings highlight the need for continuous monitoring and adaptive strategies in the rapidly evolving digital information environment.

analysis.tldr: 构建大规模多模态虚假信息数据集CONVEX，发现AI生成内容传播更快但被动参与为主，且检测器性能随时间下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI模糊了真实与合成媒体的界限，威胁在线信息完整性，但缺乏大规模多模态虚假信息数据集和对其传播与检测动态的系统分析。
analysis.problem: 多模态虚假信息（尤其是AI生成内容）的传播规律、参与模式及检测器时效性退化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI生成内容获得不成比例的病毒式传播，但主要由被动参与驱动而非主动讨论；尽管初始报告较慢，一旦被标记，AI生成内容更快达成社区共识；专用检测器和视觉语言模型区分合成与真实图像的性能随时间持续下降。
analysis.method: 构建CONVEX数据集（15万+多模态帖子，含X社区笔记的标注和参与度指标），分析病毒性、参与度和共识动态，并评估检测器与VLM的时序性能。
contributions: 提出CONVEX大规模多模态虚假信息数据集，涵盖误标注、编辑和AI生成内容。
揭示AI生成内容在病毒传播、参与模式和共识达成上的独特动态。
实证发现检测器性能随生成模型进化而持续下降，强调持续监控的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 在CONVEX数据集上分析病毒性、参与度、共识动态，并评估多个专用检测器和视觉语言模型在区分合成与真实图像上的时序性能。
limitations: 数据集仅来自X平台，可能不泛化到其他社交媒体。
检测器评估限于特定模型，未涵盖所有最新生成模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集规模大且聚焦多模态虚假信息，分析角度新颖，但方法以数据构建和分析为主，技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建大规模多模态虚假信息数据集CONVEX，发现AI生成内容传播更快但被动参与为主，且检测器性能随时间下降。

papers.title: Do We Still Need Humans in the Loop? Comparing Human and LLM Annotation in Active Learning for Hostility Detection
papers.abstract: Instruction-tuned LLMs can annotate thousands of instances from a short prompt at negligible cost. This raises two questions for active learning (AL): can LLM labels replace human labels within the AL loop, and does AL remain necessary when entire corpora can be labelled at once? We investigate both questions on a new dataset of 277,902 German political TikTok comments (25,974 LLM-labelled, 5,000 human-annotated), comparing seven annotation strategies across four encoders to detect anti-immigrant hostility. A classifier trained on 25,974 GPT-5.2 labels (\$43) achieves comparable F1-Macro to one trained on 3,800 human annotations (\$316). Active learning offers little advantage over random sampling in our pre-enriched pool and delivers lower F1 than full LLM annotation at the same cost. However, comparable aggregate F1 masks a systematic difference in error structure: LLM-trained classifiers over-predict the positive class relative to the human gold standard. This divergence concentrates in topically ambiguous discussions where the distinction between anti-immigrant hostility and policy critique is most subtle, suggesting that annotation strategy should be guided not by aggregate F1 alone but by the error profile acceptable for the target application.

analysis.tldr: LLM标注在主动学习中可替代人工，但需注意错误结构差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 主动学习依赖人工标注成本高，而指令微调LLM能以极低成本标注大量数据，因此需要探究LLM标注能否替代人工标注，以及主动学习是否仍有必要。
analysis.problem: 比较LLM标注与人工标注在主动学习中的效果，并分析LLM标注的错误结构差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM训练的分类器在总体F1上与人工标注相当，但系统性过度预测正类，错误集中在主题模糊的讨论中。
analysis.method: 在德国政治TikTok评论数据集上，比较七种标注策略（包括人工、LLM、主动学习等）训练四个编码器检测敌对言论。
contributions: 证明LLM标注能以更低成本达到与人工标注相当的总体F1。
揭示LLM标注与人工标注在错误结构上的系统性差异，强调应用场景需考虑错误分布。
analysis.experiments: 在277,902条德国政治TikTok评论上实验，其中25,974条LLM标注，5,000条人工标注，比较七种标注策略。
limitations: 仅针对德语政治评论和敌对检测任务，泛化性未知。
