analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，但实验设计扎实，揭示了LLM标注的偏差问题，对主动学习实践有指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM标注在主动学习中可替代人工，但需注意错误结构差异。

papers.title: Beyond Conservative Automated Driving in Multi-Agent Scenarios via Coupled Model Predictive Control and Deep Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Automated driving at unsignalized intersections is challenging due to complex multi-vehicle interactions and the need to balance safety and efficiency. Model Predictive Control (MPC) offers structured constraint handling through optimization but relies on hand-crafted rules that often produce overly conservative behavior. Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) learns adaptive behaviors from experience but often struggles with safety assurance and generalization to unseen environments. In this study, we present an integrated MPC-RL framework to improve navigation performance in multi-agent scenarios. Experiments show that MPC-RL outperforms standalone MPC and end-to-end RL across three traffic-density levels. Collectively, MPC-RL reduces the collision rate by 21% and improves the success rate by 6.5% compared to pure MPC. We further evaluate zero-shot transfer to a highway merging scenario without retraining. Both MPC-based methods transfer substantially better than end-to-end PPO, which highlights the role of the MPC backbone in cross-scenario robustness. The framework also shows faster loss stabilization than end-to-end RL during training, which indicates a reduced learning burden. These results suggest that the integrated approach can improve the balance between safety performance and efficiency in multi-agent intersection scenarios, while the MPC component provides a strong foundation for generalization across driving environments. The implementation code is available open-source.

analysis.tldr: 提出MPC与深度强化学习耦合框架，在无信号交叉口多车场景中平衡安全与效率，碰撞率降低21%，成功率提升6.5%。
analysis.research_motivation: 无信号交叉口自动驾驶面临复杂多车交互，传统MPC依赖手工规则导致行为保守，深度RL虽能学习自适应行为但安全保证和泛化能力不足，亟需结合两者优势的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在多智能体场景中同时保证自动驾驶的安全性和效率，并提升跨场景泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出MPC与深度RL的耦合框架，在无信号交叉口多车场景中优于单独MPC和端到端RL。

papers.title: GeoAgentBench: A Dynamic Execution Benchmark for Tool-Augmented Agents in Spatial Analysis
papers.abstract: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into Geographic Information Systems (GIS) marks a paradigm shift toward autonomous spatial analysis. However, evaluating these LLM-based agents remains challenging due to the complex, multi-step nature of geospatial workflows. Existing benchmarks primarily rely on static text or code matching, neglecting dynamic runtime feedback and the multimodal nature of spatial outputs. To address this gap, we introduce GeoAgentBench (GABench), a dynamic and interactive evaluation benchmark tailored for tool-augmented GIS agents. GABench provides a realistic execution sandbox integrating 117 atomic GIS tools, encompassing 53 typical spatial analysis tasks across 6 core GIS domains. Recognizing that precise parameter configuration is the primary determinant of execution success in dynamic GIS environments, we designed the Parameter Execution Accuracy (PEA) metric, which utilizes a "Last-Attempt Alignment" strategy to quantify the fidelity of implicit parameter inference. Complementing this, a Vision-Language Model (VLM) based verification is proposed to assess data-spatial accuracy and cartographic style adherence. Furthermore, to address the frequent task failures caused by parameter misalignments and runtime anomalies, we developed a novel agent architecture, Plan-and-React, that mimics expert cognitive workflows by decoupling global orchestration from step-wise reactive execution. Extensive experiments with seven representative LLMs demonstrate that the Plan-and-React paradigm significantly outperforms traditional frameworks, achieving the optimal balance between logical rigor and execution robustness, particularly in multi-step reasoning and error recovery. Our findings highlight current capability boundaries and establish a robust standard for assessing and advancing the next generation of autonomous GeoAI.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态执行基准GeoAgentBench和Plan-and-React架构，用于评估和增强LLM在GIS空间分析中的工具使用能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准依赖静态文本或代码匹配，忽略动态运行时反馈和空间输出的多模态特性，无法有效评估LLM在复杂地理空间工作流中的表现。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能够动态评估工具增强型GIS代理在真实空间分析任务中执行准确性和鲁棒性的基准。

analysis.method: 提出GeoAgentBench动态交互基准，包含117个原子GIS工具和53个典型任务；设计参数执行准确率（PEA）指标和VLM验证方法；提出Plan-and-React代理架构，解耦全局编排与逐步反应执行。

提出参数执行准确率（PEA）指标和VLM验证方法，量化隐式参数推断和空间准确性。
开发Plan-and-React架构，通过解耦全局规划与反应执行提升多步推理和错误恢复能力。
analysis.experiments: 在7个代表性LLM上进行了实验，Plan-and-React显著优于传统框架，在多步推理和错误恢复中表现最佳。
limitations: 基准任务可能未覆盖所有GIS应用场景。

papers.title: Context Sensitivity Improves Human-Machine Visual Alignment
papers.abstract: Modern machine learning models typically represent inputs as fixed points in a high-dimensional embedding space. While this approach has been proven powerful for a wide range of downstream tasks, it fundamentally differs from the way humans process information. Because humans are constantly adapting to their environment, they represent objects and their relationships in a highly context-sensitive manner. To address this gap, we propose a method for context-sensitive similarity computation from neural network embeddings, applied to modeling a triplet odd-one-out task with an anchor image serving as simultaneous context. Modeling context enables us to achieve up to a 15% improvement in odd-one-out accuracy over a context-insensitive model. We find that this improvement is consistent across both original and "human-aligned" vision foundation models.

analysis.tldr: 通过上下文敏感相似度计算提升人机视觉对齐，在odd-one-out任务上准确率提升15%。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前机器学习模型将输入表示为高维嵌入空间中的固定点，与人类高度上下文敏感的信息处理方式存在根本差异，导致人机视觉对齐不足。

contributions: 提出上下文敏感相似度计算方法，提升人机视觉对齐。

papers.title: SmoGVLM: A Small, Graph-enhanced Vision-Language Model
papers.abstract: Large vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong performance on multimodal tasks but often suffer from hallucination and poor grounding in knowledge-intensive reasoning. We propose SmoGVLM, a small, graph-enhanced VLM that integrates structured knowledge with visual and textual modalities, using Graph Neural Networks. We investigate the effects of our method across a range of model sizes, from tiny (1.3B) to large (13B) models. Our results demonstrate that, when trained using our approach, a small model can achieve performance gains upto 16.24%, and surpass its larger counterparts, outperforming larger VLMs and strong fine-tuned baselines. These results highlight the potential of structured knowledge augmentation for efficient, smaller-scale multimodal reasoning systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出SmoGVLM，一种小规模图增强视觉语言模型，通过图神经网络融合结构化知识，在多个规模上提升性能，小模型可超越大模型。

papers.title: Evaluating Supervised Machine Learning Models: Principles, Pitfalls, and Metric Selection
papers.abstract: The evaluation of supervised machine learning models is a critical stage in the development of reliable predictive systems. Despite the widespread availability of machine learning libraries and automated workflows, model assessment is often reduced to the reporting of a small set of aggregate metrics, which can lead to misleading conclusions about real-world performance. This paper examines the principles, challenges, and practical considerations involved in evaluating supervised learning algorithms across classification and regression tasks. In particular, it discusses how evaluation outcomes are influenced by dataset characteristics, validation design, class imbalance, asymmetric error costs, and the choice of performance metrics. Through a series of controlled experimental scenarios using diverse benchmark datasets, the study highlights common pitfalls such as the accuracy paradox, data leakage, inappropriate metric selection, and overreliance on scalar summary measures. The paper also compares alternative validation strategies and emphasizes the importance of aligning model evaluation with the intended operational objective of the task. By presenting evaluation as a decision-oriented and context-dependent process, this work provides a structured foundation for selecting metrics and validation protocols that support statistically sound, robust, and trustworthy supervised machine learning systems.

analysis.tldr: 系统梳理监督学习模型评估中的原则、常见陷阱与度量选择，强调评估应面向决策目标。

papers.title: PostureObjectstitch: Anomaly Image Generation Considering Assembly Relationships in Industrial Scenarios
papers.abstract: Image generation technology can synthesize condition-specific images to supplement real-world industrial anomaly data and enhance anomaly detection model performance. Existing generation techniques rarely account for the pose and orientation of industrial components in assembly, making the generated images difficult to utilize for downstream application. To solve this, we propose a novel image synthesis approach, called PostureObjectStitch, that achieves accurate generation to meet the requirement of industrial assembly. A condition decoupling approach is introduced to separate input multi-view images into high-frequency, texture, and RGB features. The feature temporal modulation mechanism adapts these features across diffusion model time-steps, enabling progressive generation from coarse to fine details while maintaining consistency. To ensure semantic accuracy, we introduce a conditional loss that enhances critical industrial elements and a geometric prior that guides component positioning for correct assembly relationships. Comprehensive experimental results on the MureCom dataset, our newly contributed DreamAssembly dataset, and the downstream application validate the outstanding performance of our method.

analysis.tldr: 提出PostureObjectStitch方法，通过条件解耦和几何先验生成符合装配关系的工业异常图像。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像生成技术未考虑工业组件在装配中的位姿和朝向，导致生成的图像难以用于下游异常检测任务。

papers.title: Any3DAvatar: Fast and High-Quality Full-Head 3D Avatar Reconstruction from Single Portrait Image
papers.abstract: Reconstructing a complete 3D head from a single portrait remains challenging because existing methods still face a sharp quality-speed trade-off: high-fidelity pipelines often rely on multi-stage processing and per-subject optimization, while fast feed-forward models struggle with complete geometry and fine appearance details. To bridge this gap, we propose Any3DAvatar, a fast and high-quality method for single-image 3D Gaussian head avatar generation, whose fastest setting reconstructs a full head in under one second while preserving high-fidelity geometry and texture. First, we build AnyHead, a unified data suite that combines identity diversity, dense multi-view supervision, and realistic accessories, filling the main gaps of existing head data in coverage, full-head geometry, and complex appearance. Second, rather than sampling unstructured noise, we initialize from a Plücker-aware structured 3D Gaussian scaffold and perform one-step conditional denoising, formulating full-head reconstruction into a single forward pass while retaining high fidelity. Third, we introduce auxiliary view-conditioned appearance supervision on the same latent tokens alongside 3D Gaussian reconstruction, improving novel-view texture details at zero extra inference cost. Experiments show that Any3DAvatar outperforms prior single-image full-head reconstruction methods in rendering fidelity while remaining substantially faster.

analysis.tldr: Any3DAvatar 从单张肖像图像快速重建高质量全头 3D 高斯头像，速度最快不到一秒。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有单图全头 3D 重建方法在质量和速度之间存在尖锐权衡：高保真管线依赖多阶段处理和逐对象优化，而快速前馈模型难以处理完整几何和精细外观细节。
analysis.problem: 如何从单张肖像图像快速重建高保真全头 3D 高斯头像，同时兼顾几何完整性和外观细节。

limitations: 可能对极端姿态或遮挡的鲁棒性有限。

papers.title: MCPThreatHive: Automated Threat Intelligence for Model Context Protocol Ecosystems
papers.abstract: The rapid proliferation of Model Context Protocol (MCP)-based agentic systems has introduced a new category of security threats that existing frameworks are inadequately equipped to address. We present MCPThreatHive, an open-source platform that automates the end-to-end lifecycle of MCP threat intelligence: from continuous, multi-source data collection through AI-driven threat extraction and classification, to structured knowledge graph storage and interactive visualization. The platform operationalizes the MCP-38 threat taxonomy, a curated set of 38 MCP-specific threat patterns mapped to STRIDE, OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications, and OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications. A composite risk scoring model provides quantitative prioritization. Through a comparative analysis of representative existing MCP security tools, we identify three critical coverage gaps that MCPThreatHive addresses: incomplete compositional attack modeling, absence of continuous threat intelligence, and lack of unified multi-framework classification.

analysis.tldr: 提出MCPThreatHive平台，自动化MCP生态系统的威胁情报生命周期，填补现有安全工具在组合攻击建模、持续威胁情报和统一多框架分类方面的空白。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于MCP的智能体系统快速普及，带来了新型安全威胁，但现有框架应对不足，缺乏自动化、持续且多框架统一的威胁情报平台。
analysis.problem: 现有MCP安全工具存在三个关键覆盖缺口：不完整的组合攻击建模、缺乏持续威胁情报、缺少统一的多框架分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建开源平台MCPThreatHive，实现从多源数据持续收集、AI驱动的威胁提取与分类、结构化知识图谱存储到交互式可视化的端到端自动化流程，并集成MCP-38威胁分类法和复合风险评分模型。
contributions: 提出MCP-38威胁分类法，包含38种MCP特定威胁模式，并映射到STRIDE、OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications和OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications。

papers.title: SparseBalance: Load-Balanced Long Context Training with Dynamic Sparse Attention
papers.abstract: While sparse attention mitigates the computational bottleneck of long-context LLM training, its distributed training process exhibits extreme heterogeneity in both \textit{1)} sequence length and \textit{2)} sparsity sensitivity, leading to a severe imbalance problem and sub-optimal model accuracy. Existing algorithms and training frameworks typically focus on single issue, failing to systematically co-optimize these two problems. Therefore, we propose SparseBalance, a novel algorithm-system co-design framework, which exploits the sparsity and sequence heterogeneity to optimize model accuracy and system efficiency jointly. First, we propose workload-aware dynamic sparsity tuning, which employs a bidirectional sparsity adjustment to eliminate stragglers and exploit inherent bubbles for free accuracy. Second, we propose a sparsity-aware batching strategy to achieve coarse-grained balance, which complements dynamic sparsity tuning. Experimental results demonstrate that SparseBalance achieves up to a 1.33$\times$ end-to-end speedup while still improving the long-context capability by 0.46\% on the LongBench benchmark.

analysis.tldr: 提出算法-系统协同设计框架SparseBalance，通过动态稀疏注意力实现长上下文训练负载均衡，兼顾加速与精度提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文LLM训练中稀疏注意力虽能缓解计算瓶颈，但分布式训练存在序列长度和稀疏敏感性的极端异质性，导致严重负载不均和次优模型精度，现有方法未能系统协同优化这两个问题。
analysis.problem: 解决长上下文稀疏注意力分布式训练中因序列长度和稀疏敏感性异质性导致的负载不均和模型精度下降问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出分布式训练中序列长度和稀疏敏感性存在极端异质性，导致负载不均和次优精度。
analysis.method: 提出算法-系统协同设计框架SparseBalance，包含两个组件：1）工作负载感知的动态稀疏度调整（双向调整消除落后者并利用固有气泡提升精度）；2）稀疏感知的批处理策略（实现粗粒度均衡，补充动态稀疏度调整）。
contributions: 提出SparseBalance算法-系统协同设计框架，联合优化模型精度和系统效率。
提出工作负载感知的动态稀疏度调整和稀疏感知的批处理策略，实现细粒度和粗粒度负载均衡。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明SparseBalance在LongBench基准上实现高达1.33倍端到端加速，同时长上下文能力提升0.46%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定稀疏注意力模式或模型架构。
动态稀疏度调整可能引入额外开销，需进一步验证可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.

papers.title: DiffMagicFace: Identity Consistent Facial Editing of Real Videos
papers.abstract: Text-conditioned image editing has greatly benefitted from the advancements in Image Diffusion Models. However, extending these techniques to facial video editing introduces challenges in preserving facial identity throughout the source video and ensuring consistency of the edited subject across frames. In this paper, we introduce DiffMagicFace, a unique video editing framework that integrates two fine-tuned models for text and image control. These models operate concurrently during inference to produce video frames that maintain identity features while seamlessly aligning with the editing semantics. To ensure the consistency of the edited videos, we develop a dataset comprising images showcasing various facial perspectives for each edited subject. The creation of a data set is achieved through rendering techniques and the subsequent application of optimization algorithms. Remarkably, our approach does not depend on video datasets but still delivers high-quality results in both consistency and content. The excellent effect holds even for complex tasks like talking head videos and distinguishing closely related categories. The videos edited using our framework exhibit parity with videos that are made using traditional rendering software. Through comparative analysis with current state-of-the-art methods, our framework demonstrates superior performance in both visual appeal and quantitative metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需视频数据集的视频面部编辑框架，通过双模型并行推理保持身份一致性和编辑语义对齐。

papers.title: A Resource-Efficient Hybrid CNN-LSTM network for image-based bean leaf disease classification
papers.abstract: Accurate and resource-efficient automated diagnosis is a cornerstone of modern agricultural expert systems. While Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have established benchmarks in plant pathology, their ability to capture long-range spatial dependencies is often limited by standard pooling layers, and their high memory footprint hinders deployment on portable devices. This paper proposes a lightweight hybrid CNN-LSTM system for bean leaf disease classification. By integrating an LSTM layer to model the spatial-sequential relationships within feature maps, our hybrid architecture achieves a 94.38% accuracy while maintaining an exceptionally small footprint of 1.86 MB; a 70% reduction in size compared to traditional CNN-based systems. Furthermore, we provide a systematic evaluation of image augmentation strategies, demonstrating that tailored transformations are superior to generic combinations for maintaining the integrity of diagnostic patterns. Results on the $\textit{ibean}$ dataset confirm that the proposed system achieves state-of-the-art F1 scores of 99.22% with EfficientNet-B7+LSTM, providing a robust and scalable framework for real-time agricultural decision support in resource-constrained environments. The code and augmented datasets used in this study are publicly available on this $\href{https://github.com/HJin-R/bean_disease}{Github}$ repo.

papers.title: Applied Explainability for Large Language Models: A Comparative Study
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across many natural language processing tasks, yet their decision processes remain difficult to interpret. This lack of transparency creates challenges for trust, debugging, and deployment in real-world systems. This paper presents an applied comparative study of three explainability techniques: Integrated Gradients, Attention Rollout, and SHAP, on a fine-tuned DistilBERT model for SST-2 sentiment classification. Rather than proposing new methods, the focus is on evaluating the practical behavior of existing approaches under a consistent and reproducible setup. The results show that gradient-based attribution provides more stable and intuitive explanations, while attention-based methods are computationally efficient but less aligned with prediction-relevant features. Model-agnostic approaches offer flexibility but introduce higher computational cost and variability. This work highlights key trade-offs between explainability methods and emphasizes their role as diagnostic tools rather than definitive explanations. The findings provide practical insights for researchers and engineers working with transformer-based NLP systems. This is a preprint and has not undergone peer review.

analysis.tldr: 比较三种可解释性方法在LLM上的实际表现，发现梯度归因更稳定，注意力方法高效但相关性弱。

papers.title: Sentiment analysis for software engineering: How far can zero-shot learning (ZSL) go?
papers.abstract: Sentiment analysis in software engineering focuses on understanding emotions expressed in software artifacts. Previous research highlighted the limitations of applying general off-the-shelf sentiment analysis tools within the software engineering domain and indicated the need for specialized tools tailored to various software engineering contexts. The development of such tools heavily relies on supervised machine learning techniques that necessitate annotated datasets. Acquiring such datasets is a substantial challenge, as it requires domain-specific expertise and significant effort. Objective: This study explores the potential of ZSL to address the scarcity of annotated datasets in sentiment analysis within software engineering Method:} We conducted an empirical experiment to evaluate the performance of various ZSL techniques, including embedding-based, NLI-based, TARS-based, and generative-based ZSL techniques. We assessed the performance of these techniques under different labels setups to examine the impact of label configurations. Additionally, we compared the results of the ZSL techniques with state-of-the-art fine-tuned transformer-based models. Finally, we performed an error analysis to identify the primary causes of misclassifications. Results: Our findings demonstrate that ZSL techniques, particularly those combining expert-curated labels with embedding-based or generative-based models, can achieve macro-F1 scores comparable to fine-tuned transformer-based models. The error analysis revealed that subjectivity in annotation and polar facts are the main contributors to ZSL misclassifications. Conclusion: This study demonstrates the potential of ZSL for sentiment analysis in software engineering. ZSL can provide a solution to the challenge of annotated dataset scarcity by reducing reliance on annotated dataset.

papers.title: Cognitive Offloading in Agile Teams: How Artificial Intelligence Reshapes Risk Assessment and Planning Quality
papers.abstract: Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) have shown promise in automating key aspects of Agile project management, yet their impact on team cognition remains underexplored. In this work, we investigate cognitive offloading in Agile sprint planning by conducting a controlled, three-condition experiment comparing AI-only, human-only, and hybrid planning models on a live client deliverable at a mid-sized digital agency. Using quantitative metrics -- including estimation accuracy, rework rates, and scope change recovery time -- alongside qualitative indicators of planning robustness, we evaluate each model's effectiveness beyond raw efficiency. We find that while AI-only planning minimizes time and cost, it significantly degrades risk capture rates and increases rework due to unstated assumptions, whereas human-only planning excels at adaptability but incurs substantial overhead. Drawing on these findings, we propose a theoretical framework for hybrid AI-human sprint planning that assigns algorithmic tools to estimation and backlog formatting while mandating human deliberation for risk assessment and ambiguity resolution. Our results challenge the assumption that efficiency equates to effectiveness, offering actionable governance strategies for organizations seeking to augment rather than erode team cognition.

papers.title: AlphaCNOT: Learning CNOT Minimization with Model-Based Planning
papers.abstract: Quantum circuit optimization is a central task in Quantum Computing, as current Noisy Intermediate Scale Quantum devices suffer from error propagation that often scales with the number of operations. Among quantum operations, the CNOT gate is of fundamental importance, being the only 2-qubit gate in the universal Clifford+T set. The problem of CNOT gates minimization has been addressed by heuristic algorithms such as the well-known Patel-Markov-Hayes (PMH) for linear reversible synthesis (i.e., CNOT minimization with no topological constraints), and more recently by Reinforcement Learning (RL) based strategies in the more complex case of topology-aware synthesis, where each CNOT can act on a subset of all qubits pairs. In this work we introduce AlphaCNOT, a RL framework based on Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) that address effectively the CNOT minimization problem by modeling it as a planning problem. In contrast to other RL- based solution, our method is model-based, i.e. it can leverage lookahead search to evaluate future trajectories, thus finding more efficient sequences of CNOTs. Our method achieves a reduction of up to 32% in CNOT gate count compared to PMH baseline on linear reversible synthesis, while in the constraint version we report a consistent gate count reduction on a variety of topologies with up to 8 qubits, with respect to state-of-the-art RL-based solutions. Our results suggest the combination of RL with search-based strategies can be applied to different circuit optimization tasks, such as Clifford minimization, thus fostering the transition toward the "quantum utility" era.

analysis.tldr: AlphaCNOT 使用基于模型的蒙特卡洛树搜索强化学习框架，在 CNOT 门最小化任务上比现有方法减少最多 32% 的门数。
analysis.research_motivation: 量子电路优化对当前噪声中等规模量子设备至关重要，因为错误传播通常随操作数量增加；CNOT 门作为通用 Clifford+T 集合中唯一的双量子比特门，其最小化是核心问题，但现有启发式算法和强化学习方法在拓扑约束下效率有限。
analysis.problem: 在无拓扑约束（线性可逆综合）和拓扑感知综合两种场景下，最小化量子电路中的 CNOT 门数量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于蒙特卡洛树搜索的模型强化学习框架，将 CNOT 最小化建模为规划问题，利用前瞻搜索评估未来轨迹以找到更高效的 CNOT 序列。
contributions: 提出 AlphaCNOT，首个将模型强化学习与蒙特卡洛树搜索结合用于 CNOT 最小化的方法。
在无约束线性可逆综合中，相比 PMH 基线减少最多 32% 的 CNOT 门数；在拓扑约束下，在多种拓扑上（最多 8 量子比特）一致优于现有强化学习方法。
analysis.experiments: 在无约束线性可逆综合任务上，与 PMH 基线对比，报告了最多 32% 的 CNOT 门数减少；在拓扑约束版本中，在多种拓扑上（最多 8 量子比特）与最先进的强化学习解决方案对比，报告了一致的门数减少。
limitations: 实验仅涉及最多 8 量子比特的拓扑，更大规模量子比特上的性能未知。
方法可能对搜索深度和计算资源敏感，实际部署成本未讨论。

papers.title: Gaslight, Gatekeep, V1-V3: Early Visual Cortex Alignment Shields Vision-Language Models from Sycophantic Manipulation
papers.abstract: Vision-language models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings, yet their susceptibility to sycophantic manipulation remains poorly understood, particularly in relation to how these models represent visual information internally. Whether models whose visual representations more closely mirror human neural processing are also more resistant to adversarial pressure is an open question with implications for both neuroscience and AI safety. We investigate this question by evaluating 12 open-weight vision-language models spanning 6 architecture families and a 40$\times$ parameter range (256M--10B) along two axes: brain alignment, measured by predicting fMRI responses from the Natural Scenes Dataset across 8 human subjects and 6 visual cortex regions of interest, and sycophancy, measured through 76,800 two-turn gaslighting prompts spanning 5 categories and 10 difficulty levels. Region-of-interest analysis reveals that alignment specifically in early visual cortex (V1--V3) is a reliable negative predictor of sycophancy ($r = -0.441$, BCa 95\% CI $[-0.740, -0.031]$), with all 12 leave-one-out correlations negative and the strongest effect for existence denial attacks ($r = -0.597$, $p = 0.040$). This anatomically specific relationship is absent in higher-order category-selective regions, suggesting that faithful low-level visual encoding provides a measurable anchor against adversarial linguistic override in vision-language models. We release our code on \href{https://github.com/aryashah2k/Gaslight-Gatekeep-Sycophantic-Manipulation}{GitHub} and dataset on \href{https://huggingface.co/datasets/aryashah00/Gaslight-Gatekeep-V1-V3}{Hugging Face}

analysis.tldr: 早期视觉皮层对齐度越高，VLM越不易受谄媚操纵。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在高风险场景中部署，但其对谄媚操纵的脆弱性及内部视觉表征的影响尚不明确，尤其缺乏与人类神经处理的对比研究。
analysis.problem: 探究VLM的视觉表征与人类早期视觉皮层对齐程度是否与其对谄媚操纵的抵抗力相关。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 早期视觉皮层（V1-V3）的对齐度是谄媚行为的可靠负预测因子，而高级类别选择区域无此关系。
analysis.method: 评估12个开源VLM在脑对齐（fMRI预测）和谄媚（两轮gaslighting提示）两个维度上的表现，进行区域兴趣分析。
contributions: 发现早期视觉皮层对齐度与VLM谄媚行为呈显著负相关。
构建了包含76,800个两轮gaslighting提示的数据集和评估框架。
analysis.experiments: 在12个VLM、6个架构家族、参数范围256M-10B上评估，使用8名人类受试者的fMRI数据和6个视觉皮层ROI，共76,800个提示。
limitations: 相关性不等于因果性，未进行干预实验。
仅评估了开放权重的VLM，可能不适用于闭源模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合神经科学与AI安全，实验充分，对VLM安全对齐有重要启示。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 早期视觉皮层对齐度越高，VLM越不易受谄媚操纵。

papers.title: DRG-Font: Dynamic Reference-Guided Few-shot Font Generation via Contrastive Style-Content Disentanglement
papers.abstract: Few-shot Font Generation aims to generate stylistically consistent glyphs from a few reference glyphs. However, capturing complex font styles from a few exemplars remains challenging, and the existing methods often struggle to retain discernible local characteristics in generated samples. This paper introduces DRG-Font, a contrastive font generation strategy that learns complex glyph attributes by decomposing style and content embedding spaces. For optimal style supervision, the proposed architecture incorporates a Reference Selection (RS) Module to dynamically select the best style reference from an available pool of candidates. The network learns to decompose glyph attributes into style and shape priors through a Multi-scale Style Head Block (MSHB) and a Multi-scale Content Head Block (MCHB). For style adaptation, a Multi-Fusion Upsampling Block (MFUB) produces the target glyph by combining the reference style prior and target content prior. The proposed method demonstrates significant improvements over state-of-the-art approaches across multiple visual and analytical benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出DRG-Font，通过对比学习解耦风格与内容，并动态选择参考字体，实现少样本字体生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 少样本字体生成中，从少量参考样本捕获复杂字体风格并保留局部特征仍具挑战，现有方法生成样本常丢失可辨别的局部细节。
analysis.problem: 如何从少量参考字体中有效解耦风格与内容，并动态选择最优风格参考以生成风格一致且保留局部特征的字体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法难以从少量样本中捕获复杂字体风格，生成样本常丢失局部特征。
analysis.method: 提出DRG-Font，包含参考选择模块（RS）动态选择最佳风格参考，多尺度风格头块（MSHB）和多尺度内容头块（MCHB）解耦风格与形状先验，多融合上采样块（MFUB）融合风格与内容先验生成目标字形。
contributions: 提出对比风格-内容解耦的少样本字体生成框架DRG-Font。
设计参考选择模块动态选取最优风格参考。
多尺度头块实现风格与内容的解耦表示。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在多个视觉和分析基准上优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖参考池的质量和多样性。
解耦过程可能对极端风格或复杂字形泛化不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法设计有创新性（动态参考选择、多尺度解耦），但摘要未提供具体实验结果，影响评分保守。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DRG-Font，通过对比学习解耦风格与内容，并动态选择参考字体，实现少样本字体生成。

papers.title: Artificial intelligence application in lymphoma diagnosis with Vision Transformer using weakly supervised training
papers.abstract: Vision transformers (ViT) have been shown to allow for more flexible feature detection and can outperform convolutional neural network (CNN) when pre-trained on sufficient data. Due to their promising feature detection capabilities, we deployed ViTs for morphological classification of anaplastic large cell lymphoma (ALCL) versus classic Hodgkin lymphoma (cHL). We had previously designed a ViT model which was trained on a small dataset of 1,200 image patches in fully supervised training. That model achieved a diagnostic accuracy of 100% and an F1 score of 1.0 on the independent test set. Since fully supervised training is not a practical method due to lack of expertise resources in both the training and testing phases, we conducted a recent study on a modified approach to training data (weakly supervised training) and show that labeling training image patch automatically at the slide level of each whole-slide-image is a more practical solution for clinical use of Vision Transformer. Our ViT model, trained on a larger dataset of 100,000 image patches, yields evaluation metrics with significant accuracy, F1 score, and area under the curve (AUC) at 91.85%, 0.92, and 0.98, respectively. These are respectable values that qualify this ViT model, with weakly supervised training, as a suitable tool for a deep learning module in clinical model development using automated image patch extraction.

analysis.tldr: 弱监督训练的Vision Transformer在淋巴瘤诊断中达到91.85%准确率，优于全监督训练的实际可行性。
analysis.research_motivation: 全监督训练需要大量专家标注资源，在临床实践中不可行；弱监督训练可自动从全切片图像级别生成图像块标签，更实用。
analysis.problem: 如何利用弱监督训练方法，使Vision Transformer在淋巴瘤诊断中达到临床可用的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全监督ViT在小数据集上取得100%准确率，但弱监督训练在更大数据集上仍能获得91.85%准确率，表明弱监督方法在降低标注成本的同时保持了较高性能。
analysis.method: 采用弱监督训练，自动从全切片图像级别为图像块分配标签，训练ViT模型进行间变性大细胞淋巴瘤与经典霍奇金淋巴瘤的形态学分类。
contributions: 提出弱监督训练方法用于ViT的淋巴瘤诊断，解决了全监督训练标注成本高的问题。
在10万图像块数据集上验证了弱监督ViT的临床可行性，准确率91.85%，AUC 0.98。
analysis.experiments: 在10万图像块数据集上训练ViT，评估指标包括准确率91.85%、F1分数0.92、AUC 0.98。
limitations: 仅针对两种淋巴瘤亚型，泛化性待验证。
弱监督训练可能引入标签噪声，影响模型上限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 弱监督ViT在医学图像分类中有应用价值，但方法相对简单，实验规模中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 弱监督训练的Vision Transformer在淋巴瘤诊断中达到91.85%准确率，优于全监督训练的实际可行性。

papers.title: From Synchrony to Sequence: Exo-to-Ego Generation via Interpolation
papers.abstract: Exo-to-Ego video generation aims to synthesize a first-person video from a synchronized third-person view and corresponding camera poses. While paired supervision is available, synchronized exo-ego data inherently introduces substantial spatio-temporal and geometric discontinuities, violating the smooth-motion assumptions of standard video generation benchmarks. We identify this synchronization-induced jump as the central challenge and propose Syn2Seq-Forcing, a sequential formulation that interpolates between the source and target videos to form a single continuous signal. By reframing Exo2Ego as sequential signal modeling rather than a conventional condition-output task, our approach enables diffusion-based sequence models, e.g. Diffusion Forcing Transformers (DFoT), to capture coherent transitions across frames more effectively. Empirically, we show that interpolating only the videos, without performing pose interpolation already produces significant improvements, emphasizing that the dominant difficulty arises from spatio-temporal discontinuities. Beyond immediate performance gains, this formulation establishes a general and flexible framework capable of unifying both Exo2Ego and Ego2Exo generation within a single continuous sequence model, providing a principled foundation for future research in cross-view video synthesis.

analysis.tldr: 提出Syn2Seq-Forcing方法，将外视角到第一视角视频生成转化为序列插值问题，有效缓解时空不连续性。
analysis.research_motivation: 外视角到第一视角视频生成中，同步数据存在严重的时空与几何不连续性，违背了标准视频生成的平滑运动假设，现有方法难以处理。
analysis.problem: 如何解决同步外-第一视角数据中的时空不连续性，实现高质量的外到第一视角视频生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同步外-第一视角数据存在固有的时空与几何跳跃，导致标准视频生成模型失效；仅对视频进行插值而不进行姿态插值即可显著提升效果，表明主要困难来自时空不连续性。
analysis.method: 提出Syn2Seq-Forcing，将外到第一视角生成重新定义为源视频与目标视频之间的序列插值问题，形成连续信号，并采用扩散强制变换器（DFoT）进行建模。
contributions: 识别出同步外-第一视角数据中的时空不连续性是核心挑战，并提出Syn2Seq-Forcing方法将其转化为序列插值问题。
实验证明仅视频插值即可显著提升性能，且该方法可统一外到第一视角和第一视角到外视角生成。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的外-第一视角同步数据，数据获取成本高。
方法在极端视角变化或快速运动场景下的效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，将问题重新定义为序列插值，但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Syn2Seq-Forcing方法，将外视角到第一视角视频生成转化为序列插值问题，有效缓解时空不连续性。

papers.title: PBE-UNet: A light weight Progressive Boundary-Enhanced U-Net with Scale-Aware Aggregation for Ultrasound Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Accurate lesion segmentation in ultrasound images is essential for preventive screening and clinical diagnosis, yet remains challenging due to low contrast, blurry boundaries, and significant scale variations. Although existing deep learning-based methods have achieved remarkable performance, these methods still struggle with scale variations and indistinct tumor boundaries. To address these challenges, we propose a progressive boundary enhanced U-Net (PBE-UNet). Specially, we first introduce a scale-aware aggregation module (SAAM) that dynamically adjusts its receptive field to capture robust multi-scale contextual information. Then, we propose a boundary-guided feature enhancement (BGFE) module to enhance the feature representations. We find that there are large gaps between the narrow boundary and the wide segmentation error areas. Unlike existing methods that treat boundaries as static masks, the BGFE module progressively expands the narrow boundary prediction into broader spatial attention maps. Thus, broader spatial attention maps could effectively cover the wider segmentation error regions and enhance the model's focus on these challenging areas. We conduct expensive experiments on four benchmark ultrasound datasets, BUSI, Dataset B, TN3K, and BP. The experimental results how that our proposed PBE-UNet outperforms state-of-the-art ultrasound image segmentation methods. The code is at https://github.com/cruelMouth/PBE-UNet.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级渐进边界增强U-Net，通过尺度感知聚合和边界引导特征增强模块提升超声图像分割精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 超声图像分割中低对比度、模糊边界和尺度变化大，现有深度学习方法难以同时处理这些挑战。
analysis.problem: 超声图像中病变区域尺度变化大且边界模糊，导致分割不准确。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 窄边界与宽分割误差区域之间存在较大差距，现有方法将边界视为静态掩码无法覆盖误差区域。
analysis.method: 提出PBE-UNet，包含尺度感知聚合模块（SAAM）动态调整感受野捕获多尺度上下文，以及边界引导特征增强模块（BGFE）将窄边界预测逐步扩展为宽空间注意力图。
contributions: 提出SAAM模块动态捕获多尺度上下文信息
提出BGFE模块渐进扩展边界注意力覆盖分割误差区域
在四个超声基准数据集上达到SOTA性能
analysis.experiments: 在BUSI、Dataset B、TN3K和BP四个超声基准数据集上实验，结果优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能对极端模糊边界仍有限制
仅针对超声图像，泛化性未验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，医学图像分割领域有应用价值，但实验细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级渐进边界增强U-Net，通过尺度感知聚合和边界引导特征增强模块提升超声图像分割精度。

papers.title: Temporally Consistent Long-Term Memory for 3D Single Object Tracking
papers.abstract: 3D Single Object Tracking (3D-SOT) aims to localize a target object across a sequence of LiDAR point clouds, given its 3D bounding box in the first frame. Recent methods have adopted a memory-based approach to utilize previously observed features of the target object, but remain limited to only a few recent frames. This work reveals that their temporal capacity is fundamentally constrained to short-term context due to severe temporal feature inconsistency and excessive memory overhead. To this end, we propose a robust long-term 3D-SOT framework, ChronoTrack, which preserves the temporal feature consistency while efficiently aggregating the diverse target features via long-term memory. Based on a compact set of learnable memory tokens, ChronoTrack leverages long-term information through two complementary objectives: a temporal consistency loss and a memory cycle consistency loss. The former enforces feature alignment across frames, alleviating temporal drift and improving the reliability of proposed long-term memory. In parallel, the latter encourages each token to encode diverse and discriminative target representations observed throughout the sequence via memory-point-memory cyclic walks. As a result, ChronoTrack achieves new state-of-the-art performance on multiple 3D-SOT benchmarks, demonstrating its effectiveness in long-term target modeling with compact memory while running at real-time speed of 42 FPS on a single RTX 4090 GPU. The code is available at https://github.com/ujaejoon/ChronoTrack

analysis.tldr: 提出 ChronoTrack，通过时序一致性和记忆循环一致性损失实现长期记忆的 3D 单目标跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于记忆的 3D 单目标跟踪方法仅利用少数最近帧，受限于短期上下文，原因是时序特征不一致和内存开销过大。
analysis.problem: 如何实现鲁棒的长期 3D 单目标跟踪，同时保持时序特征一致性和高效的内存利用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法的时序容量受限于短期上下文，因为存在严重的时序特征不一致和过度的内存开销。
analysis.method: 提出 ChronoTrack 框架，基于可学习记忆令牌，通过时序一致性损失和记忆循环一致性损失分别实现特征对齐和多样化目标表示编码。
contributions: 揭示了现有 3D-SOT 方法受限于短期上下文的根本原因。
提出了 ChronoTrack，利用长期记忆实现时序一致性和高效特征聚合。
在多个基准上达到 SOTA，且以 42 FPS 实时运行。
analysis.experiments: 在多个 3D-SOT 基准上达到新 SOTA，在 RTX 4090 上以 42 FPS 实时运行。
limitations: 可能对极端遮挡或快速运动场景的鲁棒性有待验证。
记忆令牌的紧凑性可能限制对极长序列的覆盖。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且达到 SOTA，与 3D 视觉方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 ChronoTrack，通过时序一致性和记忆循环一致性损失实现长期记忆的 3D 单目标跟踪。

papers.title: Failure Identification in Imitation Learning Via Statistical and Semantic Filtering
papers.abstract: Imitation learning (IL) policies in robotics deliver strong performance in controlled settings but remain brittle in real-world deployments: rare events such as hardware faults, defective parts, unexpected human actions, or any state that lies outside the training distribution can lead to failed executions. Vision-based Anomaly Detection (AD) methods emerged as an appropriate solution to detect these anomalous failure states but do not distinguish failures from benign deviations. We introduce FIDeL (Failure Identification in Demonstration Learning), a policy-independent failure detection module. Leveraging recent AD methods, FIDeL builds a compact representation of nominal demonstrations and aligns incoming observations via optimal transport matching to produce anomaly scores and heatmaps. Spatio-temporal thresholds are derived with an extension of conformal prediction, and a Vision-Language Model (VLM) performs semantic filtering to discriminate benign anomalies from genuine failures. We also introduce BotFails, a multimodal dataset of real-world tasks for failure detection in robotics. FIDeL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, yielding +5.30% percent AUROC in anomaly detection and +17.38% percent failure-detection accuracy on BotFails compared to existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出FIDeL模块，结合异常检测和VLM语义过滤，提升机器人模仿学习中的故障识别准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 模仿学习策略在真实部署中因硬件故障、异常状态等导致执行失败，现有异常检测方法无法区分故障与良性偏差。
analysis.problem: 如何准确识别模仿学习中的故障状态，同时避免将良性偏差误判为故障。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FIDeL模块：利用异常检测方法构建正常演示的紧凑表示，通过最优传输匹配对齐新观测并生成异常分数和热图；结合共形预测推导时空阈值，并使用视觉语言模型进行语义过滤以区分良性异常与真实故障。
contributions: 提出FIDeL，一种策略无关的故障检测模块，结合统计异常检测与VLM语义过滤。
引入BotFails数据集，用于机器人故障检测的多模态真实世界任务数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在BotFails数据集上，FIDeL在异常检测AUROC上比现有方法提升5.30%，在故障检测准确率上提升17.38%。
limitations: 依赖预训练VLM的语义理解能力，可能受限于VLM的泛化性。
最优传输匹配的计算开销可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法结合统计与语义过滤，创新性较强，实验提升显著，与机器人模仿学习方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FIDeL模块，结合异常检测和VLM语义过滤，提升机器人模仿学习中的故障识别准确率。

papers.title: Soft $Q(λ)$: A multi-step off-policy method for entropy regularised reinforcement learning using eligibility traces
papers.abstract: Soft Q-learning has emerged as a versatile model-free method for entropy-regularised reinforcement learning, optimising for returns augmented with a penalty on the divergence from a reference policy. Despite its success, the multi-step extensions of soft Q-learning remain relatively unexplored and limited to on-policy action sampling under the Boltzmann policy. In this brief research note, we first present a formal $n$-step formulation for soft Q-learning and then extend this framework to the fully off-policy case by introducing a novel Soft Tree Backup operator. Finally, we unify these developments into Soft $Q(λ)$, an elegant online, off-policy, eligibility trace framework that allows for efficient credit assignment under arbitrary behaviour policies. Our derivations propose a model-free method for learning entropy-regularised value functions that can be utilised in future empirical experiments.

analysis.tldr: 提出Soft Q(λ)，将资格迹引入熵正则化强化学习，实现离线多步更新。
analysis.research_motivation: 软Q学习在熵正则化强化学习中表现优异，但其多步扩展研究不足，且现有方法局限于在线策略采样。
analysis.problem: 如何将软Q学习扩展到离线多步场景，并利用资格迹实现高效信用分配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 先提出形式化的n步软Q学习公式，再引入Soft Tree Backup算子实现完全离线策略，最后统一为Soft Q(λ)框架，结合资格迹进行在线离线学习。
contributions: 提出了n步软Q学习的形式化公式。
引入Soft Tree Backup算子实现离线多步软Q学习。
统一为Soft Q(λ)框架，结合资格迹实现高效信用分配。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅提供理论推导，缺乏实验验证。
实际应用中的收敛性和效率需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 理论贡献扎实，但缺乏实验验证，适合理论研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Soft Q(λ)，将资格迹引入熵正则化强化学习，实现离线多步更新。

papers.title: From Anchors to Supervision: Memory-Graph Guided Corpus-Free Unlearning for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) may memorize sensitive or copyrighted content, raising significant privacy and legal concerns. While machine unlearning has emerged as a potential remedy, prevailing paradigms rely on user-provided forget sets, making unlearning requests difficult to audit and exposing systems to secondary leakage and malicious abuse. We propose MAGE, a Memory-grAph Guided Erasure framework for user-minimized, corpus-free unlearning. Given only a lightweight user anchor that identifies a target entity, MAGE probes the target LLM to recover target-related memorization, organizes it into a weighted local memory graph, and synthesizes scoped supervision for unlearning. MAGE is model-agnostic, can be plugged into standard unlearning methods, and requires no access to the original training corpus. Experiments on two benchmarks, TOFU and RWKU, demonstrate that MAGE's self-generated supervision achieves effective unlearning performance comparable to supervision generated with external reference, while preserving overall utility. These results support a practical and auditable unlearning workflow driven by minimal anchors rather than user-supplied forget corpora.

analysis.tldr: 提出MAGE框架，仅需用户锚点即可生成遗忘监督，实现无需语料库的LLM遗忘。

在TOFU和RWKU基准上验证，MAGE自生成监督的遗忘效果与使用外部参考监督相当，且保持模型效用。

papers.title: Who Gets Flagged? The Pluralistic Evaluation Gap in AI Content Watermarking
papers.abstract: Watermarking is becoming the default mechanism for AI content authentication, with governance policies and frameworks referencing it as infrastructure for content provenance. Yet across text, image, and audio modalities, watermark signal strength, detectability, and robustness depend on statistical properties of the content itself, properties that vary systematically across languages, cultural visual traditions, and demographic groups. We examine how this content dependence creates modality-specific pathways to bias. Reviewing the major watermarking benchmarks across modalities, we find that, with one exception, none report performance across languages, cultural content types, or population groups. To address this, we propose three concrete evaluation dimensions for pluralistic watermark benchmarking: cross-lingual detection parity, culturally diverse content coverage, and demographic disaggregation of detection metrics. We connect these to the governance frameworks currently mandating watermarking deployment and show that watermarking is held to a lower fairness standard than the generative systems it is meant to govern. Our position is that evaluation must precede deployment, and that the same bias auditing requirements applied to AI models should extend to the verification layer.

analysis.tldr: AI内容水印的公平性评估存在空白，摘要呼吁在部署前进行多元文化评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 水印正成为AI内容认证的默认机制，但其信号强度、可检测性和鲁棒性依赖于内容本身的统计特性，这些特性在不同语言、文化视觉传统和人口群体中存在系统性差异，可能导致偏见。
analysis.problem: 当前水印基准测试未报告跨语言、文化内容类型或人群组的性能，缺乏公平性评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出水印性能因内容统计特性而异，且现有基准测试（除一个例外）均未报告跨群体表现。
analysis.method: 提出三个多元水印基准测试维度：跨语言检测公平性、文化多样性内容覆盖、检测指标的人口细分。
contributions: 揭示水印基准测试中存在的公平性评估空白
提出多元水印基准测试的具体评估维度

papers.title: A Dynamic-Growing Fuzzy-Neuro Controller, Application to a 3PSP Parallel Robot
papers.abstract: To date, various paradigms of soft-Computing have been used to solve many modern problems. Among them, a self organizing combination of fuzzy systems and neural networks can make a powerful decision making system. Here, a Dynamic Growing Fuzzy Neural Controller (DGFNC) is combined with an adaptive strategy and applied to a 3PSP parallel robot position control problem. Specifically, the dynamic growing mechanism is considered in more detail. In contrast to other self-organizing methods, DGFNC adds new rules more conservatively; hence the pruning mechanism is omitted. Instead, the adaptive strategy 'adapts' the control system to parameter variation. Furthermore, a sliding mode-based nonlinear controller ensures system stability. The resulting general control strategy aims to achieve faster response with less computation while maintaining overall stability. Finally, the 3PSP is chosen due to its complex dynamics and the utility of such approaches in modern industrial systems. Several simulations support the merits of the proposed DGFNC strategy as applied to the 3PSP robot.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种动态增长模糊神经控制器（DGFNC），用于3PSP并联机器人位置控制，实现快速响应与低计算量。
analysis.research_motivation: 软计算范式（如模糊系统与神经网络的自组织组合）可构建强大决策系统，但现有自组织方法规则添加保守性不足，且需剪枝机制，计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种增长机制更保守、无需剪枝、且能自适应参数变化的模糊神经控制器，用于复杂动力学系统（如3PSP并联机器人）的位置控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出一种规则增长更保守的DGFNC，省略剪枝机制，降低计算复杂度。
将DGFNC与自适应策略及滑模控制结合，实现快速响应与稳定性保证。
analysis.experiments: 在3PSP并联机器人上进行仿真实验，验证了DGFNC策略的有效性。
limitations: 仅进行了仿真验证，缺乏实际硬件实验。

papers.title: Design and Behavior of Sparse Mixture-of-Experts Layers in CNN-based Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Sparse mixture-of-experts (MoE) layers have been shown to substantially increase model capacity without a proportional increase in computational cost and are widely used in transformer architectures, where they typically replace feed-forward network blocks. In contrast, integrating sparse MoE layers into convolutional neural networks (CNNs) remains inconsistent, with most prior work focusing on fine-grained MoEs operating at the filter or channel levels. In this work, we investigate a coarser, patch-wise formulation of sparse MoE layers for semantic segmentation, where local regions are routed to a small subset of convolutional experts. Through experiments on the Cityscapes and BDD100K datasets using encoder-decoder and backbone-based CNNs, we conduct a design analysis to assess how architectural choices affect routing dynamics and expert specialization. Our results demonstrate consistent, architecture-dependent improvements (up to +3.9 mIoU) with little computational overhead, while revealing strong design sensitivity. Our work provides empirical insights into the design and internal dynamics of sparse MoE layers in CNN-based dense prediction. Our code is available at https://github.com/KASTEL-MobilityLab/moe-layers/.

analysis.tldr: 在CNN语义分割中引入稀疏MoE层，通过patch-wise路由提升性能，但设计敏感性强。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀疏MoE层在Transformer中成功提升模型容量，但在CNN中集成不一致，缺乏系统设计分析。
analysis.problem: 如何设计稀疏MoE层以有效应用于CNN语义分割，并理解其路由动态和专家专业化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出设计选择对路由动态和专家专业化有显著影响。
analysis.method: 提出patch-wise稀疏MoE层，将局部区域路由到少量卷积专家，并在编码器-解码器和基于骨干的CNN上进行设计分析。
contributions: 系统研究了稀疏MoE层在CNN语义分割中的设计选择及其对路由动态和专家专业化的影响。
在Cityscapes和BDD100K数据集上实现了高达+3.9 mIoU的提升，且计算开销小。
analysis.experiments: 在Cityscapes和BDD100K数据集上使用编码器-解码器和基于骨干的CNN进行实验，评估架构选择对路由动态和专家专业化的影响。
limitations: 仅针对语义分割任务，可能不适用于其他密集预测任务。
设计敏感性高，需要针对特定架构调优。

papers.title: The cognitive companion: a lightweight parallel monitoring architecture for detecting and recovering from reasoning degradation in LLM agents
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents on multi-step tasks suffer reasoning degradation, looping, drift, stuck states, at rates up to 30% on hard tasks. Current solutions include hard step limits (abrupt) or LLM-as-judge monitoring (10-15% overhead per step). This paper introduces the Cognitive Companion, a parallel monitoring architecture with two implementations: an LLM-based Companion and a novel zero-overhead Probe-based Companion. We report a three-batch feasibility study centered on Gemma 4 E4B, with an additional exploratory small-model analysis on Qwen 2.5 1.5B and Llama 3.2 1B. In our experiments, the LLM-based Companion reduced repetition on loop-prone tasks by 52-62% with approximately 11% overhead. The Probe-based Companion, trained on hidden states from layer 28, showed a mean effect size of +0.471 at zero measured inference overhead; its strongest probe result achieved cross-validated AUROC 0.840 on a small proxy-labeled dataset. A key empirical finding is that companion benefit appears task-type dependent: companions are most helpful on loop-prone and open-ended tasks, while effects are neutral or negative on more structured tasks. Our small-model experiments also suggest a possible scale boundary: companions did not improve the measured quality proxy on 1B-1.5B models, even when interventions fired. Overall, the paper should be read as a feasibility study rather than a definitive validation. The results provide encouraging evidence that sub-token monitoring may be useful, identify task-type sensitivity as a practical design constraint, and motivate selective companion activation as a promising direction for future work.

analysis.tldr: 提出并行监控架构检测LLM Agent推理退化，零开销探针版本AUROC达0.84。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent在多步任务中频繁出现推理退化（循环、漂移、卡死），现有硬限制或LLM裁判方法开销高或效果生硬。
analysis.problem: 如何以低开销实时检测并恢复LLM Agent的推理退化状态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同伴效果具有任务类型依赖性：在循环倾向和开放任务中有益，在结构化任务中中性或负面；小模型（1B-1.5B）上同伴未改善质量代理指标。
analysis.method: 提出并行监控架构，包含LLM-based Companion（基于LLM判断）和Probe-based Companion（基于隐藏状态探针，零推理开销）。
contributions: 提出轻量级并行监控架构Cognitive Companion，两种实现方式覆盖不同开销需求。
通过可行性实验验证探针方法在零开销下检测推理退化的潜力（AUROC 0.840）。
揭示任务类型依赖性和模型规模边界，为选择性激活同伴提供方向。
analysis.experiments: 在Gemma 4 E4B上进行三批次可行性研究，并在Qwen 2.5 1.5B和Llama 3.2 1B上做探索性小模型分析。LLM-based Companion在循环任务上减少52-62%重复，开销约11%；Probe-based Companion在层28隐藏状态上训练，平均效应量+0.471，最强探针AUROC 0.840。
limitations: 仅为可行性研究，非确定性验证。
小模型上未观察到改善，存在规模边界。
任务类型依赖性增加了实际部署的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出并行监控架构检测LLM Agent推理退化，零开销探针版本AUROC达0.84。

papers.title: Rethinking AI Hardware: A Three-Layer Cognitive Architecture for Autonomous Agents
papers.abstract: The next generation of autonomous AI systems will be constrained not only by model capability, but by how intelligence is structured across heterogeneous hardware. Current paradigms -- cloud-centric AI, on-device inference, and edge-cloud pipelines -- treat planning, reasoning, and execution as a monolithic process, leading to unnecessary latency, energy consumption, and fragmented behavioral continuity. We introduce the Tri-Spirit Architecture, a three-layer cognitive framework that decomposes intelligence into planning (Super Layer), reasoning (Agent Layer), and execution (Reflex Layer), each mapped to distinct compute substrates and coordinated via an asynchronous message bus. We formalize the system with a parameterized routing policy, a habit-compilation mechanism that promotes repeated reasoning paths into zero-inference execution policies, a convergent memory model, and explicit safety constraints. We evaluate the architecture in a reproducible simulation of 2000 synthetic tasks against cloud-centric and edge-only baselines. Tri-Spirit reduces mean task latency by 75.6 percent and energy consumption by 71.1 percent, while decreasing LLM invocations by 30 percent and enabling 77.6 percent offline task completion. These results suggest that cognitive decomposition, rather than model scaling alone, is a primary driver of system-level efficiency in AI hardware.

analysis.tldr: 提出三层认知架构Tri-Spirit，将智能分解为规划、推理和执行层，映射到不同硬件，显著降低延迟和能耗。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI系统将规划、推理和执行视为单一过程，导致延迟高、能耗大、行为连续性差，亟需一种异构硬件上的认知分解架构。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种硬件感知的认知架构，将智能分解为不同层次并映射到异构计算单元，以提升自主Agent的系统级效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Tri-Spirit架构，包含三层：Super Layer（规划）、Agent Layer（推理）、Reflex Layer（执行），通过异步消息总线协调；引入参数化路由策略、习惯编译机制、收敛记忆模型和显式安全约束。
contributions: 提出三层认知分解架构Tri-Spirit，将规划、推理和执行分离并映射到不同硬件。
在2000个合成任务模拟中，相比云中心和边缘基线，延迟降低75.6%，能耗降低71.1%，LLM调用减少30%，离线任务完成率达77.6%。
analysis.experiments: 在2000个合成任务的模拟中，与云中心和边缘基线对比，评估延迟、能耗、LLM调用次数和离线任务完成率。
limitations: 仅在合成任务上评估，未在真实硬件或复杂场景中验证。
架构的通用性和可扩展性需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，但仅限合成任务，与当前重点方向（VLM/视频生成等）弱相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三层认知架构Tri-Spirit，将智能分解为规划、推理和执行层，映射到不同硬件，显著降低延迟和能耗。

papers.title: MedRCube: A Multidimensional Framework for Fine-Grained and In-Depth Evaluation of MLLMs in Medical Imaging
papers.abstract: The potential of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in domain of medical imaging raise the demands of systematic and rigorous evaluation frameworks that are aligned with the real-world medical imaging practice. Existing practices that report single or coarse-grained metrics are lack the granularity required for specialized clinical support and fail to assess the reliability of reasoning mechanisms. To address this, we propose a paradigm shift toward multidimensional, fine-grained and in-depth evaluation. Based on a two-stage systematic construction pipeline designed for this paradigm, we instantiate it with MedRCube. We benchmark 33 MLLMs, \textit{Lingshu-32B} achieve top-tier performance. Crucially, MedRCube exposes a series of pronounced insights inaccessible under prior evaluation settings. Furthermore, we introduce a credibility evaluation subset to quantify reasoning credibility, uncover a highly significant positive association between shortcut behavior and diagnostic task performance, raising concerns for clinically trustworthy deployment. The resources of this work can be found at https://github.com/F1mc/MedRCube.

analysis.tldr: 提出多维细粒度医学影像MLLM评估框架MedRCube，揭示捷径行为与诊断性能的正相关，引发临床可信性担忧。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学影像MLLM评估使用单一或粗粒度指标，缺乏临床所需的细粒度与推理可靠性评估，无法满足真实医疗实践需求。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个多维、细粒度、深入的评估框架，以系统评测MLLM在医学影像中的表现并揭示其推理可靠性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MedRCube发现捷径行为（shortcut behavior）与诊断任务性能之间存在显著正相关，这引发了对临床可信部署的担忧。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段系统构建管道，实例化为MedRCube框架，包含多维细粒度评估指标和可信度评估子集。
contributions: 提出从单一粗粒度指标向多维细粒度深入评估的范式转变。
构建MedRCube框架，包含两阶段系统管道和可信度评估子集，揭示捷径行为与诊断性能的正相关。
analysis.experiments: 对33个MLLM进行基准测试，Lingshu-32B达到顶级性能。摘要未提供具体实验结果细节。
limitations: 可能仅覆盖部分医学影像模态或任务。
可信度评估子集的有效性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 针对医学影像MLLM评估提出新范式，揭示重要现象，但技术细节有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多维细粒度医学影像MLLM评估框架MedRCube，揭示捷径行为与诊断性能的正相关，引发临床可信性担忧。

papers.title: ClipGStream: Clip-Stream Gaussian Splatting for Any Length and Any Motion Multi-View Dynamic Scene Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Dynamic 3D scene reconstruction is essential for immersive media such as VR, MR, and XR, yet remains challenging for long multi-view sequences with large-scale motion. Existing dynamic Gaussian approaches are either Frame-Stream, offering scalability but poor temporal stability, or Clip, achieving local consistency at the cost of high memory and limited sequence length. We propose ClipGStream, a hybrid reconstruction framework that performs stream optimization at the clip level rather than the frame level. The sequence is divided into short clips, where dynamic motion is modeled using clip-independent spatio-temporal fields and residual anchor compensation to capture local variations efficiently, while inter-clip inherited anchors and decoders maintain structural consistency across clips. This Clip-Stream design enables scalable, flicker-free reconstruction of long dynamic videos with high temporal coherence and reduced memory overhead. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ClipGStream achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction quality and efficiency. The project page is available at: https://liangjie1999.github.io/ClipGStreamWeb/

analysis.tldr: 提出Clip-Stream混合框架，以片段级流式优化实现长序列、大运动动态场景的高质量重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态3D场景重建是VR/MR/XR的核心需求，但现有方法在长多视图序列和大尺度运动场景中面临可扩展性差、时间不稳定或内存开销大的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何同时实现长序列动态场景重建的可扩展性、时间一致性和低内存开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将序列划分为短片段，每个片段内使用片段独立的时空场和残差锚补偿建模局部运动，片段间通过继承锚和解码器保持结构一致性，实现片段级流式优化。
contributions: 提出Clip-Stream混合框架，结合片段级流式优化实现可扩展且无闪烁的长动态视频重建。
设计片段独立的时空场与残差锚补偿机制，高效捕获局部运动变化。
引入片段间继承锚和解码器，保证跨片段的结构一致性与时间连贯性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对极端快速运动或复杂拓扑变化处理有限。
片段长度划分策略可能影响重建质量与效率的平衡。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，针对长序列动态场景重建的痛点提出混合框架，但摘要未提供实验细节，需进一步验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Clip-Stream混合框架，以片段级流式优化实现长序列、大运动动态场景的高质量重建。

papers.title: TokenFormer: Unify the Multi-Field and Sequential Recommendation Worlds
papers.abstract: Recommender systems have historically developed along two largely independent paradigms: feature interaction models for modeling correlations among multi-field categorical features, and sequential models for capturing user behavior dynamics from historical interaction sequences. Although recent trends attempt to bridge these paradigms within shared backbones, we empirically reveal that naive unifying these two branches may lead to a failure mode of Sequential Collapse Propagation (SCP). That is, the interaction with those dimensionally ill non-sequence fields leads to the dimensional collapse of the sequence features. To overcome this challenge, we propose TokenFormer, a unified recommendation architecture with the following innovations. First, we introduce a Bottom-Full-Top-Sliding (BFTS) attention scheme, which applies full self-attention in the lower layers and shrinking-window sliding attention in the upper layers. Second, we introduce a Non-Linear Interaction Representation (NLIR) that applies one-sided non-linear multiplicative transformations to the hidden states. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks and Tencent's advertising platform demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, while detailed analysis confirm that TokenFormer significantly improves dimensional robustness and representation discriminability under unified modeling.

analysis.tldr: TokenFormer通过BFTS注意力和NLIR表示统一多场分类特征和序列行为建模，解决序列特征维度崩溃问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 推荐系统长期存在特征交互模型和序列模型两个独立范式，近期尝试统一两者但面临序列特征维度崩溃的失败模式，亟需有效解决方案。
analysis.problem: 统一多场分类特征和序列行为建模时，非序列字段的维度问题导致序列特征维度崩溃（SCP）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了统一建模中序列特征维度崩溃（SCP）的现象，即与维度不良的非序列字段交互导致序列特征维度塌缩。
analysis.method: 提出TokenFormer，包含Bottom-Full-Top-Sliding (BFTS)注意力机制（底层全自注意力、上层滑动窗口注意力）和非线性交互表示（NLIR，对隐藏状态施加单侧非线性乘法变换）。
contributions: 识别并分析了统一推荐建模中的序列崩溃传播（SCP）失败模式
提出BFTS注意力和NLIR表示，有效缓解维度崩溃并提升表示判别性
analysis.experiments: 在公开基准和腾讯广告平台上进行实验，达到最先进性能，并验证了维度鲁棒性和表示判别性的提升。
limitations: 可能对超长序列或极多字段场景的扩展性未充分讨论
非线性变换的计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，实验充分，但属于推荐系统领域，与核心关注方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TokenFormer通过BFTS注意力和NLIR表示统一多场分类特征和序列行为建模，解决序列特征维度崩溃问题。

papers.title: Jump-Start Reinforcement Learning with Vision-Language-Action Regularization
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) enables high-frequency, closed-loop control for robotic manipulation, but scaling to long-horizon tasks with sparse or imperfect rewards remains difficult due to inefficient exploration and poor credit assignment. Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models leverage large-scale multimodal pretraining to provide generalist, task-level reasoning, but current limitations hinder their direct use in fast and precise manipulation. In this paper, we propose Vision-Language-Action Jump-Starting (VLAJS), a method that bridges sparse VLA guidance with on-policy RL to improve exploration and learning efficiency. VLAJS treats VLAs as transient sources of high-level action suggestions that bias early exploration and improve credit assignment, while preserving the high-frequency, state-based control of RL. Our approach augments Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) with a directional action-consistency regularization that softly aligns the RL agent's actions with VLA guidance during early training, without enforcing strict imitation, requiring demonstrations, or relying on continuous teacher queries. VLA guidance is applied sparsely and annealed over time, allowing the agent to adapt online and ultimately surpass the guiding policy. We evaluate VLAJS on six challenging manipulation tasks: lifting, pick-and-place, peg reorientation, peg insertion, poking, and pushing in simulation, and validate a subset on a real Franka Panda robot. VLAJS consistently outperforms PPO and distillation-style baselines in sample efficiency, reducing required environment interactions by over 50% in several tasks. Real-world experiments demonstrate zero-shot sim-to-real transfer and robust execution under clutter, object variation, and external perturbations.

analysis.tldr: 提出VLAJS方法，利用VLA模型稀疏引导强化学习探索，显著提升机器人操作任务的样本效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习在机器人操作中面临稀疏奖励下的探索效率低和信用分配困难，而VLA模型虽具备通用推理能力但难以直接用于高频精确控制，亟需结合两者优势的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用VLA模型的高层语义指导来提升强化学习在长时域、稀疏奖励机器人操作任务中的探索和样本效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VLAJS，在PPO中引入方向性动作一致性正则化，早期稀疏地使用VLA动作建议引导探索，并随时间退火，使智能体最终超越引导策略。
contributions: 提出VLAJS方法，融合VLA模型与在线强化学习，提升探索和信用分配。
在六个仿真操作任务和一个真实机器人上验证，样本效率提升超50%，并实现零样本仿真到现实迁移。
analysis.experiments: 在仿真中评估了六项操作任务（提升、抓取放置、销钉重定向、销钉插入、戳、推），并在真实Franka Panda机器人上验证子集，VLAJS在样本效率上一致优于PPO和蒸馏基线。
limitations: 依赖VLA模型的质量和可用性。
稀疏引导的退火策略可能需要针对不同任务调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，实验充分且效果显著，与机器人操作和强化学习方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VLAJS方法，利用VLA模型稀疏引导强化学习探索，显著提升机器人操作任务的样本效率。

papers.title: Operationalizing Fairness in Text-to-Image Models: A Survey of Bias, Fairness Audits and Mitigation Strategies
papers.abstract: Text-to-Image (T2I) generation models have been widely adopted across various industries, yet are criticized for frequently exhibiting societal stereotypes. While a growing body of research has emerged to evaluate and mitigate these biases, the field at present contends with conceptual ambiguity, for example terms like "bias" and "fairness" are not always clearly distinguished and often lack clear operational definitions. This paper provides a comprehensive systematic review of T2I fairness literature, organizing existing work into a taxonomy of bias types and fairness notions. We critically assess the gap between "target fairness" (normative ideals in T2I outputs) and "threshold fairness" (normative standards with actionable decision rules). Furthermore, we survey the landscape of mitigation strategies, ranging from prompt engineering to diffusion process manipulation. We conclude by proposing a new framework for operationalizing fairness that moves beyond descriptive metrics towards rigorous, target-based testing, offering an approach for more accountable generative AI development.

analysis.tldr: 系统综述文本到图像模型中的公平性概念、审计方法与缓解策略，提出操作性公平框架。
analysis.research_motivation: T2I模型广泛应用但存在社会刻板印象，现有研究概念模糊（如偏见与公平性未清晰区分），缺乏操作性定义，阻碍了可问责的AI开发。
analysis.problem: T2I公平性领域概念混乱，缺乏从规范性目标到可操作测试的完整框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出术语如“偏见”和“公平性”常被混用，且缺乏清晰的操作性定义；现有缓解策略从提示工程到扩散过程操纵，但缺乏系统性评估。
analysis.method: 系统性文献综述，构建偏见类型与公平性概念的分类法，区分“目标公平性”与“阈值公平性”，并提出基于目标测试的操作性公平框架。
contributions: 提供了T2I公平性文献的系统综述与分类法
提出目标公平性与阈值公平性的区分，并设计操作性公平框架
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 综述性质，未提出新的缓解方法或实证验证
框架可能需进一步细化以适配不同应用场景
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 综述系统全面，提出操作性框架有实践价值，但缺乏实验验证，适合关注公平性方向的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统综述文本到图像模型中的公平性概念、审计方法与缓解策略，提出操作性公平框架。

papers.title: ReConText3D: Replay-based Continual Text-to-3D Generation
papers.abstract: Continual learning enables models to acquire new knowledge over time while retaining previously learned capabilities. However, its application to text-to-3D generation remains unexplored. We present ReConText3D, the first framework for continual text-to-3D generation. We first demonstrate that existing text-to-3D models suffer from catastrophic forgetting under incremental training. ReConText3D enables generative models to incrementally learn new 3D categories from textual descriptions while preserving the ability to synthesize previously seen assets. Our method constructs a compact and diverse replay memory through text-embedding k-Center selection, allowing representative rehearsal of prior knowledge without modifying the underlying architecture. To systematically evaluate continual text-to-3D learning, we introduce Toys4K-CL, a benchmark derived from the Toys4K dataset that provides balanced and semantically diverse class-incremental splits. Extensive experiments on the Toys4K-CL benchmark show that ReConText3D consistently outperforms all baselines across different generative backbones, maintaining high-quality generation for both old and new classes. To the best of our knowledge, this work establishes the first continual learning framework and benchmark for text-to-3D generation, opening a new direction for incremental 3D generative modeling. Project page is available at: https://mauk95.github.io/ReConText3D/.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向文本到3D生成的持续学习框架ReConText3D，通过文本嵌入k中心选择构建回放记忆，缓解灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到3D生成模型在增量训练时存在灾难性遗忘问题，而持续学习在该领域尚未被探索。
analysis.problem: 如何使文本到3D生成模型在增量学习新类别时保持对旧类别的生成能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有文本到3D模型在增量训练下遭受灾难性遗忘。
analysis.method: 提出ReConText3D框架，采用文本嵌入k中心选择构建紧凑且多样化的回放记忆，无需修改底层架构即可实现代表性旧知识重放。
contributions: 首个针对文本到3D生成的持续学习框架ReConText3D。
引入Toys4K-CL基准，用于系统评估持续文本到3D学习。
analysis.experiments: 在Toys4K-CL基准上，ReConText3D在不同生成骨干下均优于所有基线，保持新旧类别的高质量生成。
limitations: 可能依赖回放记忆的质量和多样性。
未探讨其他持续学习策略（如正则化或动态架构）的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 首个持续文本到3D生成框架，方法简洁有效，并提供了基准，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向文本到3D生成的持续学习框架ReConText3D，通过文本嵌入k中心选择构建回放记忆，缓解灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: Model Capability Assessment and Safeguards for Biological Weaponization
papers.abstract: AI leaders and safety reports increasingly warn that advances in model reasoning may enable biological misuse, including by low-expertise users, while major labs describe safeguards as expanding but still evolving rather than settled. This study benchmarks ChatGPT 5.2 Auto, Gemini 3 Pro Thinking, Claude Opus 4.5 and Meta's Muse Spark Thinking on 73 novice-framed, open-ended benign STEM prompts to measure operational intelligence. On benign quantitative tasks, both Gemini and Meta scored very high; ChatGPT was partially useful but text-thinned, and Claude was sparsest with some apparent false-positive refusals. A second test set detected subtle harmful intent: edge case prompts revealed Gemini's seeming lack of contextual awareness. These results warranted a focused weaponization analysis on Gemini as capability appeared to be outpacing moderation calibration. Gemini was tested across four access environments and reported cases include poison-ivy-to-crowded-transit escalation, poison production and extraction via international-anonymous logged-out AI Mode, and other concerning examples. Biological misuse may become more prevalent as a geopolitical tool, increasing the urgency of U.S. policy responses, especially if model outputs come to be treated as regulated technical data. Guidance is provided for 25 high-risk agents to help distinguish legitimate use cases from higher-risk ones.

analysis.tldr: 对多个前沿AI模型进行生物武器化能力评估，发现Gemini能力与安全校准失衡，存在被滥用于生物攻击的风险。
analysis.research_motivation: AI安全报告警告模型推理能力进步可能被低专业知识用户用于生物武器滥用，而主要实验室的安全措施仍在演进中，亟需系统性评估和防护。
analysis.problem: 评估前沿AI模型在生物武器化方面的潜在能力，并检测现有安全防护的不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Gemini在良性STEM任务中得分很高，但在检测恶意意图时缺乏上下文感知，且在不同访问环境下出现危险输出（如毒藤到拥挤场所的升级、毒物提取等），表明能力增长快于安全校准。
analysis.method: 设计两组测试：73个新手友好的良性STEM提示评估操作智能；第二组检测微妙恶意意图。对能力最强的Gemini进行四种访问环境下的武器化分析。
contributions: 首次对多个前沿模型进行生物武器化能力的系统性基准测试
揭示了Gemini能力与安全校准之间的严重失衡，并提供了具体危险案例
为25种高风险生物制剂提供了区分合法与高风险用例的指导
analysis.experiments: 在ChatGPT 5.2 Auto、Gemini 3 Pro Thinking、Claude Opus 4.5和Meta's Muse Spark Thinking上进行了73个良性STEM提示测试，以及恶意意图检测测试；对Gemini进行了四种访问环境下的武器化分析。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 测试集规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有滥用场景
仅针对特定模型版本，结论可能不适用于未来更新
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 该研究直接针对AI生物安全这一紧迫问题，方法新颖且结果具有政策影响，但实验细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对多个前沿AI模型进行生物武器化能力评估，发现Gemini能力与安全校准失衡，存在被滥用于生物攻击的风险。

papers.title: Granularity-Aware Transfer for Tree Instance Segmentation in Synthetic and Real Forests
papers.abstract: We address the challenge of synthetic-to-real transfer in forestry perception where real data have only coarse Tree labels while synthetic data provide fine-grained trunk/crown annotations. We introduce MGTD, a mixed-granularity dataset with 53k synthetic and 3.6k real images, and a four-stage protocol isolating domain shift and granularity mismatch. Our core contribution is granularity-aware distillation, which transfers structural priors from fine-grained synthetic teachers to a coarse-label student via logit-space merging and mask unification. Experiments show consistent mask AP gains, especially for small/distant trees, establishing a testbed for Sim-Real transfer under label granularity constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出粒度感知蒸馏方法，利用合成数据的细粒度标注提升真实森林图像中树木实例分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 森林感知中合成数据有细粒度标注（树干/树冠），但真实数据只有粗粒度（树）标签，导致域迁移时标签粒度不匹配，现有方法无法有效利用细粒度先验。
analysis.problem: 解决合成到真实迁移中标签粒度不一致问题，实现仅用粗粒度真实标签即可提升树木实例分割精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MGTD混合粒度数据集和四阶段协议，核心是粒度感知蒸馏：通过logit空间合并和掩码统一，将细粒度合成教师的结构先验迁移到粗标签学生网络。
contributions: 构建MGTD数据集，包含5.3万合成和3600真实图像，支持混合粒度学习。
提出粒度感知蒸馏方法，有效利用细粒度合成标注提升粗标签真实场景分割性能。
analysis.experiments: 在MGTD数据集上实验，显示mask AP一致提升，尤其对小/远距离树木效果显著。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅针对树木实例分割，泛化到其他细粒度迁移任务需验证。
依赖合成数据质量，低质量合成可能引入噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（粒度感知蒸馏）和数据集贡献明确，但实验细节有限，适合阅读摘要后决定是否精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出粒度感知蒸馏方法，利用合成数据的细粒度标注提升真实森林图像中树木实例分割性能。

papers.title: FRAGATA: Semantic Retrieval of HPC Support Tickets via Hybrid RAG over 20 Years of Request Tracker History
papers.abstract: The technical support team of a supercomputing centre accumulates, over the course of decades, a large volume of resolved incidents that constitute critical operational knowledge. At the Galician Supercomputing Center (CESGA) this history has been managed for over twenty years with Request Tracker (RT), whose built-in search engine has significant limitations that hinder knowledge reuse by the support staff. This paper presents Fragata, a semantic ticket search system that combines modern information retrieval techniques with the full RT history. The system can find relevant past incidents regardless of language, the presence of typos, or the specific wording of the query. The architecture is deployed on CESGA's infrastructure, supports incremental updates without service interruption, and offloads the most expensive stages to the FinisTerrae III supercomputer. Preliminary results show a substantial qualitative improvement over RT's native search.

analysis.tldr: FRAGATA 通过混合 RAG 架构对 20 年技术支持工单进行语义检索，显著优于传统 RT 搜索。
analysis.research_motivation: 超算中心积累了大量历史工单，但传统 RT 搜索引擎存在语言、拼写和措辞限制，阻碍知识复用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个语义工单检索系统，克服传统搜索的局限性，实现跨语言、容错且高效的工单检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合现代信息检索技术与完整 RT 历史，采用混合 RAG 架构，支持增量更新，并将昂贵计算卸载到超算集群。
contributions: 提出 FRAGATA 系统，实现语义级工单检索，克服传统搜索的语言和拼写限制。
设计可部署于生产环境的架构，支持增量更新和无中断服务。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及初步结果显示定性改进。
limitations: 可能缺乏大规模定量评估。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但应用场景较窄且实验信息不足，建议保存后续参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FRAGATA 通过混合 RAG 架构对 20 年技术支持工单进行语义检索，显著优于传统 RT 搜索。

papers.title: Towards Fine-grained Temporal Perception: Post-Training Large Audio-Language Models with Audio-Side Time Prompt
papers.abstract: Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) enable general audio understanding and demonstrate remarkable performance across various audio tasks. However, these models still face challenges in temporal perception (e.g., inferring event onset and offset), leading to limited utility in fine-grained scenarios. To address this issue, we propose Audio-Side Time Prompt and leverage Reinforcement Learning (RL) to develop the TimePro-RL framework for fine-grained temporal perception. Specifically, we encode timestamps as embeddings and interleave them within the audio feature sequence as temporal coordinates to prompt the model. Furthermore, we introduce RL following Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) to directly optimize temporal alignment performance. Experiments demonstrate that TimePro-RL achieves significant performance gains across a range of audio temporal tasks, such as audio grounding, sound event detection, and dense audio captioning, validating its robust effectiveness.

analysis.tldr: 提出音频侧时间提示和强化学习框架TimePro-RL，提升大音频语言模型的时间感知能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 大音频语言模型在通用音频理解上表现优异，但在细粒度时间感知（如事件起止时间推断）方面存在不足，限制了其在精细场景中的应用。
analysis.problem: 大音频语言模型缺乏对音频事件时间边界的精确感知能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出音频侧时间提示（Audio-Side Time Prompt），将时间戳编码为嵌入并交错插入音频特征序列作为时间坐标；在监督微调后引入强化学习直接优化时间对齐性能。
contributions: 提出音频侧时间提示方法，增强模型对时间信息的感知。
提出TimePro-RL框架，结合监督微调和强化学习提升时间对齐性能。
analysis.experiments: 在音频定位、声音事件检测、密集音频描述等任务上取得显著性能提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定音频特征提取器。
强化学习训练可能不稳定。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合时间提示和强化学习解决音频时间感知问题，实验验证有效，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出音频侧时间提示和强化学习框架TimePro-RL，提升大音频语言模型的时间感知能力。

papers.title: The Existential Theory of Research: Why Discovery Is Hard
papers.abstract: Can scientific discovery be made arbitrarily easy by choosing the right representation, collecting enough data, and deploying sufficiently powerful algorithms? This paper argues that the answer is fundamentally negative. We introduce the Existential Theory of Research (ETR), a formal framework that models discovery as the recovery of structured explanations under constraints of representation, observation, and computation. Within this framework, we show that these three components cannot be simultaneously optimized: no method can guarantee universally simple explanations, arbitrarily compressed observations, and efficient exact inference. This limitation is not model-specific, but arises from a synthesis of uncertainty principles in sparse representation, sample complexity bounds in high-dimensional recovery, and the computational hardness of exact inference. We further show that representation mismatch alone can inflate intrinsic simplicity into apparent complexity, rendering otherwise tractable problems observationally and computationally prohibitive. To quantify these effects, we introduce an uncertainty functional that captures the joint difficulty of discovery. The results suggest that scientific difficulty is not accidental, but a structural consequence of the geometry and complexity of inference.

analysis.tldr: 科学发现不可能同时优化表示、观测和计算三个维度，存在固有的结构性困难。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学发现是否可以通过选择合适表示、收集足够数据和使用强大算法而变得任意简单？本文旨在从理论上回答这一根本问题。
analysis.problem: 证明科学发现存在固有的结构性限制，即表示、观测和计算三个维度无法同时最优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出表示失配会将内在简单性膨胀为表观复杂性，使原本可解的问题在观测和计算上变得不可行。
analysis.method: 提出存在性研究理论（ETR）形式化框架，结合稀疏表示中的不确定性原理、高维恢复的样本复杂度界和精确推理的计算困难性，并引入不确定性泛函量化发现难度。
contributions: 提出ETR框架，形式化建模科学发现中的表示、观测和计算约束。
证明三个维度无法同时优化，揭示科学困难的结构性本质。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架为理论性，缺乏实证验证。
不确定性泛函的实际计算可能复杂。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.reason: 理论深刻但偏抽象，与当前重点方向关联较弱，适合理论研究者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 科学发现不可能同时优化表示、观测和计算三个维度，存在固有的结构性困难。

papers.title: Penny Wise, Pixel Foolish: Bypassing Price Constraints in Multimodal Agents via Visual Adversarial Perturbations
papers.abstract: The rapid proliferation of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has enabled mobile agents to execute high-stakes financial transactions, but their adversarial robustness remains underexplored.
