analysis.research_motivation: 视觉-语言模型在医学图像零样本诊断中展现出潜力，但训练批次组成对3D医学影像学习表征的影响尚未被探索。
analysis.problem: 研究训练批次中正常/异常样本比例以及数据规模对3D腹部CT图像-文本对齐和零样本学习性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果以外的现象分析。
analysis.method: 复现Merlin双编码器模型，使用对称InfoNCE损失对齐3D腹部CT体积与放射学报告；通过节段级平衡采样控制批次中正常与异常比例（25:75、50:50、75:25），并在子集上进行数据规模消融（20%、40%、100%）。
contributions: 首次系统研究批次组成对3D医学影像视觉-语言模型的影响。
发现随机采样的随机多样性结合交替批次划分比人工类别平衡提供更有效的正则化。
analysis.experiments: 在包含30种发现的零样本诊断任务上，复现模型达到74.45%宏F1（原为73.00%）；平衡批次配置均低于非平衡基线2.4-2.8个百分点；数据规模从20%增至100%时性能从65.26%亚线性提升至71.88%。
limitations: 仅针对腹部CT单一模态和特定模型架构。
未探索更大批次规模或更复杂的平衡策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 研究批次组成对3D医学影像对齐的影响有实际意义，但方法增量有限，实验规模较小。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在3D腹部CT图像-文本对齐中，随机批次采样优于人工平衡类别比例，且数据扩展性能呈亚线性增长。

papers.title: AI Powered Image Analysis for Phishing Detection
papers.abstract: Phishing websites now rely heavily on visual imitation-copied logos, similar layouts, and matching colours-to avoid detection by text- and URL-based systems. This paper presents a deep learning approach that uses webpage screenshots for image-based phishing detection. Two vision models, ConvNeXt-Tiny and Vision Transformer (ViT-Base), were tested to see how well they handle visually deceptive phishing pages. The framework covers dataset creation, preprocessing, transfer learning with ImageNet weights, and evaluation using different decision thresholds. The results show that ConvNeXt-Tiny performs the best overall, achieving the highest F1-score at the optimised threshold and running more efficiently than ViT-Base. This highlights the strength of convolutional models for visual phishing detection and shows why threshold tuning is important for real-world deployment. As future work, the curated dataset used in this study will be released to support reproducibility and encourage further research in this area. Unlike many existing studies that primarily report accuracy, this work places greater emphasis on threshold-aware evaluation to better reflect real-world deployment conditions. By examining precision, recall, and F1-score across different decision thresholds, the study identifies operating points that balance detection performance and false-alarm control. In addition, the side-by-side comparison of ConvNeXt-Tiny and ViT-Base under the same experimental setup offers practical insights into how convolutional and transformer-based architectures differ in robustness and computational efficiency for visual phishing detection.

analysis.tldr: 使用ConvNeXt-Tiny和ViT-Base进行基于截图的钓鱼检测，ConvNeXt-Tiny在F1分数和效率上更优。
analysis.research_motivation: 钓鱼网站通过视觉模仿（复制logo、相似布局和颜色）逃避基于文本和URL的检测系统，需要图像级检测方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用网页截图进行图像级钓鱼检测，并比较卷积模型与Transformer模型的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建数据集，使用ConvNeXt-Tiny和ViT-Base进行迁移学习（ImageNet权重），通过调整决策阈值评估性能。
contributions: 提出基于截图的图像级钓鱼检测框架，包含数据集创建、预处理和阈值调优。
系统比较ConvNeXt-Tiny和ViT-Base在视觉钓鱼检测中的性能与效率。
强调阈值感知评估的重要性，并计划开源数据集以促进可重复性。
analysis.experiments: 在自建数据集上测试ConvNeXt-Tiny和ViT-Base，ConvNeXt-Tiny在优化阈值下取得最高F1分数且运行效率更高。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅比较了两种模型，可能未涵盖其他先进架构。
数据集规模与多样性未明确，可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法较为常规，实验规模有限，但阈值调优和模型比较有一定实用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 使用ConvNeXt-Tiny和ViT-Base进行基于截图的钓鱼检测，ConvNeXt-Tiny在F1分数和效率上更优。

papers.title: Training-Free Test-Time Contrastive Learning for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong reasoning capabilities, but their performance often degrades under distribution shift. Existing test-time adaptation (TTA) methods rely on gradient-based updates that require white-box access and need substantial overhead, while training-free alternatives are either static or depend on external guidance. In this paper, we propose Training-Free Test-Time Contrastive Learning TF-TTCL, a training-free adaptation framework that enables a frozen LLM to improve online by distilling supervision from its own inference experiences. Specifically, TF-TTCL implements a dynamic "Explore-Reflect-Steer" loop through three core modules: 1) Semantic Query Augmentation first diversifies problem views via multi-agent role-playing to generate different reasoning trajectories; 2) Contrastive Experience Distillation then captures the semantic gap between superior and inferior trajectories, distilling them into explicit textual rules; and 3) Contextual Rule Retrieval finally activates these stored rules during inference to dynamically steer the frozen LLM toward robust reasoning patterns while avoiding observed errors. Extensive experiments on closed-ended reasoning tasks and open-ended evaluation tasks demonstrate that TF-TTCL consistently outperforms strong zero-shot baselines and representative TTA methods under online evaluation. Code is available at https://github.com/KevinSCUTer/TF-TTCL.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练、无需白盒访问的测试时对比学习方法，通过自蒸馏推理经验提升LLM在分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在分布偏移下性能下降，现有测试时适应方法依赖梯度更新（需白盒访问且开销大），而无需训练的方法要么静态要么依赖外部指导，缺乏高效在线自适应手段。
analysis.problem: 如何在不更新模型参数、不依赖外部监督的条件下，让冻结的LLM在测试时通过自身推理经验在线提升鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TF-TTCL框架，包含三个模块：1) 语义查询增强（多智能体角色扮演生成多样推理轨迹）；2) 对比经验蒸馏（捕获优劣轨迹语义差距并提炼为显式文本规则）；3) 上下文规则检索（推理时激活存储规则引导模型避免错误）。
contributions: 提出首个无需训练、无需白盒访问的测试时对比学习框架TF-TTCL。
设计“探索-反思-引导”循环，通过自蒸馏推理经验实现LLM在线自适应。
在封闭式推理和开放式评估任务上超越强零样本基线和代表性TTA方法。
analysis.experiments: 在封闭式推理任务和开放式评估任务上进行在线评估，TF-TTCL一致优于强零样本基线和代表性TTA方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖多智能体角色扮演的多样性，若生成轨迹质量不高可能影响效果。
显式文本规则的存储和检索可能引入额外推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（无需训练+对比蒸馏），与LLM推理方向强相关，实验覆盖多任务，但摘要未提供具体数值，技术细节中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练、无需白盒访问的测试时对比学习方法，通过自蒸馏推理经验提升LLM在分布偏移下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Reconstruction of a 3D wireframe from a single line drawing via generative depth estimation
papers.abstract: The conversion of 2D freehand sketches into 3D models remains a pivotal challenge in computer vision, bridging the gap between fluent sketching and CAD. Traditional monocular depth reconstruction techniques are not suitable for line drawing interpretation. We propose a generative approach by framing reconstruction as a conditional dense depth estimation task. To achieve this, we implemented a Latent Diffusion Model (LDM) with a conditioning framework to resolve the inherent ambiguities of orthographic projections. We trained our model using a dataset of over one million image-depth pairs. Our framework demonstrated robust performance across varying shape complexities, with 5.3 percent average depth error.

analysis.tldr: 提出用潜扩散模型从单张线稿生成3D线框，将重建转化为条件深度估计任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 2D手绘草图转3D模型是计算机视觉中的关键挑战，传统单目深度重建方法不适用于线稿解释，需要新方法弥合草图与CAD之间的鸿沟。
analysis.problem: 从单张正交投影线稿中重建3D线框，解决线稿固有的深度歧义问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将重建视为条件密集深度估计任务，采用潜扩散模型（LDM）结合条件框架，利用超过一百万图像-深度对的数据集进行训练。
contributions: 提出将线稿3D重建转化为条件深度估计的生成式框架
构建大规模图像-深度对数据集并训练LDM模型，实现鲁棒的深度预测
analysis.experiments: 在多种形状复杂度上测试，平均深度误差为5.3%。
limitations: 可能对极端复杂或非流形线稿泛化能力有限
依赖大规模配对数据，获取成本高

analysis.reason: 方法有创新性（生成式深度估计），但实验信息有限，仅报告平均深度误差，适合阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用潜扩散模型从单张线稿生成3D线框，将重建转化为条件深度估计任务。

papers.title: Free Lunch for Unified Multimodal Models: Enhancing Generation via Reflective Rectification with Inherent Understanding
papers.abstract: Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) aim to integrate visual understanding and generation within a single structure. However, these models exhibit a notable capability mismatch, where their understanding capability significantly outperforms their generation. This mismatch indicates that the model's rich internal knowledge, while effective for understanding tasks, remains underactivated during generation. To address this, we draw inspiration from the human ``Thinking-While-Drawing'' paradigm, where humans continuously reflect to activate their knowledge and rectify intermediate results. In this paper, we propose UniRect-CoT, a training-free unified rectification chain-of-thought framework. Our approach unlocks the ``free lunch'' hidden in the UMM's powerful inherent understanding to continuously reflect, activating its internal knowledge and rectifying intermediate results during generation.We regard the diffusion denoising process in UMMs as an intrinsic visual reasoning process and align the intermediate results with the target instruction understood by the model, serving as a self-supervisory signal to rectify UMM generation.Extensive experiments demonstrate that UniRect-CoT can be easily integrated into existing UMMs, significantly enhancing generation quality across diverse complex tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出UniRect-CoT，一种无需训练的统一多模态模型生成增强框架，通过利用模型自身的理解能力进行反思性修正。
analysis.research_motivation: 统一多模态模型（UMMs）中理解能力远强于生成能力，导致生成时内部知识未被充分利用，限制了生成质量。
analysis.problem: UMMs中理解与生成能力不匹配，生成时内部知识激活不足，需要一种无需额外训练的方法来提升生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出UMMs的理解能力显著优于生成能力，表明模型内部知识在生成时未被充分激活。
analysis.method: 提出UniRect-CoT，一种无需训练的反思性修正链式思维框架，将扩散去噪过程视为内在视觉推理，利用模型自身理解作为自监督信号，在生成过程中持续反思并修正中间结果。
contributions: 提出UniRect-CoT框架，无需训练即可提升UMMs的生成质量。
将扩散去噪过程与视觉推理对齐，利用模型理解能力作为自监督信号进行生成修正。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖于模型本身的理解能力，若理解能力不足则效果受限。
反思修正过程可能增加生成时间。

papers.title: Evolvable Embodied Agent for Robotic Manipulation via Long Short-Term Reflection and Optimization
papers.abstract: Achieving general-purpose robotics requires empowering robots to adapt and evolve based on their environment and feedback. Traditional methods face limitations such as extensive training requirements, difficulties in cross-task generalization, and lack of interpretability. Prompt learning offers new opportunities for self-evolving robots without extensive training, but simply reflecting on past experiences. However, extracting meaningful insights from task successes and failures remains a challenge. To this end, we propose the evolvable embodied agent (EEAgent) framework, which leverages large vision-language models (VLMs) for better environmental interpretation and policy planning. To enhance reflection on past experiences, we propose a long short-term reflective optimization (LSTRO) mechanism that dynamically refines prompts based on both past experiences and newly learned lessons, facilitating continuous self-evolution, thereby enhancing overall task success rates. Evaluations on six VIMA-Bench tasks reveal that our approach sets a new state-of-the-art, notably outperforming baselines in complex scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出EEAgent框架，结合长短期反思优化机制，利用VLM实现机器人操作任务的持续自我进化。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统机器人方法需要大量训练、跨任务泛化困难且缺乏可解释性，而提示学习虽能实现自我进化，但难以从任务成败中提取有效经验。
analysis.problem: 如何让机器人从过往经验中提取有意义的信息，实现持续自我进化以提升操作任务成功率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EEAgent框架，利用大视觉语言模型（VLM）进行环境解释和策略规划，并设计长短期反思优化（LSTRO）机制，动态结合长期经验和短期教训来优化提示，实现持续自我进化。
contributions: 提出EEAgent框架，结合VLM实现机器人操作的自我进化。
设计LSTRO机制，通过长短期反思优化提示，提升任务成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在VIMA-Bench的六个任务上评估，达到新SOTA，尤其在复杂场景中显著优于基线。
limitations: 可能依赖VLM的预训练质量，泛化到未见任务需进一步验证。
反思机制的计算开销可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EEAgent框架，结合长短期反思优化机制，利用VLM实现机器人操作任务的持续自我进化。

papers.title: RiskWebWorld: A Realistic Interactive Benchmark for GUI Agents in E-commerce Risk Management
papers.abstract: Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents show strong capabilities for automating web tasks, but existing interactive benchmarks primarily target benign, predictable consumer environments. Their effectiveness in high-stakes, investigative domains such as authentic e-commerce risk management remains underexplored. To bridge this gap, we present RiskWebWorld, the first highly realistic interactive benchmark for evaluating GUI agents in e-commerce risk management. RiskWebWorld features 1,513 tasks sourced from production risk-control pipelines across 8 core domains, and captures the authentic challenges of risk operations on uncooperative websites, partially environmental hijackments. To support scalable evaluation and agentic reinforcement learning (RL), we further build a Gymnasium-compliant infrastructure that decouples policy planning from environment mechanics. Our evaluation across diverse models reveals a dramatic capability gap: top-tier generalist models achieve 49.1% success, while specialized open-weights GUI models lag at near-total failure. This highlights that foundation model scale currently matters more than zero-shot interface grounding in long-horizon professional tasks. We also demonstrate the viability of our infrastructure through agentic RL, which improves open-source models by 16.2%. These results position RiskWebWorld as a practical testbed for developing robust digital workers.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向电商风控场景的GUI智能体交互式基准，揭示通用大模型与专用GUI模型之间的巨大能力鸿沟。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GUI智能体基准主要针对良性、可预测的消费者环境，缺乏对高风险、调查性领域（如电商风控）的评估，无法反映真实场景中的挑战。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个高度真实的交互式基准来评估GUI智能体在电商风险管理中的表现，特别是面对不合作网站和环境劫持等复杂情况。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 顶级通用模型成功率为49.1%，而专用开源GUI模型几乎完全失败，表明在长周期专业任务中，基础模型规模比零样本界面接地更重要。
analysis.method: 构建了包含1513个任务的交互式基准RiskWebWorld，并开发了兼容Gymnasium的基础设施，将策略规划与环境机制解耦，支持可扩展评估和智能体强化学习。
contributions: 首个面向电商风控的GUI智能体交互式基准，包含1513个来自生产管线的任务。
揭示了通用大模型与专用GUI模型在专业任务中的巨大能力差距。
展示了通过智能体强化学习提升开源模型16.2%的可行性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种模型上评估，顶级通用模型成功率为49.1%，专用开源GUI模型接近完全失败；通过智能体强化学习，开源模型提升16.2%。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖电商风控领域，可能不适用于其他高风险场景。
未提供模型在真实生产环境中的部署验证。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向电商风控场景的GUI智能体交互式基准，揭示通用大模型与专用GUI模型之间的巨大能力鸿沟。

papers.title: Awakening Dormant Experts:Counterfactual Routing to Mitigate MoE Hallucinations
papers.abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models have achieved remarkable scalability, yet they remain vulnerable to hallucinations, particularly when processing long-tail knowledge. We identify that this fragility stems from static Top-$k$ routing: routers tend to favor high-frequency patterns over rare factual associations. Consequently, ``specialist experts'' possessing critical long-tail knowledge are often assigned low gating scores and remain ``dormant'' -- under-prioritized for specific tokens despite their proven causal importance on other inputs. To address this, we propose Counterfactual Routing (CoR), a training-free inference framework designed to awaken these dormant experts. CoR integrates layer-wise perturbation analysis with the Counterfactual Expert Impact (CEI) metric to dynamically shift computational resources from syntax-dominant to knowledge-intensive layers while maintaining a constant total activation count, effectively retrieving causally decisive experts via virtual ablation. Extensive experiments on TruthfulQA, FACTOR, and TriviaQA demonstrate that CoR improves factual accuracy by 3.1\% on average without increasing the inference budget, establishing a superior Pareto frontier compared to static scaling strategies.

analysis.tldr: 提出Counterfactual Routing (CoR)，一种无需训练即可缓解MoE模型幻觉的推理框架，通过反事实扰动激活沉睡专家。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀疏MoE模型在长尾知识上易产生幻觉，原因是静态Top-k路由偏向高频模式，导致掌握关键长尾知识的专家被低分激活而处于休眠状态。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加推理预算的前提下，动态激活MoE中被低估的专家以提升事实准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 识别出静态Top-k路由导致专家休眠：路由器偏好高频模式，使对长尾知识重要的专家获得低门控分数，即使这些专家在其他输入上已被证明有因果重要性。
analysis.method: CoR：一种无需训练的推理框架，结合逐层扰动分析和反事实专家影响（CEI）指标，动态将计算资源从语法主导层转移到知识密集型层，保持总激活数不变，通过虚拟消融检索因果决定性专家。
contributions: 首次从路由机制角度分析MoE幻觉根源，指出专家休眠现象。
提出CoR框架，无需训练即可缓解幻觉，在多个基准上平均提升3.1%事实准确性且不增加推理预算。
analysis.experiments: 在TruthfulQA、FACTOR和TriviaQA上评估，CoR平均提升3.1%事实准确性，与静态缩放策略相比建立了更优的帕累托前沿。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构（MoE），通用性待验证。
CEI指标计算可能引入额外推理延迟，尽管总激活数不变。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，对MoE幻觉问题有直接贡献，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Counterfactual Routing (CoR)，一种无需训练即可缓解MoE模型幻觉的推理框架，通过反事实扰动激活沉睡专家。

papers.title: Comparative Study of Bending Analysis using Physics-Informed Neural Networks and Numerical Dynamic Deflection in Perforated nanobeam
papers.abstract: In this chapter, we investigate the bending behavior of a perforated nanobeam subjected to sinusoidal loading using an efficient and computationally robust Physics-Informed Functional Link Constrained Framework with Domain Mapping (DFL-TFC) method. Our aim is to determine the relationship between static bending response and dynamic deflection of a perforated nanobeam for various perforation cases. The static bending is obtained using the FL-TFC with Domain mapped method, whereas dynamic deflection is determined using the Galerkin method. The proposed approach employs the theory of functional connections (TFC) to systematically embed governing differential equation constraints into a constrained expression (CE), which exactly satisfies all prescribed initial and boundary conditions (ICs and BCs) and domain of differential equation is mapped to domain of orthogonal polynomials. Within this framework, the free function appearing in the constrained expression is expressed through a functional link neural network (FLNN). The cost is minimized by the mean square residual of DE, allowing training without requiring complex deep network architectures. Relationship between static and dynamic defection of simply-supported (S-S) perforated nanobeams has been investigated here. FL-TFC with Domain mapped method eliminates the need for deep and complex neural network architectures while ensuring accuracy, efficiency, and strict satisfaction of boundary conditions as compared to standard PINN.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种物理信息神经网络（FL-TFC）用于穿孔纳米梁的弯曲分析，并与数值动态挠度对比。
analysis.research_motivation: 穿孔纳米梁的弯曲行为分析在微纳机电系统中至关重要，但传统数值方法计算成本高，而标准PINN存在架构复杂、边界条件难以严格满足的问题。
analysis.problem: 高效且精确地求解穿孔纳米梁在正弦载荷下的静态弯曲响应，并建立与动态挠度的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用域映射的物理信息函数链接约束框架（FL-TFC），通过函数连接理论将控制方程嵌入约束表达式，严格满足边界条件，并用函数链接神经网络（FLNN）表示自由函数，通过最小化微分方程均方残差训练。
contributions: 提出FL-TFC方法用于穿孔纳米梁的弯曲分析，避免深度复杂网络架构。
建立了静态弯曲与动态挠度之间的关系，并验证了方法在精度和边界条件满足上的优势。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对简支边界条件和正弦载荷，泛化性待验证。
未与其他PINN变体进行定量比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但摘要缺乏实验细节，且应用领域较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种物理信息神经网络（FL-TFC）用于穿孔纳米梁的弯曲分析，并与数值动态挠度对比。

papers.title: C-voting: Confidence-Based Test-Time Voting without Explicit Energy Functions
papers.abstract: Neural network models with latent recurrent processing, where identical layers are recursively applied to the latent state, have gained attention as promising models for performing reasoning tasks. A strength of such models is that they enable test-time scaling, where the models can enhance their performance in the test phase without additional training. Models such as the Hierarchical Reasoning Model (HRM) and Artificial Kuramoto Oscillatory Neurons (AKOrN) can facilitate deeper reasoning by increasing the number of recurrent steps, thereby enabling the completion of challenging tasks, including Sudoku, Maze solving, and AGI benchmarks. In this work, we introduce confidence-based voting (C-voting), a test-time scaling strategy designed for recurrent models with multiple latent candidate trajectories. Initializing the latent state with multiple candidates using random variables, C-voting selects the one maximizing the average of top-1 probabilities of the predictions, reflecting the model's confidence. Additionally, it yields 4.9% higher accuracy on Sudoku-hard than the energy-based voting strategy, which is specific to models with explicit energy functions. An essential advantage of C-voting is its applicability: it can be applied to recurrent models without requiring an explicit energy function. Finally, we introduce a simple attention-based recurrent model with randomized initial values named ItrSA++, and demonstrate that when combined with C-voting, it outperforms HRM on Sudoku-extreme (95.2% vs. 55.0%) and Maze (78.6% vs. 74.5%) tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需显式能量函数的置信度投票策略C-voting，用于提升循环模型在测试时的推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 具有潜在循环处理的神经网络模型在推理任务中展现出测试时扩展能力，但现有投票策略（如基于能量的投票）依赖于显式能量函数，限制了其通用性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖显式能量函数的情况下，为具有多个潜在候选轨迹的循环模型设计有效的测试时投票策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出C-voting策略：用随机变量初始化多个潜在候选，选择最大化预测top-1概率平均值的候选，反映模型置信度。
contributions: 提出C-voting，一种无需显式能量函数的测试时投票策略，适用于具有多个潜在候选轨迹的循环模型。
在Sudoku-hard任务上比基于能量的投票策略准确率高4.9%。
引入简单注意力循环模型ItrSA++，结合C-voting在Sudoku-extreme和Maze任务上超越HRM。
analysis.experiments: 在Sudoku-hard、Sudoku-extreme和Maze任务上评估，C-voting在Sudoku-hard上比能量投票高4.9%，ItrSA++结合C-voting在Sudoku-extreme上达95.2%（HRM 55.0%），Maze上达78.6%（HRM 74.5%）。
limitations: C-voting可能对初始候选数量敏感，摘要未讨论。
仅验证了Sudoku和Maze任务，泛化性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需显式能量函数的置信度投票策略C-voting，用于提升循环模型在测试时的推理性能。

papers.title: From Alignment to Prediction: A Study of Self-Supervised Learning and Predictive Representation Learning
papers.abstract: Self-supervised learning has emerged as a major technique for the task of learning from unlabeled data, where the current methods mostly revolve around alignment of representations and input recon struction. Although such approaches have demonstrated excellent performance in practice, their scope remains mostly confined to learning from observed data and does not provide much help in terms of a learning structure that is predictive of the data distribution. In this paper, we study some of the recent developments in the realm of self-supervised learning. We define a new category called Predictive Representation Learning (PRL), which revolves around the latent prediction of unobserved components of data based on the observation. We propose a common taxonomy that classifies PRL along with alignment and reconstruction-based learning approaches. Furthermore, we argue that Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture(JEPA) can be considered as an exemplary member of this new paradigm. We further discuss theoretical perspectives and open challenges, highlighting predictive representation learning as a promising direction for future self-supervised learning research. In this study, we implemented Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL), Masked Autoencoders (MAE), and Image-JEPA (I-JEPA) for comparative analysis. The results indicate that MAE achieves perfect similarity of 1.00, but exhibits relatively weak robustness of 0.55. In contrast, BYOL and I-JEPA attain accuracies of 0.98 and 0.95, with robustness scores of 0.75 and 0.78, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出预测性表征学习（PRL）新范式，将JEPA作为典型方法，并与对齐和重建方法对比。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自监督学习主要关注表征对齐和输入重建，缺乏对数据分布预测性结构的探索，限制了模型对未观测数据的预测能力。
analysis.problem: 如何定义和分类预测性表征学习（PRL），并验证其与对齐、重建方法的差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MAE在相似性上完美但鲁棒性弱，BYOL和I-JEPA在准确性和鲁棒性间取得更好平衡。
analysis.method: 提出PRL分类法，将JEPA作为范例，并对比BYOL、MAE和I-JEPA。
contributions: 定义预测性表征学习（PRL）新类别并建立统一分类法。
通过实验对比揭示不同方法的相似性与鲁棒性权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在BYOL、MAE和I-JEPA上比较相似性和鲁棒性，MAE相似性1.00但鲁棒性0.55，BYOL和I-JEPA分别达到0.98/0.75和0.95/0.78。
limitations: 实验仅涉及三种方法，未涵盖更多PRL变体。
鲁棒性度量可能依赖特定数据集或任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.reason: 提出新分类法但实验规模小，适合了解概念但非突破性工作。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出预测性表征学习（PRL）新范式，将JEPA作为典型方法，并与对齐和重建方法对比。

papers.title: Representation over Routing: Overcoming Surrogate Hacking in Multi-Timescale PPO
papers.abstract: Temporal credit assignment in reinforcement learning has long been a central challenge. Inspired by the multi-timescale encoding of the dopamine system in neurobiology, recent research has sought to introduce multiple discount factors into Actor-Critic architectures, such as Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), to balance short-term responses with long-term planning. However, this paper reveals that blindly fusing multi-timescale signals in complex delayed-reward tasks can lead to severe algorithmic pathologies. We systematically demonstrate that exposing a temporal attention routing mechanism to policy gradients results in surrogate objective hacking, while adopting gradient-free uncertainty weighting triggers irreversible myopic degeneration, a phenomenon we term the Paradox of Temporal Uncertainty. To address these issues, we propose a Target Decoupling architecture: on the Critic side, we retain multi-timescale predictions to enforce auxiliary representation learning, while on the Actor side, we strictly isolate short-term signals and update the policy based solely on long-term advantages. Rigorous empirical evaluations across multiple independent random seeds in the LunarLander-v2 environment demonstrate that our proposed architecture achieves statistically significant performance improvements. Without relying on hyperparameter hacking, it consistently surpasses the ''Environment Solved'' threshold with minimal variance, completely eliminates policy collapse, and escapes the hovering local optima that trap single-timescale baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出目标解耦架构，通过分离Actor和Critic的多时间尺度信号，解决PPO中的代理目标攻击和短视退化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习中时间信用分配是核心挑战，受神经生物学多巴胺系统启发引入多折扣因子，但现有方法在复杂延迟奖励任务中面临代理目标攻击和短视退化等病理问题。
analysis.problem: 多时间尺度PPO中，将时间注意力路由暴露给策略梯度会导致代理目标攻击，而使用无梯度不确定性加权会引发不可逆的短视退化（时间不确定性悖论）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了多时间尺度信号融合导致的两种病理：代理目标攻击（策略梯度利用路由机制）和短视退化（无梯度加权导致策略忽视长期回报）。
analysis.method: 目标解耦架构：Critic保留多时间尺度预测以进行辅助表征学习，Actor严格隔离短期信号，仅基于长期优势更新策略。
contributions: 首次系统揭示多时间尺度PPO中的代理目标攻击和短视退化现象。
提出目标解耦架构，无需超参数调整即可稳定训练并显著提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在LunarLander-v2环境中进行多随机种子实验，达到统计显著性能提升，稳定超过“环境解决”阈值，消除策略崩溃，并逃离单时间尺度基线的悬停局部最优。
limitations: 仅在单一环境（LunarLander-v2）上验证，泛化性未知。
未讨论长期优势的选取方式对性能的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验验证充分，但环境单一，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出目标解耦架构，通过分离Actor和Critic的多时间尺度信号，解决PPO中的代理目标攻击和短视退化问题。

papers.title: SFT-GRPO Data Overlap as a Post-Training Hyperparameter for Autoformalization
papers.abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is a common post-training recipe. We conduct a controlled ablation over SFT-GRPO data overlap, evaluating Qwen3-8B (thinking disabled) post-trained for Lean 4 autoformalization under six conditions that differ solely in training recipe: a base model, SFT-only, GRPO-only, and three SFT+GRPO configurations where 0 percent, 30 percent, or 100 percent of the GRPO prompts coincide with the SFT corpus. Keeping SFT and GRPO data disjoint consistently outperforms full overlap at zero additional compute cost. Evaluating on Gaokao-Formal and PutnamBench under both compile pass at k and semantic pass at k assessed by an LLM judge, we find that lower overlap is monotonically associated with higher compilation and semantic accuracy. At 0 percent overlap, GRPO yields a 10.4 percentage point semantic gain over SFT alone on Gaokao, while at 100 percent overlap both metrics remain flat, rendering the GRPO stage effectively redundant. We further show that dual-metric evaluation reveals compile semantic gaps exceeding 30 percentage points for the highest compiling models, a disparity invisible under compile-only benchmarking. To our knowledge, this is the first controlled investigation of SFT-GRPO data overlap as a post-training hyperparameter, demonstrating how model behavior varies based on the degree of data sharing between training stages.

analysis.tldr: SFT和GRPO数据不重叠时，自动形式化性能最优，重叠则使GRPO阶段失效。
analysis.research_motivation: SFT+GRPO是常见的后训练流程，但SFT与GRPO数据重叠对性能的影响尚未被系统研究，理解这一超参数有助于优化训练策略。
analysis.problem: 探究SFT-GRPO数据重叠程度作为后训练超参数对自动形式化任务性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：SFT与GRPO数据完全重叠时，GRPO阶段对性能无提升，相当于冗余；数据不重叠时，GRPO带来显著增益；编译通过率与语义通过率之间存在超过30个百分点的差距，仅用编译指标会掩盖语义缺陷。
analysis.method: 在Lean 4自动形式化任务上，对Qwen3-8B（禁用思维链）进行六种训练配置的对照消融实验：基础模型、仅SFT、仅GRPO、以及三种SFT+GRPO配置（GRPO提示与SFT语料重叠0%、30%、100%）。
contributions: 首次系统研究SFT-GRPO数据重叠作为后训练超参数的影响。
发现数据不重叠一致优于完全重叠，且低重叠单调提升编译和语义准确率。
揭示双指标评估（编译+语义）的必要性，单用编译指标会高估模型能力。
analysis.experiments: 在Gaokao-Formal和PutnamBench上评估，使用编译通过率（k次）和LLM评判的语义通过率（k次）。0%重叠时，GRPO在Gaokao上比仅SFT语义提升10.4个百分点；100%重叠时两项指标持平。
limitations: 仅针对Lean 4自动形式化任务，结论可能不泛化到其他领域。
仅使用Qwen3-8B一种模型，未验证更大模型或不同架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 首次系统研究SFT-GRPO数据重叠超参数，实验设计清晰，发现具有实用价值，但仅针对单一任务和模型。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SFT和GRPO数据不重叠时，自动形式化性能最优，重叠则使GRPO阶段失效。

papers.title: DiT as Real-Time Rerenderer: Streaming Video Stylization with Autoregressive Diffusion Transformer
papers.abstract: Recent advances in video generation models has significantly accelerated video generation and related downstream tasks. Among these, video stylization holds important research value in areas such as immersive applications and artistic creation, attracting widespread attention. However, existing diffusion-based video stylization methods struggle to maintain stability and consistency when processing long videos, and their high computational cost and multi-step denoising make them difficult to apply in practical scenarios. In this work, we propose RTR-DiT (DiT as Real-Time Rerenderer), a steaming video stylization framework built upon Diffusion Transformer. We first fine-tune a bidirectional teacher model on a curated video stylization dataset, supporting both text-guided and reference-guided video stylization tasks, and subsequently distill it into a few-step autoregressive model via post-training with Self Forcing and Distribution Matching Distillation. Furthermore, we propose a reference-preserving KV cache update strategy that not only enables stable and consistent processing of long videos, but also supports real-time switching between text prompts and reference images. Experimental results show that RTR-DiT outperforms existing methods in both text-guided and reference-guided video stylization tasks, in terms of quantitative metrics and visual quality, and demonstrates excellent performance in real-time long video stylization and interactive style-switching applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出RTR-DiT框架，将扩散Transformer蒸馏为自回归模型，实现实时、稳定的长视频风格化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散视频风格化方法在处理长视频时稳定性和一致性不足，且计算成本高、多步去噪难以实用。
analysis.problem: 如何实现高效、稳定、实时的长视频风格化，并支持文本和参考图引导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于扩散Transformer，先微调双向教师模型，再通过Self Forcing和分布匹配蒸馏得到少步自回归模型，并设计保留参考的KV缓存更新策略。
contributions: 提出RTR-DiT框架，实现实时视频风格化。
提出保留参考的KV缓存更新策略，支持长视频稳定处理和实时切换提示。
analysis.experiments: 在文本引导和参考引导视频风格化任务上，定量指标和视觉质量均优于现有方法，并展示了实时长视频风格化和交互式风格切换性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集微调，泛化性需验证。
自回归蒸馏可能引入误差累积。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合蒸馏和KV缓存实现实时视频风格化，实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RTR-DiT框架，将扩散Transformer蒸馏为自回归模型，实现实时、稳定的长视频风格化。

papers.title: Enhancing Mixture-of-Experts Specialization via Cluster-Aware Upcycling
papers.abstract: Sparse Upcycling provides an efficient way to initialize a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model from pretrained dense weights instead of training from scratch. However, since all experts start from identical weights and the router is randomly initialized, the model suffers from expert symmetry and limited early specialization. We propose Cluster-aware Upcycling, a strategy that incorporates semantic structure into MoE initialization. Our method first partitions the dense model's input activations into semantic clusters. Each expert is then initialized using the subspace representations of its corresponding cluster via truncated SVD, while setting the router's initial weights to the cluster centroids. This cluster-aware initialization breaks expert symmetry and encourages early specialization aligned with the data distribution. Furthermore, we introduce an expert-ensemble self-distillation loss that stabilizes training by providing reliable routing guidance using an ensemble teacher. When evaluated on CLIP ViT-B/32 and ViT-B/16, Cluster-aware Upcycling consistently outperforms existing methods across both zero-shot and few-shot benchmarks. The proposed method also produces more diverse and disentangled expert representations, reduces inter-expert similarity, and leads to more confident routing behavior. Project page: https://sanghyeokchu.github.io/cluster-aware-upcycling/

analysis.tldr: 提出Cluster-aware Upcycling方法，通过语义聚类初始化MoE专家和路由器，打破专家对称性并提升专业化，在CLIP ViT上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: Sparse Upcycling从预训练稠密权重初始化MoE模型时，所有专家起始权重相同且路由器随机初始化，导致专家对称性和早期专业化不足，限制了模型性能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用预训练稠密模型中的语义结构来初始化MoE，以打破专家对称性并促进早期专业化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有Sparse Upcycling方法中，所有专家从相同权重开始且路由器随机初始化，导致专家对称性和早期专业化受限。
analysis.method: Cluster-aware Upcycling：首先对稠密模型的输入激活进行语义聚类，然后使用截断SVD从每个聚类的子空间表示初始化对应专家，并将路由器初始权重设为聚类中心；同时引入专家集成自蒸馏损失以稳定训练。
contributions: 提出Cluster-aware Upcycling，利用语义聚类初始化MoE，打破专家对称性并促进早期专业化。
引入专家集成自蒸馏损失，提供可靠路由指导，稳定训练过程。
在CLIP ViT-B/32和ViT-B/16上，零样本和少样本基准均优于现有方法，且专家表示更多样、解耦，专家间相似性降低，路由行为更自信。
analysis.experiments: 在CLIP ViT-B/32和ViT-B/16上评估，零样本和少样本基准均优于现有方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖聚类质量，对聚类算法敏感。
仅验证了视觉Transformer架构，未在语言模型或其他模态上测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，实验验证有效，但仅限视觉模型，影响范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Cluster-aware Upcycling方法，通过语义聚类初始化MoE专家和路由器，打破专家对称性并提升专业化，在CLIP ViT上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Chain of Uncertain Rewards with Large Language Models for Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Designing effective reward functions is a cornerstone of reinforcement learning (RL), yet it remains a challenging and labor-intensive process due to the inefficiencies and inconsistencies inherent in traditional methods. Existing methods often rely on extensive manual design and evaluation steps, which are prone to redundancy and overlook local uncertainties at intermediate decision points. To address these challenges, we propose the Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR), a novel framework that integrates large language models (LLMs) to streamline reward function design and evaluation in RL environments. Specifically, our CoUR introduces code uncertainty quantification with a similarity selection mechanism that combines textual and semantic analyses to identify and reuse the most relevant reward function components. By reducing redundant evaluations and leveraging Bayesian optimization on decoupled reward terms, CoUR enables a more efficient and robust search for optimal reward feedback. We comprehensively evaluate CoUR across nine original environments from IsaacGym and all 20 tasks from the Bidexterous Manipulation benchmark. The experimental results demonstrate that CoUR not only achieves better performance but also significantly lowers the cost of reward evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 提出Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR)框架，利用LLM和不确定性量化高效设计强化学习奖励函数。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统奖励函数设计依赖大量人工且易忽略中间决策点的局部不确定性，导致效率低、成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM自动生成和优化奖励函数，同时减少冗余评估并考虑局部不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CoUR框架：结合代码不确定性量化与相似性选择机制（文本+语义分析），重用最相关奖励组件；通过贝叶斯优化解耦奖励项，减少冗余评估。
contributions: 提出CoUR框架，将LLM与不确定性量化结合用于奖励函数设计。
在IsaacGym和Bidexterous Manipulation基准上验证了性能提升和成本降低。
analysis.experiments: 在IsaacGym的9个环境和Bidexterous Manipulation的20个任务上评估，结果表明CoUR性能更好且评估成本更低。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的生成质量，对复杂任务泛化性待验证。
相似性选择机制的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，与LLM+RL方向相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR)框架，利用LLM和不确定性量化高效设计强化学习奖励函数。

papers.title: ADP-DiT: Text-Guided Diffusion Transformer for Brain Image Generation in Alzheimer's Disease Progression
papers.abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) progresses heterogeneously across individuals, motivating subject-specific synthesis of follow-up magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) to support progression assessment. While Diffusion Transformers (DiT), an emerging transformer-based diffusion model, offer a scalable backbone for image synthesis, longitudinal AD MRI generation with clinically interpretable control over follow-up time and participant metadata remains underexplored. We present ADP-DiT, an interval-aware, clinically text-conditioned diffusion transformer for longitudinal AD MRI synthesis. ADP-DiT encodes follow-up interval together with multi-domain demographic, diagnostic (CN/MCI/AD), and neuropsychological information as a natural-language prompt, enabling time-specific control beyond coarse diagnostic stages. To inject this conditioning effectively, we use dual text encoders-OpenCLIP for vision-language alignment and T5 for richer clinical-language understanding. Their embeddings are fused into DiT through cross-attention for fine-grained guidance and adaptive layer normalization for global modulation. We further enhance anatomical fidelity by applying rotary positional embeddings to image tokens and performing diffusion in a pre-trained SDXL-VAE latent space to enable efficient high-resolution reconstruction. On 3,321 longitudinal 3T T1-weighted scans from 712 participants (259,038 image slices), ADP-DiT achieves SSIM 0.8739 and PSNR 29.32 dB, improving over a DiT baseline by +0.1087 SSIM and +6.08 dB PSNR while capturing progression-related changes such as ventricular enlargement and shrinking hippocampus. These results suggest that integrating comprehensive, subject-specific clinical conditions with architectures can improve longitudinal AD MRI synthesis.

analysis.tldr: 提出ADP-DiT，利用文本引导的扩散Transformer生成阿尔茨海默病纵向MRI，通过临床文本条件实现时间可控的脑图像合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 阿尔茨海默病进展具有个体异质性，需要个性化的随访MRI生成以支持病情评估，但现有方法缺乏对随访时间和临床元数据的可解释控制。
analysis.problem: 如何生成具有临床可解释控制（如随访间隔、诊断状态、神经心理学信息）的纵向AD MRI图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用间隔感知的临床文本条件扩散Transformer，使用双文本编码器（OpenCLIP和T5）融合条件，通过交叉注意力和自适应层归一化注入DiT，并在SDXL-VAE潜空间中进行扩散，同时应用旋转位置编码增强解剖保真度。
contributions: 首次将临床文本条件（包括随访间隔、人口统计、诊断和神经心理学信息）引入扩散Transformer用于纵向AD MRI生成。
提出双文本编码器融合策略，结合OpenCLIP和T5分别处理视觉-语言对齐和临床语言理解。
在大型纵向数据集上验证了方法，显著优于DiT基线，并捕捉到疾病进展相关变化。
analysis.experiments: 在712名参与者的3321次纵向3T T1加权扫描（259038张图像切片）上评估，ADP-DiT达到SSIM 0.8739和PSNR 29.32 dB，相比DiT基线分别提升+0.1087 SSIM和+6.08 dB PSNR。
limitations: 可能仅适用于T1加权MRI，未验证其他模态。
临床文本条件的泛化性可能受限于数据集中的特定诊断和人口统计分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合临床文本条件与扩散Transformer，实验充分且效果显著，对医学图像生成领域有较高价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ADP-DiT，利用文本引导的扩散Transformer生成阿尔茨海默病纵向MRI，通过临床文本条件实现时间可控的脑图像合成。

papers.title: RadarSplat-RIO: Indoor Radar-Inertial Odometry with Gaussian Splatting-Based Radar Bundle Adjustment
papers.abstract: Radar is more resilient to adverse weather and lighting conditions than visual and Lidar simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). However, most radar SLAM pipelines still rely heavily on frame-to-frame odometry, which leads to substantial drift. While loop closure can correct long-term errors, it requires revisiting places and relies on robust place recognition. In contrast, visual odometry methods typically leverage bundle adjustment (BA) to jointly optimize poses and map within a local window. However, an equivalent BA formulation for radar has remained largely unexplored. We present the first radar BA framework enabled by Gaussian Splatting (GS), a dense and differentiable scene representation. Our method jointly optimizes radar sensor poses and scene geometry using full range-azimuth-Doppler data, bringing the benefits of multi-frame BA to radar for the first time. When integrated with an existing radar-inertial odometry frontend, our approach significantly reduces pose drift and improves robustness. Across multiple indoor scenes, our radar BA achieves substantial gains over the prior radar-inertial odometry, reducing average absolute translational and rotational errors by 90% and 80%, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 首个基于高斯泼溅的雷达束调整框架，联合优化雷达位姿与场景几何，显著降低室内雷达惯性里程计的漂移。
analysis.research_motivation: 雷达在恶劣天气和光照条件下优于视觉和激光雷达，但现有雷达SLAM依赖帧间里程计导致严重漂移，且缺乏等效于视觉束调整的雷达多帧联合优化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何实现雷达传感器的多帧束调整以联合优化位姿和场景几何，从而减少雷达惯性里程计的累积漂移。

analysis.method: 提出首个基于高斯泼溅的雷达束调整框架，利用密集可微的场景表示，联合优化雷达传感器位姿和场景几何，使用全距离-方位角-多普勒数据。

papers.title: Enhanced Text-to-Image Generation by Fine-grained Multimodal Reasoning
papers.abstract: With the rapid progress of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), unified MLLMs that jointly perform image understanding and generation have advanced significantly. However, despite the inherent reasoning capabilities of unified MLLMs for self-reflection and self-refinement, their use in text-to-image generation remains largely underexplored. Meanwhile, existing multimodal reasoning-based image generation methods mostly rely on holistic image-text alignment judgments, without fine-grained reflection and refinement of detailed prompt attributes, leading to limited fine-grained control. Therefore, we propose Fine-grained Multimodal Reasoning (FiMR), a framework that leverages decomposed visual question answering (VQA) to break down an input prompt into minimal semantic units-such as entities and attributes-and verify each unit via VQA to generate explicit, fine-grained feedback. Based on this feedback, FiMR then applies targeted, localized refinements. This fine-grained self-reasoning and self-refinement enable MLLMs to achieve more precise improvements in image-prompt alignment and overall generation quality at test time. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FiMR consistently outperforms image generation baselines, including reasoning-based methods, particularly on compositional text-to-image benchmarks. The code and models are available at https://github.com/KU-AGI/FiMR

analysis.tldr: 提出细粒度多模态推理框架FiMR，通过分解VQA实现文本到图像生成的精细对齐与局部优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有统一MLLM虽具备推理能力，但在文本到图像生成中未充分利用；且现有推理方法依赖整体图像-文本对齐判断，缺乏对细节属性的细粒度反思与优化。
analysis.problem: 如何利用MLLM的推理能力实现文本到图像生成中细粒度的自我反思与局部优化，提升图像与提示的精确对齐。

contributions: 提出细粒度多模态推理框架FiMR，实现文本到图像生成的精细自我反思与优化。

papers.title: Towards Scalable Lightweight GUI Agents via Multi-role Orchestration
papers.abstract: Autonomous Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents powered by Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) enable digital automation on end-user devices. While scaling both parameters and data has yielded substantial gains, advanced methods still suffer from prohibitive deployment costs on resource-constrained devices. When facing complex in-the-wild scenarios, lightweight GUI agents are bottlenecked by limited capacity and poor task scalability under end-to-end episodic learning, impeding adaptation to multi-agent systems (MAS), while training multiple skill-specific experts remains costly. Can we strike an effective trade-off in this cost-scalability dilemma, enabling lightweight MLLMs to participate in realistic GUI workflows? To address these challenges, we propose the LAMO framework, which endows a lightweight MLLM with GUI-specific knowledge and task scalability, allowing multi-role orchestration to expand its capability boundary for GUI automation. LAMO combines role-oriented data synthesis with a two-stage training recipe: (i) supervised fine-tuning with Perplexity-Weighted Cross-Entropy optimization for knowledge distillation and visual perception enhancement, and (ii) reinforcement learning for role-oriented cooperative exploration. With LAMO, we develop a task-scalable native GUI agent, LAMO-3B, supporting monolithic execution and MAS-style orchestration. When paired with advanced planners as a plug-and-play policy executor, LAMO-3B can continuously benefit from planner advances, enabling a higher performance ceiling. Extensive static and online evaluations validate the effectiveness of our design.

analysis.tldr: 提出LAMO框架，通过多角色编排让轻量级MLLM在GUI任务中实现可扩展性，兼顾成本与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GUI智能体依赖大规模模型，部署成本高，轻量级模型在复杂场景下能力有限且难以扩展，多智能体系统训练多个专家成本高昂。

analysis.method: LAMO框架：角色导向数据合成 + 两阶段训练（SFT使用困惑度加权交叉熵进行知识蒸馏和视觉感知增强，RL进行角色导向合作探索），生成支持单体和MAS编排的LAMO-3B智能体。

papers.title: Monthly Diffusion v0.9: A Latent Diffusion Model for the First AI-MIP
papers.abstract: Here, we describe Monthly Diffusion at 1.5-degree grid spacing (MD-1.5 version 0.9), a climate emulator that leverages a spherical Fourier neural operator (SFNO)-inspired Conditional Variational Auto-Encoder (CVAE) architecture to model the evolution of low-frequency internal atmospheric variability using latent diffusion. MDv0.9 was designed to forward-step at monthly mean timesteps in a data-sparse regime, using modest computational requirements. This work describes the motivation behind the architecture design, the MDv0.9 training procedure, and initial results.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于潜扩散的气候仿真器MDv0.9，用于模拟低频内部大气变率。

papers.title: Learning Class Difficulty in Imbalanced Histopathology Segmentation via Dynamic Focal Attention
papers.abstract: Semantic segmentation of histopathology images under class imbalance is typically addressed through frequency-based loss reweighting, which implicitly assumes that rare classes are difficult. However, true difficulty also arises from morphological variability, boundary ambiguity, and contextual similarity-factors that frequency cannot capture. We propose Dynamic Focal Attention (DFA), a simple and efficient mechanism that learns class-specific difficulty directly within the cross-attention of query-based mask decoders. DFA introduces a learnable per-class bias to attention logits, enabling representation-level reweighting prior to prediction rather than gradient-level reweighting after prediction. Initialised from a log-frequency prior to prevent gradient starvation, the bias is optimised end-to-end, allowing the model to adaptively capture difficulty signals through training, effectively unifying frequency-based and difficulty-aware approaches under a common attention-bias framework. On three histopathology benchmarks (BDSA, BCSS, CRAG), DFA consistently improves Dice and IoU, matching or exceeding a difficulty-aware baseline without a separate estimator or additional training stage. These results demonstrate that encoding class difficulty at the representation level provides a principled alternative to conventional loss reweighting for imbalanced segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态焦点注意力（DFA），在注意力层学习类别难度，解决组织病理学图像分割中的类别不平衡问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法通过频率重加权处理类别不平衡，但频率无法捕捉形态变异、边界模糊等真实难度因素，导致分割性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖额外估计器的情况下，在表示层面自适应地学习类别难度，以改进不平衡组织病理学图像分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 频率重加权假设稀有类别即困难，但实际困难还源于形态变异、边界模糊和上下文相似性，这些因素频率无法捕捉。
analysis.method: 在基于查询的掩码解码器的交叉注意力中引入可学习的每类偏置，初始化为对数频率先验，通过端到端训练自适应调整，实现表示级重加权。
contributions: 提出动态焦点注意力（DFA），在注意力层直接学习类别难度，统一频率基和难度感知方法。
在三个组织病理学基准上验证了DFA的有效性，无需额外估计器或训练阶段。
analysis.experiments: 在BDSA、BCSS、CRAG三个组织病理学基准上，DFA一致提升了Dice和IoU，匹配或超越了难度感知基线。

papers.title: RobotPan: A 360$^\circ$ Surround-View Robotic Vision System for Embodied Perception
papers.abstract: Surround-view perception is increasingly important for robotic navigation and loco-manipulation, especially in human-in-the-loop settings such as teleoperation, data collection, and emergency takeover. However, current robotic visual interfaces are often limited to narrow forward-facing views, or, when multiple on-board cameras are available, require cumbersome manual switching that interrupts the operator's workflow. Both configurations suffer from motion-induced jitter that causes simulator sickness in head-mounted displays. We introduce a surround-view robotic vision system that combines six cameras with LiDAR to provide full 360$^\circ$ visual coverage, while meeting the geometric and real-time constraints of embodied deployment. We further present \textsc{RobotPan}, a feed-forward framework that predicts \emph{metric-scaled} and \emph{compact} 3D Gaussians from calibrated sparse-view inputs for real-time rendering, reconstruction, and streaming. \textsc{RobotPan} lifts multi-view features into a unified spherical coordinate representation and decodes Gaussians using hierarchical spherical voxel priors, allocating fine resolution near the robot and coarser resolution at larger radii to reduce computational redundancy without sacrificing fidelity. To support long sequences, our online fusion updates dynamic content while preventing unbounded growth in static regions by selectively updating appearance. Finally, we release a multi-sensor dataset tailored to 360$^\circ$ novel view synthesis and metric 3D reconstruction for robotics, covering navigation, manipulation, and locomotion on real platforms. Experiments show that \textsc{RobotPan} achieves competitive quality against prior feed-forward reconstruction and view-synthesis methods while producing substantially fewer Gaussians, enabling practical real-time embodied deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种360度环视机器人视觉系统RobotPan，通过稀疏视图预测度量尺度的紧凑3D高斯实现实时渲染与重建。

papers.title: Secure and Privacy-Preserving Vertical Federated Learning
papers.abstract: We propose a novel end-to-end privacy-preserving framework, instantiated by three efficient protocols for different deployment scenarios, covering both input and output privacy, for the vertically split scenario in federated learning (FL), where features are split across clients and labels are not shared by all parties. We do so by distributing the role of the aggregator in FL into multiple servers and having them run secure multiparty computation (MPC) protocols to perform model and feature aggregation and apply differential privacy (DP) to the final released model. While a naive solution would have the clients delegating the entirety of training to run in MPC between the servers, our optimized solution, which supports purely global and also global-local models updates with privacy-preserving, drastically reduces the amount of computation and communication performed using multiparty computation. The experimental results also show the effectiveness of our protocols.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合安全多方计算和差分隐私的端到端隐私保护框架，用于纵向联邦学习。

papers.title: Optimistic Policy Learning under Pessimistic Adversaries with Regret and Violation Guarantees
papers.abstract: Real-world decision-making systems operate in environments where state transitions depend not only on the agent's actions, but also on \textbf{exogenous factors outside its control}--competing agents, environmental disturbances, or strategic adversaries--formally, $s_{h+1} = f(s_h, a_h, \bar{a}_h)+ω_h$ where $\bar{a}_h$ is the adversary/external action, $a_h$ is the agent's action, and $ω_h$ is an additive noise. Ignoring such factors can yield policies that are optimal in isolation but \textbf{fail catastrophically in deployment}, particularly when safety constraints must be satisfied. Standard Constrained MDP formulations assume the agent is the sole driver of state evolution, an assumption that breaks down in safety-critical settings. Existing robust RL approaches address this via distributional robustness over transition kernels, but do not explicitly model the \textbf{strategic interaction} between agent and exogenous factor, and rely on strong assumptions about divergence from a known nominal model. We model the exogenous factor as an \textbf{adversarial policy} $\barπ$ that co-determines state transitions, and ask how an agent can remain both optimal and safe against such an adversary. \emph{To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to study safety-constrained RL under explicit adversarial dynamics}. We propose \textbf{Robust Hallucinated Constrained Upper-Confidence RL} (\texttt{RHC-UCRL}), a model-based algorithm that maintains optimism over both agent and adversary policies, explicitly separating epistemic from aleatoric uncertainty. \texttt{RHC-UCRL} achieves sub-linear regret and constraint violation guarantees.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个在显式对抗动力学下保证安全约束的强化学习算法RHC-UCRL，实现次线性遗憾与约束违反。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实决策系统中状态转移受外部因素（如对手、环境扰动）影响，忽略这些因素会导致策略在部署时灾难性失败，尤其在安全约束场景下。现有鲁棒RL方法未显式建模智能体与外部因素的策略交互，且依赖强假设。
analysis.problem: 在状态转移由智能体和对抗性策略共同决定的约束马尔可夫决策过程中，如何设计算法使智能体同时保持最优性和安全性。

papers.title: Bridging MARL to SARL: An Order-Independent Multi-Agent Transformer via Latent Consensus
papers.abstract: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) is widely used to address large joint observation and action spaces by decomposing a centralized control problem into multiple interacting agents. However, such decomposition often introduces additional challenges, including non-stationarity, unstable training, weak coordination, and limited theoretical guarantees. In this paper, we propose the Consensus Multi-Agent Transformer (CMAT), a centralized framework that bridges cooperative MARL to a hierarchical single-agent reinforcement learning (SARL) formulation. CMAT treats all agents as a unified entity and employs a Transformer encoder to process the large joint observation space. To handle the extensive joint action space, we introduce a hierarchical decision-making mechanism in which a Transformer decoder autoregressively generates a high-level consensus vector, simulating the process by which agents reach agreement on their strategies in latent space. Conditioned on this consensus, all agents generate their actions simultaneously, enabling order-independent joint decision making and avoiding the sensitivity to action-generation order in conventional Multi-Agent Transformers (MAT). This factorization allows the joint policy to be optimized using single-agent PPO while preserving expressive coordination through the latent consensus. To evaluate the proposed method, we conduct experiments on benchmark tasks from StarCraft II, Multi-Agent MuJoCo, and Google Research Football. The results show that CMAT achieves superior performance over recent centralized solutions, sequential MARL methods, and conventional MARL baselines. The code for this paper is available at:https://github.com/RS2002/CMAT .

analysis.tldr: 提出共识多智能体Transformer（CMAT），通过潜在共识将合作MARL转化为层次化单智能体强化学习，实现顺序无关的联合决策。
analysis.research_motivation: 合作多智能体强化学习（MARL）通过分解集中控制问题为多个交互智能体来处理大联合观测和动作空间，但引入了非平稳性、训练不稳定、协调弱和理论保证有限等挑战。
analysis.problem: 解决传统MARL方法中因智能体分解导致的非平稳性、训练不稳定和动作生成顺序敏感性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统多智能体Transformer（MAT）对动作生成顺序敏感，而CMAT通过潜在共识实现顺序无关的联合决策。
analysis.method: 提出共识多智能体Transformer（CMAT），将合作MARL转化为层次化单智能体强化学习：使用Transformer编码器处理联合观测空间，解码器自回归生成高层共识向量，所有智能体基于该共识同时生成动作，并使用单智能体PPO优化联合策略。
contributions: 提出CMAT框架，将合作MARL桥接到层次化单智能体强化学习，简化优化并保持协调能力。
引入潜在共识机制，实现顺序无关的联合决策，避免传统MAT对动作生成顺序的敏感性。
在StarCraft II、Multi-Agent MuJoCo和Google Research Football上取得优于多种基线方法的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在StarCraft II、Multi-Agent MuJoCo和Google Research Football的基准任务上进行实验，结果显示CMAT优于最近的集中式方法、顺序MARL方法和传统MARL基线。
limitations: 可能对共识向量的维度选择敏感，需要调参。
层次化结构可能增加计算开销，尤其在智能体数量极大时。

analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，与MARL和Transformer方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出共识多智能体Transformer（CMAT），通过潜在共识将合作MARL转化为层次化单智能体强化学习，实现顺序无关的联合决策。

papers.title: Learning from Change: Predictive Models for Incident Prevention in a Regulated IT Environment
papers.abstract: Effective IT change management is important for businesses that depend on software and services, particularly in highly regulated sectors such as finance, where operational reliability, auditability, and explainability are essential. A significant portion of IT incidents are caused by changes, making it important to identify high-risk changes before deployment. This study presents a predictive incident risk scoring approach at a large international bank. The approach supports engineers during the assessment and planning phases of change deployments by predicting the potential of inducing incidents. To satisfy regulatory constraints, we built the model with auditability and explainability in mind, applying SHAP values to provide feature-level insights and ensure decisions are traceable and transparent. Using a one-year real-world dataset, we compare the existing rule-based process with three machine learning models: HGBC, LightGBM, and XGBoost. LightGBM achieved the best performance, particularly when enriched with aggregated team metrics that capture organisational context. Our results show that data-driven, interpretable models can outperform rule-based approaches while meeting compliance needs, enabling proactive risk mitigation and more reliable IT operations.

analysis.tldr: 用可解释的机器学习模型预测IT变更风险，在银行场景中优于规则方法。
analysis.research_motivation: IT变更导致大量事故，尤其在金融等受监管行业，需要提前识别高风险变更以保障运营可靠性，同时满足审计和可解释性要求。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用SHAP值增强可解释性的机器学习模型（HGBC、LightGBM、XGBoost），并加入聚合团队指标。
contributions: 提出一种面向受监管IT环境的可解释变更风险预测方法。
通过真实银行数据验证了数据驱动模型优于规则方法，LightGBM表现最佳。
analysis.experiments: 使用一年真实银行数据集，比较规则方法与三种ML模型，LightGBM结合团队指标效果最好。
limitations: 仅在一个银行场景验证，泛化性未知。

papers.title: From Order to Distribution: A Spectral Characterization of Forgetting in Continual Learning
papers.abstract: A central challenge in continual learning is forgetting, the loss of performance on previously learned tasks induced by sequential adaptation to new ones. While forgetting has been extensively studied empirically, rigorous theoretical characterizations remain limited. A notable step in this direction is \citet{evron2022catastrophic}, which analyzes forgetting under random orderings of a fixed task collection in overparameterized linear regression. We shift the perspective from order to distribution. Rather than asking how a fixed task collection behaves under random orderings, we study an exact-fit linear regime in which tasks are sampled i.i.d.\ from a task distribution~$Π$, and ask how the generating distribution itself governs forgetting. In this setting, we derive an exact operator identity for the forgetting quantity, revealing a recursive spectral structure. Building on this identity, we establish an unconditional upper bound, identify the leading asymptotic term, and, in generic nondegenerate cases, characterize the convergence rate up to constants. We further relate this rate to geometric properties of the task distribution, clarifying what drives slow or fast forgetting in this model.

analysis.tldr: 将遗忘研究从任务顺序转向任务分布，在过参数化线性回归中推导出遗忘量的精确算子恒等式并刻画其渐近行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 持续学习中遗忘现象被广泛研究，但缺乏严格的理论刻画；现有工作主要关注固定任务集合在随机顺序下的行为，忽略了任务生成分布本身对遗忘的影响。
analysis.problem: 在任务独立同分布采样的过参数化线性回归设定下，从分布角度理论刻画遗忘量的行为，包括上界、渐近项和收敛速率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 遗忘量具有递归谱结构，其收敛速率与任务分布的几何性质相关，非退化情形下可精确刻画至常数阶。
analysis.method: 推导遗忘量的精确算子恒等式，揭示递归谱结构；基于该恒等式建立无条件上界、识别主渐近项并刻画收敛速率。
contributions: 将遗忘分析从任务顺序视角转向任务分布视角，提出新的理论框架
推导出遗忘量的精确算子恒等式，揭示递归谱结构
建立无条件上界、渐近主项和收敛速率的完整理论刻画，并关联任务分布几何性质
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 理论分析限于过参数化线性回归，未扩展到非线性模型
假设任务独立同分布，可能不适用于任务间存在依赖的实际场景

papers.title: Asymmetric-Loss-Guided Hybrid CNN-BiLSTM-Attention Model for Industrial RUL Prediction with Interpretable Failure Heatmaps
papers.abstract: Turbofan engine degradation under sustained operational stress necessitates robust prognostic systems capable of accurately estimating the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of critical components. Existing deep learning approaches frequently fail to simultaneously capture multi-sensor spatial correlations and long-range temporal dependencies, while standard symmetric loss functions inadequately penalize the safety-critical error of over-estimating residual life. This study proposes a hybrid architecture integrating Twin-Stage One-Dimensional Convolutional Neural Networks (1D-CNN), a Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (BiLSTM) network, and a custom Bahdanau Additive Attention mechanism. The model was trained and evaluated on the NASA Commercial Modular Aero-Propulsion System Simulation (C-MAPSS) FD001 sub-dataset employing a zero-leakage preprocessing pipeline, piecewise-linear RUL labeling capped at 130 cycles, and the NASA-specified asymmetric exponential loss function that disproportionately penalizes over-estimation to enforce industrial safety constraints. Experiments on 100 test engines achieved a Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) of 17.52 cycles and a NASA S-Score of 922.06. Furthermore, extracted attention weight heatmaps provide interpretable, per-engine insights into the temporal progression of degradation, supporting informed maintenance decision-making. The proposed framework demonstrates competitive performance against established baselines and offers a principled approach to safe, interpretable prognostics in industrial settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出非对称损失引导的CNN-BiLSTM-Attention混合模型，用于涡扇发动机RUL预测，在C-MAPSS数据集上取得竞争性能并生成可解释故障热图。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习方法难以同时捕获多传感器空间相关性和长程时间依赖，且标准对称损失函数对高估剩余寿命这一安全关键错误惩罚不足，亟需安全、可解释的工业预测方法。
analysis.problem: 解决涡扇发动机RUL预测中多传感器时空特征融合不足以及高估寿命导致的安全风险问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合架构，包括双阶段一维CNN、BiLSTM和Bahdanau加性注意力机制，采用零泄漏预处理、分段线性RUL标签（上限130周期）和NASA指定的非对称指数损失函数。
contributions: 提出非对称损失引导的CNN-BiLSTM-Attention混合模型，在C-MAPSS FD001上实现RMSE 17.52和S-Score 922.06。
通过注意力权重热图提供可解释的每引擎退化时间进程，支持维护决策。
analysis.experiments: 在NASA C-MAPSS FD001子数据集上对100个测试引擎进行实验，得到RMSE 17.52和S-Score 922.06。
limitations: 仅在单一子数据集FD001上验证，泛化性待检验。
可解释性仅基于注意力权重，缺乏因果或反事实分析。

papers.title: MyoVision: A Mobile Research Tool and NEATBoost-Attention Ensemble Framework for Real Time Chicken Breast Myopathy Detection
papers.abstract: Woody Breast (WB) and Spaghetti Meat (SM) myopathies significantly impact poultry meat quality, yet current detection methods rely either on subjective manual evaluation or costly laboratory-grade imaging systems. We address the problem of low-cost, non-destructive multi-class myopathy classification using consumer smartphones. MyoVision is introduced as a mobile transillumination imaging framework in which 14-bit RAW images are captured and structural texture descriptors indicative of internal tissue abnormalities are extracted. To classify three categories (Normal, Woody Breast, Spaghetti Meat), we propose a NEATBoost-Attention Ensemble model, which is a neuroevolution-optimized weighted fusion of LightGBM and attention-based MLP models. Hyperparameters are automatically discovered using NeuroEvolution of Augmenting Topologies (NEAT), eliminating manual tuning and enabling architecture diversity for small tabular datasets. On a dataset of 336 fillets collected from a commercial processing facility, our method achieves 82.4% test accuracy (F1 = 0.83), outperforming conventional machine learning and deep learning baselines and matching performance reported by hyperspectral imaging systems costing orders of magnitude more. Beyond classification performance, MyoVision establishes a reproducible mobile RGB-D acquisition pipeline for multimodal meat quality research, demonstrating that consumer-grade imaging can support scalable internal tissue assessment.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于智能手机的鸡肉肌病检测框架MyoVision，结合NEATBoost-Attention集成模型实现低成本、非破坏性的多分类检测。

在336个样本数据集上达到82.4%准确率（F1=0.83），与昂贵的高光谱成像系统性能相当。

papers.title: Outperforming Self-Attention Mechanisms in Solar Irradiance Forecasting via Physics-Guided Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Accurate Global Horizontal Irradiance (GHI) forecasting is critical for grid stability, particularly in arid regions characterized by rapid aerosol fluctuations. While recent trends favor computationally expensive Transformer-based architectures, this paper challenges the prevailing "complexity-first" paradigm. We propose a lightweight, Physics-Informed Hybrid CNN-BiLSTM framework that prioritizes domain knowledge over architectural depth. The model integrates a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for spatial feature extraction with a Bi-Directional LSTM for capturing temporal dependencies. Unlike standard data-driven approaches, our model is explicitly guided by a vector of 15 engineered features including Clear-Sky indices and Solar Zenith Angle - rather than relying solely on raw historical data. Hyperparameters are rigorously tuned using Bayesian Optimization to ensure global optimality. Experimental validation using NASA POWER data in Sudan demonstrates that our physics-guided approach achieves a Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) of 19.53 W/m^2, significantly outperforming complex attention-based baselines (RMSE 30.64 W/m^2). These results confirm a "Complexity Paradox": in high-noise meteorological tasks, explicit physical constraints offer a more efficient and accurate alternative to self-attention mechanisms. The findings advocate for a shift towards hybrid, physics-aware AI for real-time renewable energy management.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理引导的CNN-BiLSTM轻量框架，在太阳辐照度预测中超越复杂自注意力模型，揭示高噪声气象任务中的“复杂度悖论”。
analysis.research_motivation: 准确预测太阳辐照度对电网稳定至关重要，尤其在干旱地区气溶胶快速波动下。当前趋势偏向计算昂贵的Transformer架构，但存在“复杂度优先”范式，可能不适用于高噪声气象任务。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持轻量高效的同时，提升太阳辐照度预测的准确性，并挑战自注意力机制在该任务中的必要性。

analysis.method: 提出物理引导的混合CNN-BiLSTM框架，集成CNN提取空间特征和BiLSTM捕获时间依赖，并利用15个工程特征（如晴空指数、太阳天顶角）显式引导模型，超参数通过贝叶斯优化调优。

提出并验证了物理引导的CNN-BiLSTM框架，在NASA POWER数据上取得显著更低的RMSE（19.53 vs 30.64 W/m²）。
analysis.experiments: 使用NASA POWER数据在苏丹进行实验，与基于注意力的基线对比，RMSE从30.64降至19.53 W/m²。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 仅在一个地区（苏丹）和单一数据集（NASA POWER）上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。

papers.title: A Study of Failure Modes in Two-Stage Human-Object Interaction Detection
papers.abstract: Human-object interaction (HOI) detection aims to detect interactions between humans and objects in images. While recent advances have improved performance on existing benchmarks, their evaluations mainly focus on overall prediction accuracy and provide limited insight into the underlying causes of model failures. In particular, modern models often struggle in complex scenes involving multiple people and rare interaction combinations. In this work, we present a study to better understand the failure modes of two-stage HOI models, which form the basis of many current HOI detection approaches. Rather than constructing a large-scale benchmark, we instead decompose HOI detection into multiple interpretable perspectives and analyze model behavior across these dimensions to study different types of failure patterns. We curate a subset of images from an existing HOI dataset organized by human-object-interaction configurations (e.g., multi-person interactions and object sharing), and analyze model behavior under these configurations to examine different failure modes. This design allows us to analyze how these HOI models behave under different scene compositions and why their predictions fail. Importantly, high overall benchmark performance does not necessarily reflect robust visual reasoning about human-object relationships. We hope that this study can provide useful insights into the limitations of HOI models and offer observations for future research in this area.

analysis.tldr: 通过分解HOI检测为多个可解释维度，系统分析两阶段模型在复杂场景下的失败模式。
